name: VoteVets VA Defense Fund
subject: 🚨 DOGE in the VA 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
There’s some unvetted, unaccountable Musk lackey plugged into the VA. Our personal data. Our benefits. Our VA.
#
Peter — we were waiting for this. Now it’s here. All hands on deck.
There’s some unvetted, unaccountable Musk lackey plugged into the VA. Our personal data. Our benefits. Our VA.
**VoteVets needs you NOW.**
We just set up the VoteVets VA Defense Fund, and we’re going to use it to fight any attempt — from the Trump administration, the Republicans in the House and Senate, Elon Musk and his interns, or anybody else — at slashing the benefits and care we earned.
**[MAKE A DONATION RIGHT AWAY TO ENSURE VOTEVETS HAS THE RESOURCES WE NEED TO DEFEND THE VA.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250206-1-f&t=1&akid=34141%2E3013755%2EdEd8tj)
| [CHIP IN NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250206-1-f&t=2&akid=34141%2E3013755%2EdEd8tj)
---
They’re looking for “waste.” Sure.
Just like USAID was “waste” — an organization responsible for saving countless lives around the world and staving off conflict to keep American Troops safe.
They’re just checking out the IT systems. Sure.
Just like they were in “read only” at the Treasury — while Musk and the Goonies were rifling through millions of records, accessing Social Security numbers and trillions of dollars in payments.
There’s no chance — **_none**_ — that we’re taking the talking points on this one. We weren’t born yesterday.
We’re going to fight back in honor of the ones who came before us to build the VA, and we’re going to defend it so the VA is still around to serve the ones who come after us.
That’s our pledge. Now, we need you.
**[Chip into the VoteVets VA Defense Fund.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250206-1-f&t=3&akid=34141%2E3013755%2EdEd8tj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Kevin Mullin
subject: BIG NEWS: I was just appointed to the House Energy & Commerce Committee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm proud to serve on the House Energy and Commerce Committee in the 119th Congress.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinmullinforcongress/big-news-i-was-just-appointed-to-the-house-energy-commerce-committee?e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=a979c6c543&e=292fde286a)
---
| I have some exciting news, Peter!
**I was recently appointed to serve on the House Energy and Commerce Committee in the 119th Congress.**
---
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=6426200639&e=292fde286a)
---
| The House Energy and Commerce Committee is one of the oldest and most powerful committees in Congress. It has jurisdiction over a wide range of economic activity, directly impacting my constituents in CA15.
I’m honored that my House Democratic colleagues supported my appointment, and I can't wait to get to work.
This is an especially important position as our new President transitions into power. This Committee assignment will allow me to work on issues that support the unique needs of our community while standing up to Donald Trump’s executive overreach.
---
| [DONATE TODAY!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=58463d122f&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | As Democrats, our greatest strength is our unity. I will continue to strengthen and grow our Democratic coalition so we can fight climate change, reduce the cost of housing, remove financial burdens for everyday Americans, and protect your basic freedoms. But I can't do it without you.
That’s why I’m asking for your help, to ensure that I can keep fighting for the values that make our schools, communities, and district such a special place. None of it would be possible without your support.
Please consider donating to my campaign today by clicking the link below so that we can ensure Democrats win back the House in 2026.
Thank you,
Rep. Kevin MullinCongressman, CA-15
---
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=034a4791fb&e=292fde286a)
---
| | PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
---

name: John Fetterman
subject: Why I’m voting NO on this nomination:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Last year I called out the dangers of Project 2025 and the damage it’d do to our country.
#
Derek, it's John Fetterman.
Last year I called out the dangers of Project 2025 and the damage it’d do to our country. And the Trump campaign knew how unpopular it was too, because Americans were **assured** their team had no ties to it.
But now they’ve nominated *one of the authors* of Project 2025, Russ Vought, to lead the Office of Management and Budget. One of the most important offices in the executive branch! 🤯
**Derek, my view hasn’t changed. Project 2025 would do serious damage to the country, and I will be a hard NO vote on Mr. Vought. 🚫**
I’ve always been clear that I’ll work with Trump where I can to get wins for PA. But when his administration tries to harm workers or roll back our rights, I won’t hesitate to fight back. And that includes this nomination.
[**If you’re with me, my campaign could really use your help today, Derek. Can you kick in $5 or more to help me keep this seat 🔵?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250206?refcode=em20250206-9874&refcode2=9874_434096_oW-SJO&akid=9874%2E434096%2EoW-SJO)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250206?amount=5&refcode=em20250206-9874&refcode2=9874_434096_oW-SJO&akid=9874%2E434096%2EoW-SJO)**
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250206-9874-footer&t=1&refcode2=9874_434096_oW-SJO&akid=9874%2E434096%2EoW-SJO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9874%2E434096%2EoW-SJO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9874%2E434096%2EoW-SJO)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: February Voter Verification [URGENT]
subject: No one from your area has stepped up yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Verify your voter profile >>

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father
body:
Life behind bars could be his “reward.” | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,This is a photo of me and my husband, **Officer Chance Bretches** , on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6820c90422d49ed938cebda3ce6647a&_e=tFBQCYhFmAtGB1stWulGQ81IXOEjvTYc_9VtTbPfjA-XgOCJ_KEJHOwrvc5bDfP6VDSeefkWxI6Ghe44fhzcgxu91dzelSXuxeQvxBmuy4CTHdPe7rowGiyYkEey_i3OuHULKj1wXk9IbBy59S4eKBhK3aFvedo58YClpzu3MDxB-M-oUoauz6m9Iamb-yoGAPnPJqt2nxWMpEXJJ3qwAFPoD0zb5ThaaihlrI2V4kzHmS0919n8xSxYOU-qsXMoNZhWG9D7Kr-GYg9GCV58-7R2c-sSnUuJQtDsoqxUwiidaFe3-p3dWSe2MOMButWkbMvRUES0hZXXbj3nZCp3qCmLa6hdHFLqiMT-V7VbsTW0ARAl3kzLSLZE8bJW_hB4cBYbKnvNyYsslWPdyUoRrQ%3D%3D)
---
This photo used to be one of my favorites. I was so proud of my husband that day.Now looking at it makes me cry.Because the same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison **for life** for doing his job.**[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to help me save my husband.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6820c90422d49ed938cebda3ce6647a&_e=tFBQCYhFmAtGB1stWulGQ81IXOEjvTYc_9VtTbPfjA-XgOCJ_KEJHOwrvc5bDfP6VDSeefkWxI6Ghe44fhzcgxu91dzelSXuxeQvxBmuy4CTHdPe7rowGiyYkEey_i3OuHULKj1wXk9IbBy59S4eKBhK3aFvedo58YClpzu3MDxB-M-oUoauz6m9Iamb-yoGAPnPJqt2nxWMpEXJJ3qwAFPoD0zb5ThaaihlrI2V4kxzflZNi8fkvM6sM9JRdZ3GX7tPnhOrtXg2H-nAiQ7fC-5xopsvZ9Jl1_okMLcHs1pGFxIqOHXClbwQorBiH_ZYdNWPtQ_avF_sJQUcnTiZc7LEHb5kMcKyPdXLw9-fl1rN5KAl5FunRRi533QvqHjSp91jEb5qc89dJqrPYJybvw%3D%3D)****** Friend, it wasn’t that long ago that Chance was a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department.When my husband and his partner were assigned to the Street Narcotics Unit, I was terrified. After all, they’re the ones who deal with violent drug cartels.But Chance was brave. He was willing to put his life in danger to keep our city safe. Little did we know the biggest threat Chance would face wasn’t a dangerous drug dealer......but a radical, Soros-funded prosecutor.You see, Chance was called in to help disperse violent protestors during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin in May 2020. The police department issued Chance a beanbag launcher because they are supposed to be effective without causing serious injury.So, when a rioter hurled rocks at police officers, Chance discharged two bean bags at him.Another protestor stepped in front of the rioter at the exact wrong moment and was struck in the hand. It was a freak accident – but because a cop fired the non-lethal weapon, it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor.That radical Soros-funded prosecutor charged my husband with FELONY ASSAULT.My husband did nothing wrong!But now he’s staring at life in prison. If Chance is convicted, I’ll never spend another wedding anniversary with my husband......Our young son and daughter will grow up without their dad.I admit, when Chance was charged, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair ... and back again. **I learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros.** That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to make an example out of my husband. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay.It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But over 13 years ago, my husband did.And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran.My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band.He’s served on mission trips – planted churches, planning Vacation Bible Schools, and sharing the Gospel.And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record.Chance put his life on the line to protect his community countless times, and life behind bars could be his “reward.”And on top of that, his trial was postponed for **_a fifth time_** and pushed back to start July 7, 2025.Chance has had this charge hanging over his head for the past FIVE years and the trial will finally be his opportunity for justice.But even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills.That’s why I’m so thankful for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund and patriots who back the blue.Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband.LELDF helps hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks.Friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can:**[**Will you help by sending a gift to LELDF to help defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6820c90422d49ed938cebda3ce6647a&_e=tFBQCYhFmAtGB1stWulGQ81IXOEjvTYc_9VtTbPfjA-XgOCJ_KEJHOwrvc5bDfP6VDSeefkWxI6Ghe44fhzcgxu91dzelSXuxeQvxBmuy4CTHdPe7rowGiyYkEey_i3OuHULKj1wXk9IbBy59S4eKBhK3aFvedo58YClpzu3MDxB-M-oUoauz6m9Iamb-yoGAPnPJqt2nxWMpEXJJ3qwAFPoD0zb5ThaaihlrI2V4kwjlEMhvDC4dnCzpevc0B1kLkE0busPw13bs3j9LeAn2jeB8csE9qLRRB4nR8xfJ8YivjEF3qGJnHCref8hYmdmI2ulSLK90IN8jjMPgPGjCDdw9YRzBZAUULPP9gKY0NFiGLpQ1ndM-GqdILMyvVNzehi-P23Gx2kYVQ-Yxqu7uQ%3D%3D)** Right now, Chance’s legal team is working day and night to prepare for his trial that starts on July 7, 2025. They know a good man’s life is at stake.But the legal bills are piling up.So with that in mind, please know that any contribution is tax-deductible.Please make your gift right away if possible. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance was called in to help during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin, Texas in 2020. There was a freak accident and Chance faces FELONY ASSAULT charges. Now he could spend the rest of his life behind bars. To make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court – and we’re quickly running out of time. Chance’s trial was postponed to July 7, 2025, so we need to use these next few critical months to raise enough funds for his best defense.Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father, Friend. **[**Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6820c90422d49ed938cebda3ce6647a&_e=tFBQCYhFmAtGB1stWulGQ81IXOEjvTYc_9VtTbPfjA-XgOCJ_KEJHOwrvc5bDfP6VDSeefkWxI6Ghe44fhzcgxu91dzelSXuxeQvxBmuy4CTHdPe7rowGiyYkEey_i3OuHULKj1wXk9IbBy59S4eKBhK3aFvedo58YClpzu3MDxB-M-oUoauz6m9Iamb-yoGAPnPJqt2nxWMpEXJJ3qwAFPoD0zb5ThaaihlrI2V4kxjWHSto2Szi1LxOnmZdBSsH6DOUmiy2rm8Yoi3JNXPR8hCQGyoEc_lPRGEyp591_j9BC9F1K8DjAUNAkkbId8CQkZi1uGpW6S8WluapqnXMZ_dkDB1PLhFdzm4nZsP5zZwROXvt0EzSsn7XNkKTjLP4iyvgzvm5MLx4lg1zuPyIQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Life behind bars could be his “reward.” | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job. | | Dear Friend,This is a photo of me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches , on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. I was so proud of my husband that day.Now looking at it makes me cry.Because the same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.** Friend, it wasn’t that long ago that Chance was a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department.When my husband and his partner were assigned to the Street Narcotics Unit, I was terrified. After all, they’re the ones who deal with violent drug cartels.But Chance was brave. He was willing to put his life in danger to keep our city safe. Little did we know the biggest threat Chance would face wasn’t a dangerous drug dealer......but a radical, Soros-funded prosecutor.You see, Chance was called in to help disperse violent protestors during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin in May 2020. The police department issued Chance a beanbag launcher because they are supposed to be effective without causing serious injury.So, when a rioter hurled rocks at police officers, Chance discharged two bean bags at him.Another protestor stepped in front of the rioter at the exact wrong moment and was struck in the hand. It was a freak accident – but because a cop fired the non-lethal weapon, it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor.That radical Soros-funded prosecutor charged my husband with FELONY ASSAULT.My husband did nothing wrong!But now he’s staring at life in prison. If Chance is convicted, I’ll never spend another wedding anniversary with my husband......Our young son and daughter will grow up without their dad.I admit, when Chance was charged, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair ... and back again. I learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to make an example out of my husband. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay.It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But over 13 years ago, my husband did.And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran.My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band.He’s served on mission trips – planted churches, planning Vacation Bible Schools, and sharing the Gospel.And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record.Chance put his life on the line to protect his community countless times, and life behind bars could be his “reward.”And on top of that, his trial was postponed for a fifth time and pushed back to start July 7, 2025.Chance has had this charge hanging over his head for the past FIVE years and the trial will finally be his opportunity for justice.But even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills.That’s why I’m so thankful for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund and patriots who back the blue.Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband.LELDF helps hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks.Friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: Right now, Chance’s legal team is working day and night to prepare for his trial that starts on July 7, 2025. They know a good man’s life is at stake.But the legal bills are piling up.So with that in mind, please know that any contribution is tax-deductible.Please make your gift right away if possible. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance was called in to help during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin, Texas in 2020. There was a freak accident and Chance faces FELONY ASSAULT charges. Now he could spend the rest of his life behind bars. To make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court – and we’re quickly running out of time. Chance’s trial was postponed to July 7, 2025, so we need to use these next few critical months to raise enough funds for his best defense.Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father, Friend. ** | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: AOC
subject: Billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Every single person you saw standing behind Trump at his inauguration is a part of this.
#
Elon Musk is a billionaire raiding the US federal government for personal profit, and for the profit of his friends.
**Every single person that you saw standing behind Donald Trump at his inauguration is part of this**.
They may not be publicly vocal about it, but they sent a very strong message with their presence.
So don't let any of them act like, “Oh, I didn't know.” **Yes, they knew**.
There's preliminary reporting that Apple might be rolling out Starlink — which is Elon Musk's firm — into iOS systems.
You have Jeff Bezos — who runs the Washington Post — who refused, blocked, and overrode their editorial board.
They are controlling media. They are controlling digital communications.
**And they're doing all of this to prop up Trump so that they can personally profit.**
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire donors. They're relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250206.I20O_2&refcode=em20250206-8087-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8087%2E2526796%2E8q6JPX)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250206.I20O_2&refcode=em20250206-8087-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8087%2E2526796%2E8q6JPX)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250206?refcode=em20250206-8087-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=8087_2526796_8q6JPX&akid=8087%2E2526796%2E8q6JPX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250206-8087-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=8087%2E2526796%2E8q6JPX)**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: They are following their playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020625_3&amount=25]
Courier: Trump's executive orders seem to be ripped right from the pages of Project 2025 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020625_3&amount=25]
Opponents of voting rights spent 2024 disavowing the Heritage Foundation's "Project 2025", Team. Now that they're in control they seem to be following that playbook line by line.
Organized by the Heritage Foundation, a right-wing, dark money, inside-the-beltway, anti-voting think tank , and advised by more than 100 conservative groups, Project 2025 put forth a 922-page list of policy recommendations, going agency by agency in the federal government.
So far the Trump administration has followed Project 2025 in five major ways:
➜ Filling the administration with the authors of Project 2025. From installing Russell Vought, the main author, as head of OMB to making the head of the FCC section head of the FCC to and more, the author's list is basically being appointed to powerful positions en masse.
➜ Mass firings in the civil service. Elon Musk's DOGE team started with a buyout scheme for federal employees and is now threatening layoffs. Project 2025 calls for replacing them with MAGA henchmen.
➜ Military immigration enforcement. They've promised to deploy U.S. troops on our domestic borders.
➜ Persecuting transgender Americans. The Trump administration has attacked gender identity across the board.
➜ Environmental rollbacks. From pulling out of the Paris Climate Accords (again) to opening Alaska's land to drilling to valuing fossil fuels over all other forms of energy production, they're dismantling environmental regulation piece by piece.
This is just the start. If they've already done all this, you can bet Project 2025's recommendations for voter suppression are coming soon . We must use this playbook of theirs against them and fight back however we can.
Please, step up and fuel our efforts to defend our fundamental right to vote and more with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020625_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020625_3&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020625_3&amount=25]

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Exciting News on the Horizon - Stay Tuned!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=b1c6d481f9&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well and that your 2025 is off to a great start.

I am honored to have recently been elected President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors.

As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, and ensuring equitable access to services for all.

While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help drive the success of my future endeavors.

** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=6924cc8629&e=c0babbc643)**

Thank you again for your partnership and for believing in my vision. I look forward to continuing to serve you and our community in the years ahead.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

P.S. Please expect a call from me soon so we can discuss your priorities for the new year and how I can best represent them.

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a3e977ce8d&e=c0babbc643) **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: 1 Alert for Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I’m introducing legislation to push back on Elon Musk’s illegal takeover of USAID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Elon Musk is attempting to illegally take over USAID, and I’m taking action.
I’m proud to be a member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee and to serve as the ranking member on the Subcommittee on Africa. And before I was in Congress, I worked on international conflict resolution – so I know exactly how critical USAID’s work is to communities around the world and our own safety here at home.
It’s also obvious that my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have no idea how foreign aid works.
Contrary to their bizarre and completely incorrect claims that USAID is a “front for terrorism,” USAID’s work creating economic opportunities and providing disaster relief and health care and emergency food assistance in countries around the world is one of the most effective thing that we could be doing to prevent violent extremism and terrorism from taking root.
So let’s be clear: Shuttering USAID will hurt people all over the world, and it will hurt our national security.
But not to be lost in the shuffle, shuttering USAID is illegal.
I’ll say it again: What Elon Musk is doing is illegal.
Only an act of Congress can eliminate USAID – because Congress passed a law guaranteeing USAID’s independence.
This week, I’ll be introducing legislation to push back on Elon Musk’s illegal takeover of USAID.
And when I do, I will need every single one of you on the phones to the Republicans who have claimed to care about these issues. We need to hold them accountable and put them on the record.
For right now, I just need to know you’re on board. Add your name now if you agree that we must stop this takeover. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9heDheEam0SDJ93fjA7ayg2]
USAID may be the first power grab, but we know it won’t be the last.
So we are not going to sit back and take this. We are not going to allow Elon Musk to sentence millions of kids to poverty or death – and we are NOT going to let an un-elected billionaire take over and destroy our country.
More to come soon,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaat2bf8p5ts8qg9t9vg14eo0hf8sg8lj5eppvg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zne51gtbdect3btpqtpobbcj1m3lvs3i5et57098_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeq8qht4i68gr4sfffepass69hb71lc6aem54e8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zadtgu4qht328q4saovrtbjeqilaehg92a6m5fq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi28qjs3b28pqree48c8mjqaa76ovvnja0ib7fho_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z26eo1li963jhhtfif6ui6c88d46kuk0jbg4bpi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqub6cra3dqdk8agiv45u0buf4c3hudqlan99cf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh53rbj153080m6vtquj866v2s00f7ofi0kljba8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvjnninounp2dcg4u6j4o69ie62elqbtvufnicng_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans
---

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuvsmgg3k78r96vcaep16q188i0dkpcdphtltr50_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8eu5i8qgrgkjn7o00ison4il5fg3205rre84l08_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgiq6pf26mop5d8mvlbtbqk92srcji8ainppmocg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Hi - it's Monica De La Cruz.

We're just days into President Trump's second term, and we're already seeing historic changes that promise a brighter future for America.

But there's one thing I keep coming back to...

It's always been about you.

You've been with me through thick and thin. From my first campaign in 2020 to our groundbreaking win in 2022, and our even bigger victory in 2024.

Your steadfast support has been the cornerstone of our success in the country's most crucial House races, not once but twice.

_**And for that, I am deeply thankful.**_

From day one, I vowed to put your interests above all else, steering clear of the influence of special interests and the corruption that plagues Washington.

**Today, I'm honoring that promise by seeking your guidance as we plan the first 100 days with unified Republican control in Washington.** Your feedback will guide my actions in Congress for years to come.
| [**COMPLETE MONICA 'S SURVEY NOW**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zd1iav8ni3ngb10e2ntei8oivdui7pkskmkiofa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36c3h2bs)
---

You've always been there for me, and I'm hoping to count on your invaluable input once more.

With all my gratitude,

Congresswoman Monica De La Cruz

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z353h2k1lpmssbs91oc9hf4uetv9na3f9obujf38_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o37cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3uj67r0f5vhmccv9akirgms7ap2k0d68g51608_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o37cdh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbg2418u92h8nbk7962t5942rajintuqa9l8usog_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o37cdh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbgqhe4btaae14i7pq4vfthv4qeh2rsum5ib4qhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztre7rjioc98t8v8ln9mvpjnshkubneth3dq2ebg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgm76mdmu9unvr67lsjh2uf5jr2cspeek3ufhoe8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztu2g47so9iv2bj9pm6fib1rg2dof09ouudk6kag_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zusr5udg0n3rmjf5qv58cgac303b82nhl2c6non0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh66o36cth2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqc2ipp8fvd05n9cup2i6t1u22bls9eeeuao5u18_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh6eo70c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zg0hmjph3cien61ppsr925eh1v3mc78vp5eapn7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh6eo70c3h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8fkj0n14ns9m94i974k8gkl4r71jjo3mevas820_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh6eo70c3h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3s8fjaac7bhqm77ds4orc1fp8k0vfeaahj163tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh6eo70c3h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvosifscm347gk5cjd2h1eic18im95gre0ovgtpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh6eo70c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: What an honor to welcome President Trump
body:

Friend, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Friend, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, friend, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1v59adqaei16f9jv8rs6o1jphvbiu0cjddo1hb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4c1h2bs)**_

| | Hello Reader, Are you in search of a state-of-the-art camera that offers discreet surveillance, high-quality footage, and WiFi Compatibility? Look no further! Gunner Gear is thrilled to present our latest addition: **The WiFi Spy Cam**. **Pocket-Sized Powerhouse** : Gone are the days when surveillance cameras were bulky and noticeable. Our WiFi Spy Cam is designed to fit snugly in your pocket. It's WiFi-enabled and crafted for discretion, ensuring that you have the power of surveillance right at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere. **Crystal-Clear, Day & Night**: With full HD imaging, an expansive 170° field of view, and night vision capabilities, you can trust the Spy Cam to capture every detail with unmatched precision. Whether it's daytime or nighttime, you'll never miss a moment. Stay connected to your home from anywhere with the WiFi-enabled Spy Cam. Designed for seamless remote monitoring, this compact device lets you keep an eye on what matters most in real time. Whether you’re at work, on vacation, or just in another room, its WiFi capabilities ensure you’re always in control. **Special Launch Offer!** : Because we appreciate you, we're giving our loyal customers an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to own the Spy Cam. [Order now and get a whopping 50% off!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20207/6374453/b478f958e8b78ee4677e6496487d6055c7f13efd/0cd7543326655efc3990c0d950a4fba5184878a2) This offer won't last long, so don’t miss out. The WiFi Spy Cam is more than just a camera; it's a testament to the future of surveillance. Whether you’re safeguarding your home, capturing life's moments, or looking after your valuables, we've got you covered. Upgrade your surveillance game with the WiFi Spy Cam, and embrace the future of security, today. [Order the WiFi Spy Cam Now & Save 50%](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20207/6374453/b478f958e8b78ee4677e6496487d6055c7f13efd/0cd7543326655efc3990c0d950a4fba5184878a2) **Best regards,

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: What an honor to welcome President Trump
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq0c0ff6o2g89cr8fm5gc1dimor1sv6985naasd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7q9vaslgbfcnf08662ol866vbnmjri600khiti0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zckq4l2pbdje7s0uj9vqnh98jsdk0e4jdr66ai68_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zao9i7guqeb808iroi4ia2p58eng42ip615e8ut8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6vv7nsnrtbgp9fme6n3l1nssm81kmkequb50vi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)
---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, Fellow American, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zal797ojkjtuhvs9f2lb695n9sc6qr9cje5i88no_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrk3e7kjlms66l94ttcql2djce5tcelb3bq3tsko_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjh69or4cdh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Thom Tillis
subject: We need to confirm Kash Patel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time.

**[But I made some promises, too.

From the moment President Trump announced Kash Patel as his nominee to restore integrity at the FBI, I vowed to lead the charge to get him confirmed--and now we've met our moment. ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GI6NSC5xZ4q9UtfKZ5eHGA~~/AAVLBhA~/SXUqLUceRNOyRBm-ja_GWvoOWKXw7y2BWrNS08thidq5PSArAkjWpdMCqe_s1EGYFPIEmwpCHQ1lSfAcZFnGC-XIL6HkK2o-wX7jY1TFxWqg9EHprAQc4Yt2i0h4QtlmCCn88aEr5ycfHbI4B6pH4l1e4BI40jh_QkXuuJ1UHPFO_HPnLPnOfKuYO6PP8Z9lCXDD90sKO0UImZUWaQYbp6F7x7-BhmH1KwQot6frXP4ktRm1xF1H294xokcWErNcRHqq0gU8YtYOSWC0h5t9sUqWNi9fnI1qwL0omNjG5Ktlq1W269YhpSBqAb3CDjrRxohs4R7uyXQUHDssjWL28B5vBSuNl394XHoirBDHdHbrZD4TAoqP9MOBYs6rRqIeIyGWd63vnqnRbOyfAEr6Nsm6QXYnSvlNnP5vgQWjz2g~)**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: I want to send you a “47” hat
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2s2ia8cqqij2rfhas896ik7qg1cssp9j9abd4eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)
---
Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4v2l9s15jal2aq5cf2i9r06qvted2m6unlr0f70_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt8loo666kvm92k99t6gucq6h1d4at89bjr5bdoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4vanopvlp8s36527gfhnsgugutiecbbv85t68jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo86to1bjlu3b6s67n86tmomaur1u423lmfu09b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)
---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, Fellow American, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs12uc15n8p0fb0qtiaegbsdufqdqs92sd4dfeb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhgq1gus7klbtc86clnmvnj2r8m90mn63upcr4ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6coj6clh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

body:
I just pulled off the HEIST OF THE CENTURY! But it’s not what you think.

| | | My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I just pulled off the heist of the century. But I didn’t rob a bank, steal the crown jewels, or anything like that. **_[No...I stole the playbook that George Soros and the radical left have used to DESTROY our schools and indoctrinate our children.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn7rke4f8jg9gsi7pmj39tc6rmdtmobk0ltgrtlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_****__****_[Now I’m using their playbook to TAKE OUR SCHOOLS BACK and I need YOUR HELP!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl3ssi1p11h6re4dhlmneivo36h258mq8gtt7pb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** **_[My team at the 1776 Project PAC has been SO successful that...](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb8pun5to8rossnbm7kr9uu43br02b5k6ppl2fmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** **_[... Tucker Carlson asked you to support us...](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1fn9r6bgl41ji6tcrnqjgvn4f65p4pppd2dsso8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** **_[... Former Congressman and Nominee for Attorney General, Matt Gaetz, asked you to support us...](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4qn5rqev0dbpqehrjtmq7ebcbt2mh1o1fjd8bb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** Elon Musk, the super GENIUS, VALIDATED our plan with just a few simple words: **_[“the value of money in local races is much higher than it is in national races!"](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zns1t35cagda30ahd8beg1jns22fs4l9hbi9tsu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** Will you let me explain our plan? You see, George Soros and the radical left have spent the last 40 years funneling dark money from their network of marxist billionaires into local races...their favorite target has been our nation’s school boards. **_[That’s because they KNOW that the future of America will be decided by the kids in our classrooms.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbhhtvs0lqrrh6f94uupnrrfv2afghh6usp68c0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** **_[**_So I took their strategy and flipped it on its head!_**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zalj55p90mo22ano9iggh7os03d33k1899p7acvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** My team at the 1776 Project PAC pools resources from grassroots Conservatives like you to provide FREE campaign support to Conservative School Board candidates ACROSS THE COUNTRY! **_[And we’ve already won more than 250 CRITICAL elections and freed more than 4.5 MILLION students from leftist leadership in their schools.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhulse7nmsu0ogvcd8ksisfg0o6ln8rpnc7vv8bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_** Now, we’re launching our LARGEST OPERATION EVER in 2025 and we desperately need your help! If we don’t take our schools back from the ground up, none of the victories we’ve won over the last year will matter and the radical left will strike back harder than ever. _**_[**_Will you rush in $17.76 or ANY amount today to help us take back our schools from the radical left?_**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0k8c9ofdg26hegh96eaiila1fr0njv31l9t9ojo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj6ao30cth2bs)_**_ Thank you for taking a moment to read. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder1776 Project PAC

name: Monica
subject: People like you are few and far between
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I trust your judgment more than anyone

| |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrh027ied9kbrs5pbvrma3hjs5ael1fodm9hliuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)
Hi - it's Monica De La Cruz.

We're just days into President Trump's second term, and we're already seeing historic changes that promise a brighter future for America.

But there's one thing I keep coming back to...

It's always been about you.

You've been with me through thick and thin. From my first campaign in 2020 to our groundbreaking win in 2022, and our even bigger victory in 2024.

Your steadfast support has been the cornerstone of our success in the country's most crucial House races, not once but twice.

_**And for that, I am deeply thankful.**_

From day one, I vowed to put your interests above all else, steering clear of the influence of special interests and the corruption that plagues Washington.

**Today, I'm honoring that promise by seeking your guidance as we plan the first 100 days with unified Republican control in Washington.** Your feedback will guide my actions in Congress for years to come.
| [**COMPLETE MONICA 'S SURVEY NOW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbr6t00tnj0k9ab3k0g19o86s5gv30r6rhqah8o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)
---

You've always been there for me, and I'm hoping to count on your invaluable input once more.

With all my gratitude,

Congresswoman Monica De La Cruz

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zan6legcjjm28m9c62vulc1rb7hta45eb50hdm1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ir3hp6n203hn8n72dmmu67tj3gomg337a3cun0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zktnag82u999r9qo7qbmmqvi0mch4dsfbsdn7nb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z73oilgsdb6b9oeu9qqockal7aupcf2ashstp9og_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztcf7ic1e6a99ovtgdev9d1aohlqvu25s1412clo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sjj66o74cph2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump Wants to Undermine the Separation of Church and State
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wcn9g-us2xvv-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Undermining the Separation of Church and State**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wcn9g-us2xvw-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump and MAGA are waging a war on one of the most fundamental principles of our democracy: the separation of church and state. Trump’s latest move? A task force aimed at “eradicating anti-Christian bias” within the federal government, targeting institutions like the Department of Justice, the FBI, and even the IRS. But don’t be fooled—this isn’t about protecting religious freedom. It’s about weaponizing the government to push one religion’s interests above all others. **_Here’s the reality:_** 1.) Trump’s task force will stop at nothing to enforce his religious agenda, vowing to prosecute violence against Christians and defund any federal programs that don’t align with his vision. 2.) He’s also launching a White House faith office, headed by Paula White, who served in his previous administration. This move will embed religious influence in federal policy, eroding our democracy from within. 3.) Under the guise of “religious liberty,” Trump and MAGA are actively undermining civil rights laws—justifying discrimination against those who don’t share their views. **_The irony?_** This country was founded by refugees fleeing religious persecution. America is made up of countless religions and beliefs, all deserving equal protection. Yet Trump’s agenda seeks to elevate one faith above all others, betraying the very principles that define our democracy. We’ve seen how far they’re willing to go—**like in Oklahoma,** where MAGA-backed lawmakers pushed to require the Ten Commandments to be taught in public schools. This is about more than policy; it’s about dismantling freedom itself. **_Trump and MAGA’s agenda isn’t about protecting freedom_** —it’s about subverting our democracy to advance a religious agenda that threatens the rights of millions of Americans. This is an unprecedented attack on the principle that our government should remain neutral on matters of faith. [**_What we have now is the power of the microphone and the people. Remember, Republicans in Congress hear from their constituents too—and the truth is, most Americans don’t support what they’re doing. We need your support to amplify this message beyond our circles and bring it to the masses. Together, we can make sure our voices are too loud to ignore._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wcn9g-us2xvx-kyd76rh3/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

---

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/ltXTYCSPP5oltCcUjusa52tETYxZSh1rSG2JI6AxIqsediO7RKZnbwPM4wRIniPGXw_eux-MU3giM3mPlGJ-XbavhhM6P1och6A6tvP5quJDuxDM2IvU3seoAon5GgnopiiUfQdG7Q0r3e00vjZJJH-PuehNUFS4pCh5krYnTh-hxFW-uIhSyyDaYtp3v_QDZ_EofcZtzlRcN1m83lV77vRvg2OgKM8-dQhpeupyZthETbtXJU47HhG9lmuriB6whCzAvdSSV_xWizJS-_qJBV7a_Yctfh89Ftx1k9RCChEZhDo1n8a8zJ31fzCz9jePNFZ9pa1lgYwx35lE4CALJYCcg3wtNHxlspXXKbA4WicUXi3c5XNo5TeHkv4PSe6GIR5Cm5Bpxqb7o7lRZViXa_R5A8JwFCkTFDpcgBTCFb8wi-ha0_ak_UGVfJhafWxjf7MF6twSoYF9_3d9QkmveM1F6I9jqdTmKVh1mTjFkHBbGuqzsJJ44-Ito-q0tGSTbGcea_JjBUPIGYNny4eyoIHwiWYB1w/VYW4dzM82zIy5zyWospshnhD570unaP5/5) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/tcfuw1Vly4VQiY5pHjcuee6kJDJxJdN_5kkbDD1gKdFa9mABsAokPmBntF-Z67Revzmuf1uVg74P9WQ0wK3VV5hPIlFxdHKXRZ4bNth2erWpfMUpG6IJnaHB1DGrrqhdoVdoyeyPwZAE5K65iW8kOS9Og830O6OhwdpmL-I-A2zs3XT7vkdn3Y4KEUtv4Qhyao7h-f8wCLzziE6dSDqb1X4lIex2oqbbslm5rVS50VpaKgOegAQUjQ8WysRvUVm4sw2HA4pveN9K8FbWP3Nio0Ua--XwVvuwWzMnepUPHxKN6X5y4IjhM9xWfV4pVv0_cN0MjXPMsAtYAYtcKF_1tBtGkEyexW9mBOp6FbNTXMqpONjqOxHJ0JaPuLnJu830qA6mIUegbHQSJdYjhV_PLCUv6wKi6H4bHjHJxoWHF0XW-U2-bSrLRNIRd_p0ohVV_ZD2mLnWqupuPQEsYaBYXxF-3kqtBuka7dsUf1QXywua4IjuwvolXIXuPoOX6RjhmJ-Ldmc-9PRKw663gzXDxTSdW8fMmQ/vnC1yUpuck1fis4o5HoxnF9eS4_Z8eh3/5) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/SKu1ZRUhNa0Ks0ZirH7DS0dLs6c3GlJLWyAPFs__J9VkKyoDdFFi-MY--yppYdaY1wvzxhfUk5z9WmwWeuafa5snmvKa1gdD6QpC4u7rq1dgc3I4njT0t1Ai5DUiMZvKVklq_jFAINR-1bUsxRf8ngSUaSzbjeIuRQg92ljHEGWimjCbkYsuGHDywRhryHeb0KvMC7z1S8Wt6Zes0yZYfZTnB3eAGMiX6ju9XW9RPXDDlgfrTDD_vorEMDLCk38BtPwsevaXjc20WsnjS804tbujgoU4XlojwS_wjTcBvPJtrWteo6Fvd-bv0EsOO9J5z48t_awTpvt8KEgxj8wY0_Xn3k4YTofpv6mgDV1imNBnnG41gMYBSrjWTiNOGsF4gcZ60G91PFE4YCewUc46G9jtzcqcrAdGcAqUbQZUXUHGNn37nOhX4yawlr7Ruaz9TaPeYityLOZ76D4fBEhQHLTwvKLy7kwZRaLA4_kAdaxkv5asrJeFY7LYqxF6r1CKFYx_GUUvxAcvReoD7N_ILE8p9_jSiQ/aIVCMNL_pvnphMwOS99YABeQ6LFYhL9Y/5) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/MIP03NHq7n7ELEGXa3yBESGtLkZyv_qNH2vewDyRiMmqFrWqE6k0tJyfmYDxVRxhBVxauQ3Tb4ziI2uUS6NChMSJeHsL9Bhmq4E1JH6uBS_ZBKzea5Kd-WWd3do_JsTo89Nq9jLa6gil1q0gJP5hAGf0kn5r5yNUQlB42hkQjJNuWgCvFCrUv6TOoj4hh5S84sbUzos4YjX0MHRBCpU8itly3LREMc-p7HGKbwa8EeEr2EECejRBDqXp2n91B9vnPm-BT7kqHPupUlQ68bYZWgN5F2tCrBkhFsGiYj1Yv6Q-PerI1WUZR9DujKkyLBS0DSS98WnUAh48BGl2wHb5HUh3g2qWBAegAxaAPQM6EUsALcHX53q_L_EbIrwROxuzX-MVuokqFBzoVd5MZxyf9KUr6G7Tz3jtJUeip5R-lmqHlDcFz6mOu3Db7KekiMQj8ylI3hx817HwanvlW0_i688nuVTh1fN_1gx6q3tNWnq7COujuXqNksEZ4oQ5vLNnHgi9AKy-phD7qGMO8s0B6OqKT2Bflw/R86l6aBS6Jab5S9KBWCCSIyd8RAjRH9a/5) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! | | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/2aE4JLYbwQOvLHhgWQP6vC5fKJ2TedCGVJgaHMg3a4QXObh57y1oc5ZTa2TVI1b24NcdVPWrD17V98jG8dX3DWjnugWF97rtsKnorwCfjIJ0DoLZMUotK8CcilVpG3TjDBJPBeV5ir_FFdCHM0XRCGlQtFU-5Nin5iT3dX2ESTyCvWkWbTSZsrg1J4FaZtONzTW5gXE58r_nC4tZ7WlIl4TmgMWgINsBcSHFdSVN5qN9vFhXI2BmvaUO9zF9V3gbczYXETq30nYiI54DNczFv8bSZaQUFUNE_r1PdQ7T550E1LKIB5uJjo4QniScUd0b_4u3pA5WzzEzNc9dDPBxMwUxEVNKl3JtxqwGT2N59VP4bPcsCqxNp-81HVEjDs5r82rL_0YsUrxyvVgKThlVmTOWjnFTtrJnymq0Mc-VBmIkGYfOtcSejQc-u3--ENBxBhgiFD0GyzMKGDUbYAd7but8rIA8bMBk_kpbFmHRfmH-dfgqiuRJy6sCPw/J-XFxN7QQgdmdn8u_H3ZS9vy1hj-O9rz/5)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Support Ancient Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/IykWBz_8DIbv0g1oEf74P22l7NQK2Ajq0dSBiA-LmsKQ2bwb-NUx7ynqFREVl8CowD_pXge4DkWJvA6v4oHLoZpn9W3taQgj51R0N3RwfzmKWsQIK9aFn6kLzoohB5aDNL12yn2DOEjwvm-p-sjrdO7c9xiOggFxMlhjm-hJikoM8S9MsrwJCUYlD-iivttKWJFGzwm564sxAqJa3q3ezkowh3zvuZNivspNI6KBnCDjadjvmlho9fXs8PFwaKoXyjBDtserTMG474iqx0LSEN05LYT2WnxSIe6KU8eIN8TbF-ue5HY2zA1UWHh74_jroDgKEJI2ZDDdkACrOXdN1RPQ9VXqsMGOb8wGZjbviLdeffC-dHMlN4MiS2BitRTIh6jDHOWfMl7O8u0n1saReiQya49irxKl8U_j3zHZ589M3of9jHG7YPgLxSQjHVLz_w5i2MjLqt--YQYSlNdAxaXTxTMjyS_FCt8AegnCiNkvCQWdCTPN8QioLw/32tHN-N0yvyFzsc_eS6vfnudXWYmhQ-2/5)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/cgu_NrcGS1PGTL85Ve17-IRuK8nijYHP-wr4AAsszDk28bEZQDHTa_cH5wjmrZVuQpQOEm6kICwgsumqUN3tC31Wf8FJG1pY455tP76eVxznNntmguSW7ZrKbDs26gLSb1i1vVx81UrlfwA4CfbdOLmK5dVLgVBR-AaEBykXMLZnz4o03ggxYqVUVAZRUhlUJFjnrNInZi8j2S0zbuYaMc_JrAqwWu4joWAbo5UxtRSb9sq4H1qA3no-9fIkT_mjL4MBb6fBPngMZiznr4bx39Fu-4Wj_9ok87EaR1MKzneuGxZoERbIH2E_JdjlCSu5JPZMayFokTiAOAx27e3FJbM_84s5b341x5_SkW8rWvZ96biNGzDPGcD766ZH26ciWdSUA9BDph6Ggc0-xO1xuN6bXaupMbVo-Y499_o2yA6ZmIVvQ8Wx2hw3rKqF2_BMCT8ySPiugAycUYp_CIauW5fVI4lVeDkjPrLBC4p0GCENYxS8grP-4RGMlQ/BhQHgQ2N5PY0A1YwJkOt45Ooh12ytNUd/5)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/fcvibInMuUL-PfCrWMFCeeVkIejfOx8T4XsO12Zl_2tWjU_qcjViKYAab39AZ9FGsYJpZyccFbPlKwkBxLmlnvjLaI1_FRBJJpdXEuhxQBB1fptrD8favb6c6xblEzu4W0bPFEeVtf8osv1fB5Z8c7Newd48cvyAhKuveAmEjOJ3BXfZF20AOkfveBXoEEGUOb-OCVo5_KZMU2yoKPEDLZb22LHLI5hQ0F2LLM6FT31R0lMuaDLxkYicegOMTq__MCmLv_tUiaEOXJjLypXULsKGEjkXiZOjxd8-V5AkwoIV2qnHgbYCUZ2yQWGDmW3EyWNvsyPZXC07fZ1sUFRPd9lHDpUSK_i5INZK_bF7D_DiY6huv4VcL_gHAHvUOB-pj5jBa1Z6bhbwj2uhlCyqhdZAtdEhpDQCAPGHbiOtUv_ApoGf8xlxgcmEMVfRP-FJYgixUL-KqY68AWs1KibUJ4vv2rjbCdYqtpjhQTpkP-qNGBywrsZ-rexQHw/tj_QmL11QPclkACTSFY3GI0j0GeLg76T/5)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/7b1wMkSBULbLOo9f1JWVgaO6OUl14y_tMNyIIkP7suLucR1KMQ4KTI-ZHuCnE4X8psg06MwV804H6vnX2mU4GIxCugAdoJN3DbPlmxi5qvQdZq6pP4KM2FZBCNb7UPjzx1myZGcV-LHLyTulqnStyu6p0saZRaN8T5nqdF0e2c17Qw2H7av5FxHzImQlgQ-nOnK2Ns4EZ7s3BlI4nqrMSR3u-GsSpTlK6SqKBDnHbeY9gOXgJV2m9WtiD8IEE2rNPhQHGcaLtL06XaWEKDVlAvj9RqAY3gzQECOruFJemcW4eqf9Ka9QmJW559JPASxHCkIea5j-hwbStGPizS2WvIhNwDk9UM9lv4i07IC5Lyp0tP7KmWtcwcMFOPp6-oum9dLi1M7VeVipx2n1iY5WB-1EXthFtnWpIg1K4gyEXlehZ8liqkELQfs0N6FBhvkPGgAIvl3E6-E0J4BXbEo3bZ1pPjqlhc3wtEK2zSMoWM3kW86YQ-4lTa5wiQ/cltlB1ieS4dldo-xR43hRa6aD9h6-lXS/5)**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/WxmhXeJoZHEf9G3YWFMKv7B3y-B6A1td2xKyozaLDlDJ3jxDAWE5qBKL7c0tyP0tvNtKaE8xINQ-H8jq3QvDS5573ExIw-GUnUreAV_8fCi8mLhvdWb0ekI2qQGlQM-8j2KRcdHaBpwlW1Cr_KvROa-vLwyRAjnh0Pe2CdGbIWhmpYc9DA0X0Y4ZF-4IYJ-mtXeoHOAlE2YlFcg_x52NuZw7gl5-ZKNmOxreMbr6-BA95lCWr4Iin8jbpLr4BXrcS63yGefc6W6mrSbK9PKKXW-Zx0Wwak43Fj76IyPBjuyHNetcW6RYuSYThRNen9ya8VGhYD5lj-7D9refIr2MhHZqfa9fzWVZqWcGp6NSdL9Qhn7obUPvB_vpAXjV1OBf7Ct_LfXP_zRYR5NgPuJZ_DavGIp01lNdidtO0Ih3KDkZuaYqBmFHI-spPcEUC1-RhG1LP77o4zLxjVs2HCLJjS9YRy6T9RqPahFGtFqIPFzlHk8tVx0-1iBo3g/JTTIwVM8C45x242GVacU-ZYsIJYHKyl0/5)

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/2n8Q7QVZxOUnKY7df_mLPxtPq-mAkApxWBHpT2Pk9ePnYhtCUkbJ1irDK6XoeuZNpOX5V-9Pj6mx5TnXFGdw3z8s4VfIm7zJ0W4H2V0Indphoiuet0d78qudNlNFtV_ExgOZ8VjPcra4GQKDj6UY0k8JwYC3RNhLBfaMbPsYZQ_1ilhHHnFPOn0WaBxfDiMzcUNgyyt01XqnWiH98OwRHid6SZZN8hFQWBMLJBI5XJotHEA8euPL_hqAmw3r52NdEoEcXaT3TmoCWTXHl5cymuNKbKTKKPOSQKRA4sOJqXcapRF1rcbcmdPZGgyPbtj78azcbYUmhiA0HUCTlvs7-rnzNDsSQHLJqOoCyGY2JMDbEB8ALE1RuCgQ2HuT3syKgQw8TpdJyNppDPGI7jhGzjxfUkw7EWyzUL-OGRYPMTwhk-Wgcxok2UPtyqXQTDEcVCNuK_upKjw81V_pJKDUgPvagUY1Ck9esswTRdgiIXb29w9UbGRp1LDVuQ/etJ8B76BqvsD--4wMYbQOODbi30D1IiP/5)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
