name: The Flyover
subject: Massive American Flag, Anti-Christian Bias Task Force, and Egg Boiling
body:
Camping World CEO and _The Profit_ host Marcus Lemonis has refused to [remove oversized American flags](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u7CAUhJ8Gd8fCx_ivoLiNu71tSovAwSbCYAEx2rePNkmbdkYz-vS9PbaHct6F_b86SRYbN-Q4AEfg02aU889NNEZaIqS-IdlN_bzgPKNoDjkti-pE3w2jRmt6HPi4IBfvFkc1mEk3Tr7eOPKp68TEu3Yete0Un_tRCEQameBkXImp_YgulIOsf8abUqvj2Xh5lHJl1v9juDJca61tVYVeJcM1UM0M10y3owQ6fobyhN9Qq_NyYYcakzegKUKifMVgMpQIP5PbeU8ZypFIFYgWPO3Kg9LFxQAvCrBe7QzXJklzVee9y-PEBN9P5fw3YvlL2S3xKwAA__8iFHAG) at several RV dealership locations nationwide despite zoning violations and fines.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1vwyAQxvFPA1ui44x5GRi6eEvXjhaGI74Wm8hBqfLtq7Rz5-fRT_p_XOZL5Mr79T1uFHppMwKOJ8AT2DlHrs9ZyxwKEdIgKSg7OI_OoZZrGJeUvDGL1rl4PyYfLXiDZaEcixuU5PDSAMEqpS2oszOpqAhuMFojkhEaKHNvx_mz8d5XKvXZHnScU9tkDWvvNzG8CZwETvng_atue3-NAqfp73rvsZM8Qr59c618N1ZouG6R6y_S_4t6BPwJAAD__w5qToQ) | |
# Friday, February 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1984, Navy Captain Bruce McCandless became the first person to perform an [untethered spacewalk](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uszAUxvGrsTfQ8fFnBg_vwpZ37YgMPgQ3jh2BG8TdV03n7j89j_4f1_EaUk7l9j88yLeljgioO8AO7BhDyueoePQLEZLk5IWV7oLOoeKr1wbBiWCEEEbryWmYQMB0iVJrK2Hmyf-sAYIVQlkQvTPzIgI4aZRCJMMUUEytbv1nTaWttOSzvmjr5_rg2a-tPXcm_zEcGA7HcfR3KoXiuT_DTDOV9ksZDlOuN4bDkra9dV-lUVtpo9i95RHynW8-Po-Uc9qNZQpuj5Dy-6f91f3y-B0AAP__1BtaNQ). He exited the space shuttle Challenger and maneuvered freely while using a bulky white jetpack of his own design. Today's poll asks: _Have you ever written a letter to the editor?_ If you were to write a letter to _The Flyover_ editor, what would you say? Click the reply button to share your thoughts with us. We would love to hear from you! Today's sponsor is our friends at [LMNT](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1vwyAQxvFPA1ui44x5GRi6eEvXjhaGI74Wm8hBqfLtq7Rz5-fRT_p_XOZL5Mr79T1uFHppMwKOJ8AT2DlHrs9ZyxwKEdIgKSg7OI_OoZZrGJeUvDGL1rl4PyYfLXiDZaEcixuU5PDSAMEqpS2oszOpqAhuMFojkhEaKHNvx_mz8d5XKvXZHnScU9tkDWvvNzG8CZwETvng_atue3-NAqfp73rvsZM8Qr59c618N1ZouG6R6y_S_4t6BPwJAAD__w5qToQ), the best way to stay hydrated this spring.
|
---
## DOJ Sues Chicago, Illinois Over Sanctuary Laws
The Justice Department [sued Illinois and Chicago on Thursday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX-N2YzsMzFk8JCqYktVqUNH5MIZrsI2sp2Q_PuKdu5yNzy9T0_f53W4WlopzG_WoykuDiDgxAVw0Q6TpfU5NNVkHCKgqtDIVnVn6DpoqsUAoHInOwJqZXWrNY66Q3E6Cyudll8VmYMmQLRSNq2QdadHJ63olG4aANSsEThRian-jhTKgm59xjumeoy-Ws1SypaZujDoGfT7vtc-hyNj0GPgt8ygD7gf7_Z3eL5h5rSuFCJlPi402jlyFxMnv-FEYebkPc3JFoqBo3MxlaNrE79c5PNxf7wz1ceRJqZeXw4zuOcPTFuVzLTtBzrrljVi9pbW36HlP3F3Az8BAAD__6_hcTo) over its "sanctuary city" laws, seeking to block policies that limit local cooperation with federal immigration enforcement. The lawsuit names [Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker and Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdEb2wcFQuLgNXW67JTrxD5zIYISdePP2q6TYbtuZT6PR93Wdr0iR9uU_bt6UkGYQcOECuNCzQ4qvWTXOBO_Bd403UnfDCMMAqllNgKEP483eHOoRQMjQuYuQ2qrRgYJbQ-a9JkBoKZUWsh16GySKoeuVAvA9U8I7Kuls74n2svoQX-npz9amrYlmLeXIrPvHYGIw1VrbkL53X_O7ZzAdKVIhmxlM5XxsB3fpzgNFn3nEmh9UOC5Iey6cYqQ9UeZ2JYtL-gUy7rY88Hx9kuY07qhvOPeaKbFsSPHzpvxl52ngJwAA__8FP2od) and challenges state and local laws that restrict authorities from holding suspects on immigration detainers or sharing detainee information with ICE. Border Czar Tom Homan, who announced that about [11,000 people have been detained](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUxvGngW4MHBGwoLiN3dx2S4NwGM8GZaJkiG-_cfvtvuRLfsn_6zk_PWXaX__9hq6mMoOA4SHgIcwcPeVrVjy6hAjYc3TS9HYEa0Hx1QUYbUo4RCtRo9ZgglrAjyrKAF4DJ3drAoSRUhkhO6tDkl7YXisFgJopgZFqObrvQntdMeWrfPDoQtl4dmut75P1_xhMDKbWWrcs4f4YTDu2k8Hkj0oh4z2DPQY77BEvVfjh4rtRznRqw5R4bZ7yr1r_qvw4-AkAAP__DB5S6g) in the U.S. interior since Jan. 20, criticized sanctuary cities as "sanctuaries for criminals." Newly appointed Attorney General Pam Bondi [threatened to cut federal funding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdEb2wcFQuLgNXW67JTrxD5zIYISdePP2q6TYbtuZT6PR93Wdr0iR9uU_bt6UkGYQcOECuNCzQ4qvWTXOBO_Bd403UnfDCMMAqllNgKEP483eHOoRQMjQuYuQ2qrRgYJbQ-a9JkBoKZUWsh16GySKoeuVAvA9U8I7Kuls74n2svoQX-npz9amrYlmLeXIrPvHYGIw1VrbkL53X_O7ZzAdKVIhmxlM5XxsB3fpzgNFn3nEmh9UOC5Iey6cYqQ9UeZ2JYtL-gUy7rY88Hx9kuY07qhvOPeaKbFsSPHzpvxl52ngJwAA__8FP2od) to jurisdictions that impede immigration enforcement.
## Back-to-Back Winter Storms Slam Parts of U.S.
Severe winter [weather will continue](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD9vwyAQxT8N3ojwmRoyMHTxlq4drSuc46uwieAUK9--SjJ3_b0_enrfl_mCnHm_fuFGQZYyg4EPbUAbNyfk_Jhtl8JCBDR0FHo3-DN4D7ZbQ7RmdOAGijQabxNgPC-9x-EHTUKMHYdnmwHj-t4605_8GJcejR9GawFoVNZQYin19Ft4l5WW_Ch3qqdYti6HVeTW1PCpYFIwHYSyvjUFU5NSt_bEvAtVBdOdExUF08bpoCZ6L1VWwib6bdGviOZIT5B028uhr1h3EulqSLeDc-Y2OmXNdUPOrxXy3yv3AH8BAAD__7zzZsM) in the Midwest and Northeast today as Winter Storm Garnett follows Winter Storm Freya, bringing up to six inches of snow to cities like Minneapolis, New York, and Boston. A brief [tornado and flash flooding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn8NbI7OZ4PN4KFLtnTtiBx8F64yEBk3KP--onvHT5_09PS-buMtSpb18RkXCpW3EQE7BajAjSlKfo-2TYGJkExLQTvjB_QebTuHgaNNnWPXUT-4u-Ye7l2yE3DS2kTTSjhpgOC0tg70xfcT6wje9NYiUt9YoCR1K5fvTdY6E-f39qJymbalzWGu9bk35qPBa4PX-Fzp2M_rHKXKlKnB6yFrpaL2upVFHRTrTEXV-WdNVJRMpBIPvkupcz76Qd-BkJMx1qN2wKi5LSE9D8lZ9t41Fh5LlPxnUP8r8gr4GwAA___w-GFR) were reported in parts of West Virginia and Kentucky Thursday, with a wintry mix coating trees and roads in ice. Residents in Indiana, southern Michigan, Ohio, and Pennsylvania noted freezing rain along with flashes of lightning and thunder. Winter Storm Garnett is expected to bring [snow and ice](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX-N2RyZw9hm8NCFLV07Ihcf4SqDkX0Kyr-vkkjdOt59T0_vva_rdA2UaL99hg09L3kCBb1UIJWdYqD0mHQT_YII2DXoW9u5AZwD3axezYNBbb-dhdAP8xKx12Ywc-x7HdzSNeSfbgqUbVttVXtxZl7aoFxntAZAI7TCSJzL5SfTzisu6ZHvWC5z3prkV-ajiu5DwChgPDHw-mYCxsq5bPX5pp2xCBh3PJ_3XwEj30i-pPIIJUSURwq0V7lRPLGy3HPhFUPlpvh4nJQSVWOFVrctUHrl4P92uXv4DQAA__9bKmUW) to areas east of the Rockies today before moving into the Northern Plains and upper Midwest. This weekend, the storm will continue to affect the Northeast and New England, bringing additional snow, sleet, and freezing rain.
## Massive American Flag Sparks Battles
Camping World CEO and _The Profit_ host Marcus Lemonis has refused to [remove oversized American flags](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u7CAUhJ8Gd8fCx_ivoLiNu71tSovAwSbCYAEx2rePNkmbdkYz-vS9PbaHct6F_b86SRYbN-Q4AEfg02aU889NNEZaIqS-IdlN_bzgPKNoDjkti-pE3w2jRmt6HPi4IBfvFkc1mEk3Tr7eOPKp68TEu3Yete0Un_tRCEQameBkXImp_YgulIOsf8abUqvj2Xh5lHJl1v9juDJca61tVYVeJcM1UM0M10y3owQ6fobyhN9Qq_NyYYcakzegKUKifMVgMpQIP5PbeU8ZypFIFYgWPO3Kg9LFxQAvCrBe7QzXJklzVee9y-PEBN9P5fw3YvlL2S3xKwAA__8iFHAG) at several RV dealership locations nationwide despite zoning violations and fines. Disputes have arisen in Greenville, NC; Statesville, NC; Sevierville, TN; and San Joaquin County, CA, where the company has flown massive American flags on 130-foot poles, exceeding local height and size limits. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L0O3CAQBOCnwd2e8JrzT0GRxt2lTWmtYfGRYLCA88lvHzl9upFG-jSaX6_lRT74uP2knXV1aUGJT5AIclgs-XAtqrHaMSN3Det26MYJxxFV89Y80DpNY8_kjOodr09LaLunWdFNTxwbr29NohzaVg2yfYy9cS3JseuVQuReKMnW15Qfv5OP9c0uXOnk_DBpb4J-13oU0f0QOAuc43WkUu9K4HzDAmfZ3rkXOH8KRP4WgXM-wTIFzpDJ_CnwOcD5yAVuGTZPsQLtnL2hCC7QBuunguEEFC3UE0qlDIWuAr4WiKmCSbuPG9j0jQLnJmt7fH0IvvSDUHLbyYd_k-v_Ljw1_g0AAP__3X9zvw). In each case, officials have issued citations, but [Lemonis insists the flags will remain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvozAQBOBfA90iszjgFC6uocu1V6I9ew17MnYETnz590-8_tUjfTOaP4_lQRIlrb9pZ1tCXlDhDRSCmhZPEj-Lbr0NzMhDy7afBnNHY1C3mx38OP3VfSB3M-huho0ZjGZ_95O6-wFbsZemUE19ryfVd2Z0oSdlhlFrRB4brdhLyUf3L0sqG4f4yW8-Opf3NtqtlOfZDL8anBuca61dyP8T1_PKG5xfZ4Ozo_0paYWaj-jBcQbPQfgESrlsfICT8jmhbAdTgcgrRSBXJCe4qmB7rQy08yGOEoRIK6RcwOX9Un2uqT2sf1aJUc5xarRad5L4PbH8dNnb4lcAAAD__8SMcO0), arguing they honor veterans and symbolize patriotism. Some cities, like Statesville and San Joaquin County, eventually amended rules to allow the flags, while others, like Greenville and Sevierville, continue to push for compliance.

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~)

What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b2yRnbNSqDo1SP32MvCIFg~~/AARclBA~/IOMpZXpJohh0lBlyI5Gp0tioi7NKmxJdtGSmAtakrL0nrS-Ls66ikiad-av023YjKE13U2eYpo2arQV_ZogoZAEFenZEQgLqdaUeSb8jF5ZC-t-Ym3TpPXvZvErGPDr92lbsOjPV245ipMl4eD09WAA0GCPT8cIxdXUCNUUWSmLeR9PbPObSbOCBim2jM2Ar9W6icxoncPnsDdBwxEZ4bzcqAtk5kMu2ifzD4H2NVN1ObZiWkvgynzR_FmJtmGqXbK6kbC0SxZCdfRSDrAa08oXCEx7yVqXrsQyJzk8B0YSkUoP97UEYGT-SZwmePkRU22cwwTMh1FAfBT4K3hXR8rNIBWuF3hKirHY2QeAec1HGxMXj2a9DBEB8eMPGtZLvyOkx7rtZGqLFGkheL6c0CQ~~)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call to Action: Defund and Close USAID
body:
Tell your elected officials that enough is enough, and it’s time to shutter USAID.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** You've likely seen the steady stream of news about corruption inside USAID, as the DOGE team continues to reveal how your tax dollars are being spent here at home and around the world. Your money has gone to extremely questionable programs, including:
* Transgender surgeries for children in Guatemala
* A transgender-themed comic book in Peru
* Promotion of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion in Serbia's workplace
* Sponsorship of a DEI-themed musical in Ireland
* Funding for Politico
* Funding for the BBC
Simply put, USAID has not been accountable to Congress, as the Constitution requires. Therefore, it's time to speak up and let Congress know that Americans want to defund and close USAID permanently. __ **__** **** ************
---
| |
---
| **** We've put together two action pages where you can easily and quickly reach your members of Congress, as well as targeted lists of members, such as the committee and subcommittee that handle appropriations for USAID. This way, you can spend two minutes of your time to let them know that it's time to close the doors at USAID forever.
**ACTION:** First, go to our **[Defund and Close USAID action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc0e "https://www.patriotproject.com/petition/defund-usaid")** to contact the relevant US House subcommittee members, the relevant Senate committee members, the congressmen who voted to cut funding for USAID previously, and the congressmen who voted to keep fully funding USAID. __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc10)
---
| **** **ACTION:** Second, visit our **[Align Act campaign](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc12 "https://alignact.com/go/defund-and-close-usaid")** where you can contact your own congressman and senators to tell them that it's time to defund and shut down USAID. Filling out these two forms will only require a couple of minutes.
Additionally, the most effective way to contact them is by phone. If you can spare another couple of minutes after filling out the forms (which will send your emails), please also use the options to call as well. __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc14)
---
| **** Don't let this opportunity pass us by to actually downsize government and make it more accountable to we the people. Take action now!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc16)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc18)
---

To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:**[Tea Party Patriots Action](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a994913f/1edb9794a992bc1a)** 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314Woodstock, GA 30189
Want to change how you receive these emails?You can **[unsubscribe](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794a994913f&sd=1edb9794a993bf55&n=11699e4bf7efdf2 "https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/ua/optout?od=3z78b821f279e8235b374a03e8688062636c48fef6889d6f0093de3b9f21e3f920&rd=1edb9794a994913f&sd=1edb9794a993bf55&n=11699e4bf7efdf2")** or **[update your preferences](http://$\[li:updateprofile\]$/)**.****

name: Thom Tillis
subject: We need to confirm Kash Patel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What do you think?

Friend,

We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time.

**[But I made some promises, too.

From the moment President Trump announced Kash Patel as his nominee to restore integrity at the FBI, I vowed to lead the charge to get him confirmed--and now we've met our moment. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/v2NelaKeb3BGLDrljGUNiGyCN3b9mrPXcUOXDYbwDV9VhV7XexbeR7X1oemS6E7x5Ol8y5vmAq2T6YTJtxBQK61X03XkiMXjcIAFCWaQhvQRJoEOq84jkYRAT9z7IbbbnBIJMnoQh45Ocg8V_snTiumCqAXAQJHS3IBXpKRWGa-9_XkN4aikajthT-xGVaTKHQY7ilK5F4AowKYyZ72ChT-zC_vg1FRe5G_DmIeHejhiZaFIh31hEUc2ElpGbPKaAL5Zk0Nog4wwGAHAvXvMB2Nx7iVEAKg7IsYs7w02jE5ZNSIVoLTKax9EAwMV_omLj9SFUgaPKqzOBsZob_66OCtuPmU7lEgSezIuuLuSkPZ3TSs_T8u0cXWgz8CBSklo5YUII_b5nGq3hHRe3KI-32IXfif813JxWr1qI9LfzufYNeaLRiw8WpkXmajted0gsAKsZ24RmyEz2oT5pfsMGji8vBixCUYymPhNhH51two0HteCIHXuaplKEVPsU0d3Y3_x2rslDSCR7hYCxq3NmjzcorhNJjc8x5932Xf9pl3_63Zfuf99UxOKF9u0kInc9f8LyoIqSQ/GmQLk2Pdp5p4s7Lq6UJ3arzzQrVGyUiX/5)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/upFkdOCT_WHS2luAZ81HvB4uzqNsugBOwpjkwFX1tYGNxYxZzHk-pfGhjmiw1qnMcXOddS1t1SXlucmEr6kySTkbiVJJX4IQHINtkJdyuqE8wvPr6EjNHjORJ9sX6UIpj9thYAZTf1cSYzxLcPlqtY4VQJJavdXnK2vDZ9YWPW4ATSbFt820wcbVY-ACslz9UieqBfXS5FErtp1caXctDLBjFl3YHkj-V7Jsm6dCv_XYNzoZA9yhlGhQt-l9WOYdyKq0NM2zVNsXjmZb4NBscLeJz68by-2bW6B_ZdGaw8NMTw3Si1U73QJU8wecbVwoffVYvTm6IaWwopeOCAg-TVjg8z1fRp_rkGUSSkvdtp-_V_d4hjjfythliorAy0wWESHOJEyd68HM3PnPiTxftIEIVB-9NUkVhCpu60ki1tW7eUNq-oZniEuFW5M9Bt0XTieN1SbWDh5djy4csVp85S3p7xUYWnKWnk_mZbB-5FfpGovJasbMyXZAvg/7fyJ2NBMDWLMnhdKow1krWy7Gp_jOmgY/5)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/UCLx-kiy7nBwNjzy9503XkJNI-vzMrJBn6HDN66STqLImwrP5luFnO3UO1LHhwdVnut3OSwlt_yzmHRqz3EkeRSkrJTZyoYTbTJe2bi1k9OIgJdaLE7OUaVtdRG28Wk5t-eNKPv7f3YgWBvqKCZvAGa8wo-c3E64p3MfyzX0rtNMP0pheFWJ0i2kd1s3LuuhsyN5rhJMmKuivcKBqlyS8RTM_-XNMRdq2Szs-BaSa0MdFrx240RDST2RGqDzqNZh_4ILmRALAckrAm1yJ-1kulzn--w1IzYI70EpJhuouiBZ9FsU-K3ruuqzuzDtLrqpj5o_EiWggx9HEKVYw8wPw0bXhCOW1_WrWbWKzghXh0DwOQAsLZOCmCJ_yb0H3bnt6UpV0U7ceeN7d_6J_8GTkNOlpfOa7wx4yV2BAXGTAc6J1CFIvwO_Q0M7dIB2325rokngM2e4pzzm2zfnWywgm6TUlbRcIw_dsK_HJxws8GzmA2GgnIMMrYG8fA/MvO_iTUzXjhDt8TazxcFun2t7uNOwxA0/5)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.

clean_body: These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: ) Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. name: History Facts
subject: Why do we "boycott" something?
body:
Although people have sought to effect change through economic and social pressure since at least the 1700s, the concept became more widely known in the latter years of the following century, earning its moniker by way of one of the individuals targeted. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dnhd2lvejd1bo9a14hndcr9fw9q241h5a4uzjv1nzvpmn9hspxwrox1z9gqxoylukhaxpilei3ws24a0yx49x4xmanh2kyhfbyygsmrt962h7py3teec0t7hdofvgdppcmxjaordbjd0nju&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The word "boycott" comes from a person's name.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A lthough people have sought to effect change through economic and social pressure since at least the 1700s, the concept became more widely known in the latter years of the following century, earning its moniker by way of one of the individuals targeted.
---
From 1879 to 1882, Ireland's first Land War pitted rural tenants, reeling from years of economic downturn, against the rental policies of wealthy and often-absentee English landlords. Caught in the crossfire was former English army officer "Captain" [Charles Boycott](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), whose position as a land agent for one such landlord in County Mayo came with the responsibility of evicting delinquent tenants. Organized locals made life miserable for Boycott by behaving coldly toward him in public, refusing to provide him with goods and services, and harassing his employees into quitting, a process dubbed "boycotting" by parish priest John O'Malley.
After Boycott's complaints about the situation were published in London’s _The Times_ in October 1880, around 50 volunteers from Ireland's northern border journeyed to County Mayo to help the short-staffed officer harvest his farm crops. However, these charitable souls required the protection of a Royal Irish Constabulary regiment, whose members proceeded to trample the grounds and poach the livestock during their two-week stay at Boycott's property. Although the volunteer mission was successful (albeit at an estimated cost of £10,000 to harvest £350 worth of crops), Boycott's abandonment of his farm in late November marked a victory for the tenants and the effective method of persuasion that rapidly earned recognition under its new name.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Film audiences boycotted a killer Santa Claus in 1984.
The box-office success of _Halloween_ spawned a boom of slasher flicks in the late 1970s and early ’80s, providing audiences with the now-familiar trope of a villain violently wreaking havoc on an unwitting community. While the antagonists took on a variety of forms across these largely indistinguishable and forgettable productions, a segment of the population drew the line at the concept of the [killer Santa](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srbb0r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) portrayed in 1984's _Silent Night, Deadly Night_. Calls for a boycott were especially loud in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, where one mother formed an advocacy group called Citizens Against Movie Madness (CAMM) that organized protests of the film's screenings. Even famed critics Gene Siskel and Roger Ebert were swept up in the outrage, singling out the producers of the "sick, sleazy, and mean-spirited" movie by name on their TV show. The protests seemingly paid dividends, as the film's distributor, Tri-Star, yanked the feature from theaters after just a few weeks. Then again, _Silent Night, Deadly Night_ became a popular home video release before spawning four sequels.

clean_body: Although people have sought to effect change through economic and social pressure since at least the 1700s, the concept became more widely known in the latter years of the following century, earning its moniker by way of one of the individuals targeted. | A lthough people have sought to effect change through economic and social pressure since at least the 1700s, the concept became more widely known in the latter years of the following century, earning its moniker by way of one of the individuals targeted. From 1879 to 1882, Ireland's first Land War pitted rural tenants, reeling from years of economic downturn, against the rental policies of wealthy and often-absentee English landlords. Caught in the crossfire was former English army officer "Captain" , whose position as a land agent for one such landlord in County Mayo came with the responsibility of evicting delinquent tenants. Organized locals made life miserable for Boycott by behaving coldly toward him in public, refusing to provide him with goods and services, and harassing his employees into quitting, a process dubbed "boycotting" by parish priest John O'Malley. After Boycott's complaints about the situation were published in London’s The Times in October 1880, around 50 volunteers from Ireland's northern border journeyed to County Mayo to help the short-staffed officer harvest his farm crops. However, these charitable souls required the protection of a Royal Irish Constabulary regiment, whose members proceeded to trample the grounds and poach the livestock during their two-week stay at Boycott's property. Although the volunteer mission was successful (albeit at an estimated cost of £10,000 to harvest £350 worth of crops), Boycott's abandonment of his farm in late November marked a victory for the tenants and the effective method of persuasion that rapidly earned recognition under its new name. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Duration (in days) of the Montgomery bus boycott 381 | | NYC students who took part in a 1964 boycott against school segregation 464,000 | NYC students who took part in a 1964 boycott against school segregation 464,000 | | Nations that boycotted participation in the 1980 Moscow Olympics 60+ | | Year the Land War-inspired film Captain Boycott was released 1947 | Year the Land War-inspired film Captain Boycott was released 1947 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Film audiences boycotted a killer Santa Claus in 1984. The box-office success of Halloween spawned a boom of slasher flicks in the late 1970s and early ’80s, providing audiences with the now-familiar trope of a villain violently wreaking havoc on an unwitting community. While the antagonists took on a variety of forms across these largely indistinguishable and forgettable productions, a segment of the population drew the line at the concept of the portrayed in 1984's Silent Night, Deadly Night. Calls for a boycott were especially loud in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, where one mother formed an advocacy group called Citizens Against Movie Madness (CAMM) that organized protests of the film's screenings. Even famed critics Gene Siskel and Roger Ebert were swept up in the outrage, singling out the producers of the "sick, sleazy, and mean-spirited" movie by name on their TV show. The protests seemingly paid dividends, as the film's distributor, Tri-Star, yanked the feature from theaters after just a few weeks. Then again, Silent Night, Deadly Night became a popular home video release before spawning four sequels. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Musk Mural Defaced, Copper Thefts, and 'Sea Sparkle'
body:
After a mural of SpaceX CEO Elon Musk was vandalized in Brownsville earlier this week, the artist behind the work incorporated the message scribbled across the tech mogul’s face with a new addition to the mural, reportedly at the billionaire’s request.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kb1uhDAQhJ_GdIfMGgwULiKhk1JclC4lWvAClvyDjO9y9_aRo5yUJqlndj7NzsdlvKCxxq9v6Eil-xJG4NCcOJx4O2o09jHWhVYT131VkKpa0fWiqpum2FS7UCUmKRvglZxwWnjH57qrRS0XQctcGJXDOPC2AmhFX-pFT7zjEnQvsZ2J1Zy0SSGWaaNEdzwW-wg3iuUcXGHVltJ-MPHC4MzgbPyNjlS6oMmFyVjKriyJ8zW58QjXOBMTg3Yx0opbcMRAZsmRNlfHxPCOMXmKIHPDH5ZD409kgx9x3-3zZEa3o1l9ziNtZkykyaGx4-sgZMOftuAT-cTEwEAmj46OfzD5FdD8ghVR6f3TWGsO2bKar5nwXT79ucZNwVcAAAD__16Bj6I) | |
# Friday, February 7, 2025

**Good morning!** On this day in 1855, western author and detective [Charles Siringo](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQAL_GdLGWxeBQuHgNXV57JbK967CSwSg4ufD3p1x_7RQzmq_bfPOSZbv_9yu7-k5lRsD-AngBO5OXfM6mIReAxrZh19ruOnat6ftmcckEiFdLpscUUk-h7eKQuogh9oxjbMR9ZIBgW0TbjZoSBbjCgDQO3kZWBpikloeuC1d--yPls7z4oWNZm-yWWnfV_VM4KZz27GU7lufqN6nCh35uWTM9FU68xTPmsjOJVzhRiR9433UqWYNpm4ej_VtylmOwysB99ZJ_G_XP6ZfDnwAAAP__vg9aig) was born in Matagorda County. His literary achievements played a key role in romanticizing the West and creating the myth of the American cowboy. Finding a spot in an H-E-B parking lot can be challenging, but what happened to this driver gives "tight squeeze" a whole new meaning. Check out the [photo here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEZmjDEULl5Dl9duicaecbDi4Ai8Ifn7Vbbf-l4dHZ2vy3LBlNN2_Y93dvUVywIKjFQglV0IU34vfUPOK5q6hl1n9TjprjemWZ0Gr40fGLSCKY4M3lDPwD4AxkjYJPeBKVC2A7B6aimSV6MagKYBbWDRK6ZUy97WlSu_8Ij5XZ68t6Hcm-zWWh-H0P8EzALm8zzb21q-P6OAGfeaQmYB88bnIWDOJWAWMAfc5cpePnC_pe0qc6myrizPUijjRp8vjEaqYEbVR5ZgR5T9GFh635G0mhUOoSMy2OyOHmfKOR2DFb263jHlX7v6Z66ng58AAAD__8bKa6k)! ## Austin Airport Severely Understaffed
New FAA data reveals that [only 32 air traffic controller positions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1h4sUNcUFzjLtdeaa3NEiMRE8EmOH9_Sq6-boqZ0dP7ucwXDDHs12-8keXDpxkUDFKBVGZ2GOJr7htnF-XGriHbGX0eddcPQ7PZURtU-ryg07SA6s1KZvBuGVegoVdDE-z7TIEyHYDRY-u8W9RZncCNJzQriV6RC5xyyxsxHVh8fKUn5XZNtybajflehP4SMAmYaq2tT4fBR-GwvysCpp1qETB5ROmQUZYt1SK3VOVjd5QLo_fk5N-mSAz5njLL8ImSM3ofVrmmnXOKkXJpsnX3GmIM5WREr643DPHDw_8Kelr4DQAA__84KWwh) out of a target of 60 are currently filled at Austin-Bergstrom International Airport (ABIA). Last month’s deadly collision between an airliner and a military helicopter in Washington DC, as well as [several near misses](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1jDGINdULzGXV67pTUYiJGwiQwbkr9fZfutbnGlc6TzdVtvFFM87__p8Ka-Ql4RcOSAHPTqKKb3KjtnLLhZdN4IPUzzIOQ4drsBFUbvphAmq1CApXmzkxX6s9I56qL5wABBC0Q9zL0LzsIECt2sSG-eSfAu1nz1dffVv6iE9M5Pf_VbPrpk9lofhQ3_GC4Ml9Za_6Y958_LcDl9KwwX-i41noVTvPiWz3rlxEulEOJ55y37wsUwgJRKQb_XI3WXcY8WU4pFaSbhflBMv8L6Z4GnwZ8AAAD__55gXxc) over the last few years at ABIA, have prompted U.S. Rep. Lloyd Doggett (D-Austin) to raise the alarm about the severity of the understaffing at ABIA. "_We are in the top five airports with the greatest shortage of air traffic controllers_ ," said Doggett, who added he’s [concerned that President Trump’s efforts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQBb_GdKD1YmMoXFxDl2uvRJvYBksGI7wJyd-fuP66VzzNSPNzm24UU9zmb1q95XfIEwLqGrAGMzmK6TOpytk7uEFW3krT9kMrldbVYnUv71JLVH3QoVPGtL1GTQrMoLzDUEV7wQDBSETTDo0L7g49dOiGjszDCwXeRc5Hw4tn_6YS0ie__NE88loluzDvRbRfAkeB43mezfoptNHGeYv5OgkcN38WgSM9C8ftGgfHR_ICx0BU8_Fc99rlefbMNQJ0nURo9mWvDuv2M6YUS2eEgnmlmP7E_G-Jl8XfAAAA__8Vw1_x) to reduce the size of the federal government won’t help the situation. ABIA recently installed ground tracking devices to assist air traffic controllers, but Doggett said they’re “not a panacea.” Airport officials said they are working with the FAA “to implement a staffing plan that meets the growing needs of AUS.”
## 50501 Movement Hits Texas
Texans opposed to President Trump’s approach to deporting illegal immigrants and reforming the federal government took to the streets in Austin and San Antonio on Wednesday. They joined protesters gathering in state capitols around the nation as part of the [50501 movement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kM1qhDAURp8m7pTkRo0usigUd9NNKV1K4o0zF6KR5HZ-3r7YfbffB-fA-b7MF0eR9uuH24Ll55pmkNDVEmppZnQUX3NbofUSR1UFq4weRq3arqtu1q8G0INfhnbQqoeAZlDQjwio0LilInvCJEijAIweG1zRy0H2gGPvzBJEKwMSp9zwLXB4urLGV7qH3Cxpq6K9MR9F6DcBk4DJ-WUPj9Jc03kLmL4-z3Vnqjn_bEd95MShcKl3x5T2B2EQMBVO-SX0RCj0u1JDJ5Ua2ypbPB4UI5XeiFZeN0fxT8v_drhb-A0AAP__-bBfaQ). Around 500 people [marched through downtown Austin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO5CAQBb8GZ4xwG4wdEFzibC-9cNRAM4MOg2V6xrt_f9rNL37SU1X9-bh_YC65Pn7jTo4_U7uDAiMVSGXvEXP5uushOq_iOg7kRjst6zRqY4anm1WKwWtYPSZEO_tgkpmn0SAh-DUO2X2fKVB2BLDTeosperWoGeI6ow0ktKKYuZ03fhLTJ_ZUvtqbzlto-1Dck_noYvolYBOwXdd1-_t-0fcoYMOTcygkYKt0dQFbaQGLgO04G1PnLvGBuXaWfL72Q2Lcc82dT-TcqjTKqFHu7U07VZb46pyr_IGQR8FaKQrYYF7lCHpZjF-lD3OSGnWQC3gt7QSUrFpwMjScLh5XLiX32QqtHjvm8mPB_836dvAvAAD__2deepk) and picketed at the Capitol throughout the day, chanting slogans and holding signs with messages like “Fight Ignorance Not Immigrants,” “Screw The Coup,” and “Arrest Elon Musk.” In San Antonio, hundreds of students at several area high schools [walked out of class](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3uozAQxJ_GdEZm-S5cXEOXa69ES7yAFeON7E1I7ulPXP9vRiONNL_R_LnNN_TBx-03HmTls_IMBlptQJt-dujDd24KZxfjxqogW_X1MNZV07bFbru6cYNrO1jbsRrrDqDtlwGJHCymNl3h7VVmwPQVQF-PpVvdYgbTgRs77O-kGkPOC6dSdhL6YF7Dl9-UyjsfRbC7yDOr-peCScF0nmf5yChXqGCKdGYFU-A7BgXThVIwGbjkchmjxigcPWufnc7ychQla04bRv-X9InhwS_RwvqZWCiLpsTZc9S86v11YNTJb7tcnCJZ9zx9CD53vWrMdqAP_3fKj8e9LfwLAAD__0fIcLU) and gathered outside of City Hall. Administrators expressed their support for students' engagement in activism but encouraged them to do so on their respective campuses.
## Musk Mural Defaced, Transformed
After a mural of SpaceX CEO Elon Musk was vandalized in Brownsville earlier this week, the artist behind the work incorporated the message scribbled across the tech mogul’s face with a [new addition to the mural](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAURL8Gd1hwDcEuKLZxl223tHhcB7TYWEDi5O9XSb_tjGaOdH6uy9XEFPfbt9lQt-eaF2AgKQPK1OJNTK9FdF5b5ifeoeZqGKeBCym7oFePo7VSDAKM5GjtYJ3haCQ65CBVF_X7jAFTHEANU-9Xb9nILuCni1EOiWDoY8ulbwEbPk1d0ys_sPQub13SobWjkuGLwExgPs-zd6Hk_d0SmHc8K4E55HtteaefPYHZlBZdQgLzJ6GY8k63e_2l272YRIFxMY5q7I9wdEX744wpxXpRRLDbZmL6wNu_Nh4a_gIAAP__Nm9jIA), reportedly at the billionaire’s request. Police have not found the person who defaced the “Boca Chica To Mars” mural by drawing an anarchist symbol and writing “Deny, Defend, Depose”—the words [scratched into the shell casings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOgzAQheGngc7IDGCHwsU26bLtlsiXIRllwAg7ONmnXyX99kefjv6fy3SxxLRev-2CJj_nOIGEQUgQUk_BEr-mvg7GyTC2NZpWd6exa_thqG9Gezc6lMNsXavGwfpOBbTaz60Lo-tVTeaNSZC6BdDd2IQ5OHmSCsKorPZY9RID5bg3-YYZnzbN_IoH7o2PS83mlvOWqu6rgnMF51JKs2JJBfH-HlRwRo6rWB7pLpbHblkcdg2W6ReDcHssazqIGcWHFjtuD8fk7Sq2yOQJkwAJqlNQ7yZshZgpKV318rpY4s-J_G-Vw8BfAAAA__9JsGf8) discovered at the site where Luigi Mangione allegedly shot and killed UnitedHealthcare CEO in December. The artist who created the mural, Alexandro Gonzalez-Hernandez, has removed the graffiti, but he [added a name tag](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQRZ_GdIPM8F-4SEOxq2y7JRrigYzWxhE2Ibz9ivRfNdIc6d6j-_c-3kmcrMsf8mzSZw4jaqxBI-h2tCTuHKvMmknbvsjYFG3Z9WVR1XX2NIRc9dWMfTFhU3ZNM9VliaQ73VnUPGdirjCNui0Q27LP7Wwn3ekGbd9Q-2BVabaSwpanJyf-UJzdGd685Y_gM2eeKb2iKm8KB4XDcRy5j-vFFA68wh4VDrSl67wl7uSAtgS0WrAcZVkVDn6P_yCFC0hM8NoT-BNW8gwSwe2yCHgI6_W1PNODLXxNwO8buW8B3G7F-Qm_f2Wbsa9DnJPYtKrSiydxX9f043hvg_8DAAD__934ct0) to Musk’s shirt that reads “Hello, I’m Luigi M.” Gonzalez-Hernandez said the mural’s new message is "Deny destruction. Defend creativity. Depose hate,” explaining that "art is about creation, not destruction.” Although Musk has not commented publicly about the incident, Gonzalez-Hernandez said the billionaire suggested the change. When asked to verify that, the artist suggested that AI might have inspired the addition.

clean_body: After a mural of SpaceX CEO Elon Musk was vandalized in Brownsville earlier this week, the artist behind the work incorporated the message scribbled across the tech mogul’s face with a new addition to the mural, reportedly at the billionaire’s request. | | | | | | Friday, February 7, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1855, western author and detective was born in Matagorda County. His literary achievements played a key role in romanticizing the West and creating the myth of the American cowboy. Finding a spot in an H-E-B parking lot can be challenging, but what happened to this driver gives "tight squeeze" a whole new meaning. Check out the ! Our sponsor today is which is pioneering a transformative approach to smartphone usage by turning everyday devices into income-generating assets. Abilene 🌤️ 83/52° | Amarillo ⛅ 77/39° | Austin 🌦️ 81/66° | Brownsville ⛅ 84/69° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 80/67° | DFW 🌥️ 76/61° | El Paso ☀️ 80/43° | Houston 🌦️ 80/68° | Laredo 🌤️ 90/65° | Lubbock ⛅ 84/41° | Midland 🌤️ 86/51° | San Antonio ⛅ 82/65° | Tyler 🌦️ 79/66° | Waco 🌥️ 80/65° | Austin Airport Severely Understaffed New FAA data reveals that out of a target of 60 are currently filled at Austin-Bergstrom International Airport (ABIA). Last month’s deadly collision between an airliner and a military helicopter in Washington DC, as well as over the last few years at ABIA, have prompted U.S. Rep. Lloyd Doggett (D-Austin) to raise the alarm about the severity of the understaffing at ABIA. "We are in the top five airports with the greatest shortage of air traffic controllers ," said Doggett, who added he’s to reduce the size of the federal government won’t help the situation. ABIA recently installed ground tracking devices to assist air traffic controllers, but Doggett said they’re “not a panacea.” Airport officials said they are working with the FAA “to implement a staffing plan that meets the growing needs of AUS.” 50501 Movement Hits Texas Texans opposed to President Trump’s approach to deporting illegal immigrants and reforming the federal government took to the streets in Austin and San Antonio on Wednesday. They joined protesters gathering in state capitols around the nation as part of the . Around 500 people and picketed at the Capitol throughout the day, chanting slogans and holding signs with messages like “Fight Ignorance Not Immigrants,” “Screw The Coup,” and “Arrest Elon Musk.” In San Antonio, hundreds of students at several area high schools and gathered outside of City Hall. Administrators expressed their support for students' engagement in activism but encouraged them to do so on their respective campuses. Musk Mural Defaced, Transformed After a mural of SpaceX CEO Elon Musk was vandalized in Brownsville earlier this week, the artist behind the work incorporated the message scribbled across the tech mogul’s face with a , reportedly at the billionaire’s request. Police have not found the person who defaced the “Boca Chica To Mars” mural by drawing an anarchist symbol and writing “Deny, Defend, Depose”—the words discovered at the site where Luigi Mangione allegedly shot and killed UnitedHealthcare CEO in December. The artist who created the mural, Alexandro Gonzalez-Hernandez, has removed the graffiti, but he to Musk’s shirt that reads “Hello, I’m Luigi M.” Gonzalez-Hernandez said the mural’s new message is "Deny destruction. Defend creativity. Depose hate,” explaining that "art is about creation, not destruction.” Although Musk has not commented publicly about the incident, Gonzalez-Hernandez said the billionaire suggested the change. When asked to verify that, the artist suggested that AI might have inspired the addition. | Flying together with our sponsor Elon Musk Dreams, Mode Mobile Delivers As Elon Musk puts it, “Apple used to really bring out products that would blow people’s minds.” Those days are long gone, and a new smartphone company is stepping up to deliver the mind-blowing moments we've been missing. by the Nasdaq, and you can still make an investment in their pre-IPO offering. Turning smartphones from an expense into an income stream, Mode has already and seen an astonishing 32,481% revenue growth rate over three years. Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb did it to hotels...And now, Mode Mobile is doing it to the $1 trillion smartphone industry. Don’t miss your chance to invest in the next big disruption to smartphones. . | ➤ Attorney General Ken Paxton has asked Dallas ISD and Irving ISD for documents pertaining to their policies on transgender athletes. This follows the release of a secretly recorded video of administrators discussing how to avoid a state law prohibiting student-athletes from competing for a team other than that designated for their biological sex. () ➤ Fort Worth: Police arrested three alleged thieves accused of stealing copper cables on Monday when they were found with 155 pounds of wire worth approximately $675. Thefts of AT&T copper cables have increased 500% over the past two years. () ➤ Socorro: An ordinance prohibiting the use of untreated pecan shells for gardening or landscaping has gone into effect, with fines of up to $500 per violation. The ordinance was passed in response to an infestation of red flour beetles. () ➤ Comal County: A court officially designated Desiree Hamm, 37, as a sexually violent predator last week. This is the first such designation applied to a female offender in state history. In 2011, she was convicted of preying on two teenage girls. () ➤ Frisco: The city council approved a $160 million bond proposition for a performing arts center that would be built in conjunction with Prosper ISD. Voters will get to weigh in on the proposal in May. () ➤ Houston: Controller Chris Hollins called on Mayor John Whitmire and the city council to create a task force to address an annual deficit of more than $200 million. The deficit is compounded by a recent Texas Supreme Court decision requiring the city to invest an additional $100 million a year on roads and drainage projects. () ➤ Sugar Land: Crews broke ground on a $231 million expansion of the Memorial Hermann Sugar Land Hospital last week. With a projected completion sometime next year, the expansion will add 52 beds, surgical suites, and a neonatal intensive care unit. name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkcGK5CAQhp_G3BIqZRKTg4eGTC8LMz0LfdijOGqnC4yKmln27Zdmpx9grvUXX33F__tNvWnyFLaL3p2kUpQNVuWiglZ38r41ubblyJ-tj2FTCDi2gC0I1TdWjtjPt7lxshd8XviEI2_ucoKBCy2sRbMYWCYBI_TDYnGY7dB_YEPywQEE0eMwo-jcuMBk-9uHBe3cOLEBjmR1dR2FQtYVE2NK0VMlU7qYt8bLe62pMH5ieGZ4pnCL3UO4WO1d5-zB8Px0d38fS_xcDOMr9KPAC-CAr3Ba39eXlyvD6ai7KvHIxjG-phxLcqZS2L6i3Vk6dsZXt2vyX0Oj96RpC4yvJtfnof9RDNWFyvj6-n75oX6d2p_Xa_v8usnSpj_kPZVJsAG2B7QzcW_qNyv4lPgvAAD__w17kF4)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkcGK5CAQhp_G3BIqZRKTg4eGTC8LMz0LfdijOGqnC4yKmln27Zdmpx9grvUXX33F__tNvWnyFLaL3p2kUpQNVuWiglZ38r41ubblyJ-tj2FTCDi2gC0I1TdWjtjPt7lxshd8XviEI2_ucoKBCy2sRbMYWCYBI_TDYnGY7dB_YEPywQEE0eMwo-jcuMBk-9uHBe3cOLEBjmR1dR2FQtYVE2NK0VMlU7qYt8bLe62pMH5ieGZ4pnCL3UO4WO1d5-zB8Px0d38fS_xcDOMr9KPAC-CAr3Ba39eXlyvD6ai7KvHIxjG-phxLcqZS2L6i3Vk6dsZXt2vyX0Oj96RpC4yvJtfnof9RDNWFyvj6-n75oX6d2p_Xa_v8usnSpj_kPZVJsAG2B7QzcW_qNyv4lPgvAAD__w17kF4)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkcGK5CAQhp_G3BIqZRKTg4eGTC8LMz0LfdijOGqnC4yKmln27Zdmpx9grvUXX33F__tNvWnyFLaL3p2kUpQNVuWiglZ38r41ubblyJ-tj2FTCDi2gC0I1TdWjtjPt7lxshd8XviEI2_ucoKBCy2sRbMYWCYBI_TDYnGY7dB_YEPywQEE0eMwo-jcuMBk-9uHBe3cOLEBjmR1dR2FQtYVE2NK0VMlU7qYt8bLe62pMH5ieGZ4pnCL3UO4WO1d5-zB8Px0d38fS_xcDOMr9KPAC-CAr3Ba39eXlyvD6ai7KvHIxjG-phxLcqZS2L6i3Vk6dsZXt2vyX0Oj96RpC4yvJtfnof9RDNWFyvj6-n75oX6d2p_Xa_v8usnSpj_kPZVJsAG2B7QzcW_qNyv4lPgvAAD__w17kF4)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9Et_QdS7J6cgvQGfS3ZuMw~~/AARclBA~/w9nc0CqxiB74lOD_tA8xD-9t3DX5-78pP_OPaHB54yY66_7TDKE18soe7ZW8UO6Bz6O7BVGV6zsWVLjzb69p1jzi1aLV7plKhN9F8hQjAHbf8Q9hxn8dQxLALktLI9VgO4mmvEvbZ1r0RjlWCZyrdSzsHqmiqVpjCYWKc4rAtx-kM0WdNxyo8kqvgmQFl3_N453y1ovfpwel5OGzs_ePUHV6LmhdYF83YgJ-BuIpdbQQsgvkTO85nPI0ysGa9SrkvQ1WpwpdfCmTOir-3SxvXYpXfkTCHzR9ot6wkhvohTzCdOSHXDIUC6mwteUliBMzf9Co2f668XV9G2EQSD92_sRw6AUzOkN81dDxTmpuey8~)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9Et_QdS7J6cgvQGfS3ZuMw~~/AARclBA~/w9nc0CqxiB74lOD_tA8xD-9t3DX5-78pP_OPaHB54yY66_7TDKE18soe7ZW8UO6Bz6O7BVGV6zsWVLjzb69p1jzi1aLV7plKhN9F8hQjAHbf8Q9hxn8dQxLALktLI9VgO4mmvEvbZ1r0RjlWCZyrdSzsHqmiqVpjCYWKc4rAtx-kM0WdNxyo8kqvgmQFl3_N453y1ovfpwel5OGzs_ePUHV6LmhdYF83YgJ-BuIpdbQQsgvkTO85nPI0ysGa9SrkvQ1WpwpdfCmTOir-3SxvXYpXfkTCHzR9ot6wkhvohTzCdOSHXDIUC6mwteUliBMzf9Co2f668XV9G2EQSD92_sRw6AUzOkN81dDxTmpuey8~)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9Et_QdS7J6cgvQGfS3ZuMw~~/AARclBA~/w9nc0CqxiB74lOD_tA8xD-9t3DX5-78pP_OPaHB54yY66_7TDKE18soe7ZW8UO6Bz6O7BVGV6zsWVLjzb69p1jzi1aLV7plKhN9F8hQjAHbf8Q9hxn8dQxLALktLI9VgO4mmvEvbZ1r0RjlWCZyrdSzsHqmiqVpjCYWKc4rAtx-kM0WdNxyo8kqvgmQFl3_N453y1ovfpwel5OGzs_ePUHV6LmhdYF83YgJ-BuIpdbQQsgvkTO85nPI0ysGa9SrkvQ1WpwpdfCmTOir-3SxvXYpXfkTCHzR9ot6wkhvohTzCdOSHXDIUC6mwteUliBMzf9Co2f668XV9G2EQSD92_sRw6AUzOkN81dDxTmpuey8~)

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Fredrick Douglass - The Anti DEI Hero of our Republic
body:
Victor vs Victimhood

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=10c6a5c64b)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | “You are not judged by the height you have risen, but by the depth you have climbed.”
* Fredrick Douglass

---
|
---
|
**A Nation of Victors, Not Victims:**
_**What Fredrick Douglass**_ _**Taught us about DEI**_
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
In the spirit of Frederick Douglass, the self-liberated man who defied every chain meant to hold him down, I find myself grappling with the modern ideology of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI). It is not that the concept of equity is inherently flawed, nor that inclusion is unwelcome; rather, the industry built around DEI seems to have gone astray. Instead of uplifting individuals, it often encourages them to see themselves as victims instead of victors. If there’s one lesson Douglass imparts, it's that self-determination and personal excellence outweigh all obstacles.
For those unfamiliar, Frederick Douglass was not merely a man of his time but a visionary ahead of it. Born into slavery and fueled by his own courage and resolve, he taught himself to read and write when such actions were punishable by death. He became a prolific orator, writer, and abolitionist, eventually advising President Abraham Lincoln. By the time of his death, Douglass emerged as one of the wealthiest men of his era, a testament to the strength of grit, intelligence, and an unshakeable belief in his own worth.
Let’s be honest: Frederick Douglass likely wouldn’t be invited to keynote your average DEI seminar. He would stand at the lectern, pause, and then deconstruct the idea of viewing individuals solely as representatives of their racial or social categories instead of as unique, capable beings. He believed that freedom came not from handouts or lowered expectations but from opportunity and effort.
Today's DEI playbook, in contrast, often does the opposite. By framing marginalized communities as inherently disadvantaged, it risks fostering a culture of dependency and resentment. Rather than encouraging individuals to tackle challenges, it suggests, “The system is rigged, and you are powerless without intervention.” This stands in direct opposition to what America is supposed to represent.
If we want a nation where equity truly thrives, we should focus on empowering individuals through education, experience, and merit-based opportunities, rather than perpetuating a narrative of systemic helplessness. Excellence, not victimhood, should be the gold standard. This isn’t merely a feel-good platitude but the formula for a new golden age for the United States.
Let’s consider how Douglass might have approached the modern workplace. Faced with barriers, he would likely do what he always did: learn, strategize, and excel until he overcame them. He wouldn’t waste his energy on grievances but would channel it into accomplishments. Yet, he would not expect the world to bend to him simply because of his struggles. He believed in equality of opportunity, not equality of outcome.
The irony is that Douglass achieved more for inclusion without a corporate diversity officer. Through his actions, he proved that intelligence and character, not skin color, matter most. By his example, he elevated not only himself but also the perception of an entire race. Our modern DEI apparatus would do well to revisit this lesson.
If America is to continue its progress, it must return to a simple, though demanding, idea: Treat people as individuals, not as victims of arbitrary categories. Judge them by their abilities and contributions, not by their grievances or identities. Equity, in its truest sense, means creating a society where everyone has the chance to thrive based on their talents and determination. That, however, is actually the definition of Equality.
Frederick Douglass didn’t need a DEI consultant to achieve greatness. What he needed was opportunity and a belief in his own potential—two things America, at its best, has always offered. Let us honor his legacy not by teaching future generations to see themselves as victims, but as victors. That is the DEI America truly needs. And if Douglass were alive today, I can imagine he’d close his speech with something like this: **“Dear friends, do not wait for a committee or a consultan** t to validate your worth. Get up, take the reins, and make something of yourself.”
Wise words and an even wiser path forward.
---
|
---

...and the Turning Point Generation –– as I call these high school and college students –– are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.

Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Tell Congress: Stop Trump's flagrant disregard for the rule of law
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
We must act to protect essential services that are on the line
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3308130/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| Despite two federal court orders, Trump is still trying to take away vital support from American families so he can cut taxes for his billionaire friends—**and we shouldn’t stand for it.**

Tell your members of Congress to speak out against this illegal blockade so that the administration complies with the law and stops playing politics with people’s lives. [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3308131/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Friend—

It’s hard to keep up with the chaotic news cycle, so here’s a quick update: **The Trump administration is still freezing energy, environmental, and infrastructure grants despite two federal court orders forbidding it from doing so.**

_This isn't normal_ —Trump is rapidly consolidating and exercising power in egregious ways, moving our country toward a state of lawlessness and testing the limits of how much he can get away with. His administration’s illegal funding blockade of critical Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and Department of Energy (DOE) programs defies the Constitution, multiple federal laws, and a series of recent judicial directives explicitly directing them to resume funding commitments.

Not to mention, it’s making it harder for Americans to get clean air and water and risks driving up energy bills.

Many representatives in Congress are demanding answers, and we’re also seeing the Trump administration fumbling with attempts at doing damage control. **That means public pressure _is working—and that we must keep it up._ The administration is counting on our silence and overwhelm to help them get away with this.**

Thousands of Evergreen supporters have already called their members of Congress, but we can’t let up the pressure, friend. [**Will you send a message to your members of Congress today demanding that they fight back to restore these vital programs and the rule of law in our country?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3308132/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[CONTACT YOUR REPS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3308133/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Trump and “co-president” Elon Musk want to gut federal funding under the guise of “waste,” but a lot of the programs on the chopping block aren’t wasteful—**they’re essential.** Programs that we all depend on to keep our families fed and healthy, help pay our bills, heat our homes in the winter, and support the communities still reeling from recent climate disasters.

**Our government is supposed to work for us, not against us** —and this flagrant disregard for the rule of law must end. [**Tell your members of Congress to fight back and obstruct as much of Trump’s cuts as possible, so we can keep vital federal funding flowing.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3308134/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for taking action today.

— Team Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The illegal Musk-Trump shutdown of USAID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Folks, I’ll keep this really short because there’s a lot going on right now.
First, the Musk-Trump shutdown of USAID is illegal.
Second, it will cause serious human suffering.
Third, it will weaken our national security — which is exactly what China, Iran, and Russia want.
I’m fighting tooth and nail to protect the USAID workers who combat the spread of famine, disease, and global instability, and I’d like to know if you’re with me.
Please add your name to my petition today to say we MUST protect USAID from illegal and dangerous targeting by Elon Musk and Donald Trump. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9gf3X4RsNkivCA2JTvOD9w2]
Thank you. More to come soon.
-Tim Kaine

Rep. Nancy Mace **[exploded at a language-policing democrat](https://substack.com/redirect/ed6ed70d-c228-4b57-8b49-15a2deacd596?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who tried to silence her for saying a politically incorrect term during a hearing, Wednesday.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ed6ed70d-c228-4b57-8b49-15a2deacd596?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ed6ed70d-c228-4b57-8b49-15a2deacd596?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"USAID awarded $2 million to strengthen trans-led organizations to deliver gender affirming healthcare in Guatemala," Mace told the witnesses. "So to each of you this morning, does this advance the interest of American citizens, paying for trannys in Guatemala?"
Mace continued to press the government witnesses about other absurd line items the USAID has spent millions of American tax dollars on. But Rep. Gerry Connolly had an issue with a word Mace used during her questioning.
"The gentlelady has used a phrase that is considered a slur in the LGBTQ community," Connolly told the chairman. "To me, a slur is a slur, and here in the committee, a level of decorum requires us to consciously avoid slurs."
Mace quickly interrupted, **["Tranny, tranny, tranny, I don't really care!](https://substack.com/redirect/ed6ed70d-c228-4b57-8b49-15a2deacd596?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** You want penises in women's bathrooms... I'm not going to be counseled by a man over men in women's spaces!"
Watch the chaos right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ed6ed70d-c228-4b57-8b49-15a2deacd596?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Asking pro-Palestinian protesters "Was October 7th justified?"**
_" Is terrorism good or bad?"_
PolitiBrawl's Matt Miller asked anti-Israel protesters in Washington D.C. if terrorism was a justifiable tool to fight back against Israel.
Their answers say it all...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/da964312-1d59-4a7c-9ce0-5aa81dd87f2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/da964312-1d59-4a7c-9ce0-5aa81dd87f2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The protesters were gathered outside the White House on the night President Trump announced his intentions to "take over" the Gaza Strip alongside Israeli President Benjamin Netanyahu.
"Gaza is not for sale!!" protesters were heard chanting, a long with the notorious "From the river to the sea, Palestine will be free chant."
Killing on both sides has escalated to unmanagable levels following the October 7, 2023 attacks, as Trump announces that America will step in to throw water on the raging violence.
"The U.S. will take over the Gaza Strip, and we will do a job with it, too," Trump stated Tuesday evening. "We'll own it and be responsible for dismantling all of the dangerous, unexplored bombs and other weapons on the site."

"So to each of you this morning, does this advance the interest of American citizens, paying for trannys in Guatemala?" Mace continued to press the government witnesses about other absurd line items the USAID has spent millions of American tax dollars on. But Rep. Gerry Connolly had an issue with a word Mace used during her questioning. "The gentlelady has used a phrase that is considered a slur in the LGBTQ community," Connolly told the chairman. "To me, a slur is a slur, and here in the committee, a level of decorum requires us to consciously avoid slurs." Mace quickly interrupted, You want penises in women's bathrooms... I'm not going to be counseled by a man over men in women's spaces!" Watch the chaos right here: Dennis Quaid on Helping To Secure your future.... | | ---|---|--- Hey folks, Dennis Quaid here. If you're looking for a way to help safeguard your savings, I recommend my partners at the top rated precious metals company - Goldco. Hi Peter,

We’re hearing from so many of you – more than ever before – that the news these past few weeks has been overwhelming.

We understand how you feel. There’s an open misogynist and sexual predator in the White House, our Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, reportedly believes that “women should not _vote or work_ ,” Elon Musk appears to have installed “an army of 20-something men” to dismantle U.S. agencies, male legislators across America are sponsoring bills that criminalize women for accessing life-saving reproductive healthcare... and so much more.

We thought today would be a good time to share our plan to protect – and even expand – women’s political power over the next four years.

[**But first, consider chipping in $20.25 or whatever you can to help us elect more pro-choice, pro-women WOMEN to protect American women’s rights and safety over the next four years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101703903/526812207/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250207emails_N_JZ_NO_11_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlODU3ZmQ1LTViZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LPu5N_ARiKhTpxcPq9GMJi7BXXCsb-RCeC6opheYEnE=)

**We have an exciting twofold strategy to increase women’s political power and improve representation starting THIS YEAR:**

1\. **We’re going to support women candidates in _underserved races_ :** These are the races you might not hear about on the news – but the outcomes impact the lives of millions of Americans. We don’t want ANY women to get left behind – no matter where they live. We’re not afraid to support candidates running in red, abortion-ban states or other unexpected parts of the country. (As you’ll see below, we know how to win in those places.)

2\. **Build infrastructure in underserved places:** The states with abortion bans happen to be the same states in which it’s incredibly difficult to run for office as a Democrat and win – and even harder to run for office as a pro-choice WOMAN and win. But the voters in those states deserve better. We’re building much-needed infrastructure in those parts of the country to serve as a strong foundation for pro-choice women launching a campaign.

You may call us crazy. American Democrats have learned to accept a status quo that means we simply won’t win in red states. Well, we’re excited to report that last cycle, 44% of Her Bold Move VICTORIES came out of RED STATES.

We believe there are plenty of reasons to be optimistic.

At Her Bold Move, we are standing strong.

[**Help us make our plan happen ASAP! Let’s defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends. Take a moment to join our fight today by donating $20.25 or more immediately. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101703914/526812233/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250207emails_N_JZ_NO_11_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlODU3ZmQ1LTViZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LPu5N_ARiKhTpxcPq9GMJi7BXXCsb-RCeC6opheYEnE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101703921/526812252/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250207emails_N_JZ_NO_11_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlODU3ZmQ1LTViZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LPu5N_ARiKhTpxcPq9GMJi7BXXCsb-RCeC6opheYEnE=)

body:
this is HUGE, folks!
| **_Team, this is H-U-G-E!!!!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86697?t=6&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV) [**DC Statehood would give Democrats 2 more Senators and SAVE our Democracy... But unless we have the support of top Democrats like you, friend, we’ll never have the fuel we need to win this fight! Quick: Rush $7 towards our midnight goal to support Dems in the fight for DC Statehood »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86697?t=7&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV) | [**1,000 DC STATEHOOD SUPPORTER GOAL: CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86697?t=8&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV)
---
**DC Statehood would change EVERYTHING for our Democracy...**

It would practically guarantee Democrats 2 more Senators! ✅
It would give the people of DC the representation they deserve! ✅
It would COMPLETELY SHIFT the power dynamic in the fight for the Senate! ✅

[**But it will take all of us, friend: Do your part to help DC become our 51st state! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86697?t=9&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86697?t=10&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV)
[**1,000 DC STATEHOOD SUPPORTER GOAL: CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86697?t=11&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV)
---
We can’t do this without you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18797%2E878179%2EgeX3nV)

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: This is the MOST IMPORTANT email you've received today!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.
If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.
| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**FIRST-** Title IX was passed in 1972 under the Civil Rights Act, ensuring the protection of women and girls in education and sports. This monumental action banned federal funding to schools and universities that discriminate against sex in the classroom and on the sports field or court.

**THEN-** The Radical Left began allowing biological men to compete in women's sports across the country, which directly DENIES Title IX by compromising the integrity, competition, and safety of women's sports. Instead, the Left tried to include ALL GENDERS as protected classes under Title IX, which was ruled unconstitutional in court.

**NOW-** Senator Tuberville led the charge to PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS through the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act. This monumental legislation makes it clear as day that there are ONLY TWO genders under Title IX. But the Radical Left is fighting us every step of the way.

| [ **SUPPORT THE PROTECTION OF WOMEN AND GIRLS IN SPORTS ACT** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c61565b5609c49a79d7c57ed030b5eaf&_e=2MfzgT0FHg-nh0iTr2X-WPaIYDtMfkL0GFE2qo_Ckjp0PJW-1td0RPRj_Dj0cYmwIao1yp7WustpWf6uaU3sM6ObstowqW1pL_xjwlfiTzjMi11qjov7TpHZK3O5yS6v_IYKucQB2j5LyCB4Wat-wBs_q_gavJCUi_WxGG4BcRoARNTkyEp7TEoSTGTuzuG1nMKA4WT5RaT1Nmx3VZCOP1FC_L4uPQ5k0BSTeMB7IPSVYjGPPLf5-9-w1f9CW0jnTxuM9JydeYbd45LjuCDcAD1NeWrCwNCSZQDk5w0eoXciHHot6kWSKfELkMRhLmRNEVAYglJqB4PVmdMnv88oag%3D%3D)
---

Coach Tuberville was a hall-of-fame college football coach before entering the political scene. He knows all too well the importance of protecting sports' integrity, competition, and safety. That's why led the charge on this, and that's why he has my full support.

Now, Coach is up for re-election in 2026, and the Radical Left is doing everything they can to defeat him after dismantling their Radical Agenda.
