name: PoliticsPA
subject: Why PA's red wave missed the PA House
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

Tomorrow, the PAGOP elects a new Chairman. In this episode, we feature an **exclusive interview** with chairman candidate, PA Sen. Greg Rothman, and discuss how **increasingly heavy local tax burdens** might impact Gov. Shapiro's budget and spending plans.

**PA Sen. Greg Rothman** , and **Todd Shepherd,** Chief Investigative Reporter for _Broad + Liberty_**** share insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **PA Sen. Greg Rothman** explains his view on why the GOP failed to reclaim the PA House in 2024, "I've come up with a couple of conclusions. Number one, the Dems outspent the GOP two to one—and number two, the map that was drawn was a totally gerrymandered map..." [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e76564f2b5&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Todd Shepherd, Chief Investigative Reporter at _Broad + Liberty_** remarked, "The fatigue is so bad it could cause a revolt." He noted that Gov. Shapiro will face reduced spending flexibility in the upcoming budget, following recent local tax hikes of 20% to 37% across various counties in PA [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5613cc97ee&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Public Opinion_
* **60% of Americans are optimistic** about the next four years under Trump, while 40% are pessimistic. [[YouGov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=12cf10a705&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Before Trump's election, 38% of Americans felt positive about the economy; that **number has risen to 52%**. [[YouGov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1eb1865405&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Policy_
* **71% of Pennsylvanians oppose new energy taxes,** including those from the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative and Shapiro’s PACER Act, which could raise electric rates by up to 30%**.** [[CommonwealthFoundation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=45f91e2f1f&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* **60% of voters support deploying U.S. troops to the southern border** for security, while 36% oppose it. [[QuinnipiacUniversity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c9d633c4e5&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Elections_
* Trump's favorability has reached its highest since 2021, with **47.2% of Americans** viewing him positively. [[ABCNews](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3eab197b86&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **A new challenge for the PAGOP Chairmanship with PA Sen. Greg Rothman**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb2d67e308&e=b7b3eddce2 "Inside the PAGOP Chair Race: Candidate Interview — Sen. Greg Rothman")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=62101883ad&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6f90b900aa&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c04a8beb01&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db88440187&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e936b1a580&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1101b2c90c&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9933293bcc&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1a41ed3fbf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bdc9ff06de&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._
You're getting _Voices of Reason_ updates due to your interest in the PoliticsPA & Broad + Liberty websites, plus stories with impact in Pennsylvania, the Greater Philadelphia area, and beyond.

**Our mailing address is:**
Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=76cadc98f2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=76cadc98f2).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1)

👉 **USAID staffers were locked out of their emails** after Musk bragged that he and Trump were “shutting it down.”
👉 **Now, Musk is calling USAID a “criminal organization”** — because apparently feeding starving children and preventing pandemics is too “woke” for this administration. Trump and Musk are calling this “government efficiency.” Authoritarian governments are calling it a “smart move” and “couldn’t be happier.” **We’re calling it what it is: An all-out power grab. clean_body: crickets | Peter, this is not a drill. Trump and his billionaire bestie Elon Musk are gutting the federal government before our eyes — and they’re not even trying to hide it: 👉 Lifesaving foreign aid programs have ground to a halt — including HIV treatment for millions, malaria prevention in Uganda, and disaster relief across the globe. 👉 USAID staffers were locked out of their emails after Musk bragged that he and Trump were “shutting it down.” 👉 Now, Musk is calling USAID a “criminal organization” — because apparently feeding starving children and preventing pandemics is too “woke” for this administration. Trump and Musk are calling this “government efficiency.” Authoritarian governments are calling it a “smart move” and “couldn’t be happier.” We’re calling it what it is: An all-out power grab. And if we don’t fight back NOW, it’s only going to get worse. = = Let’s be clear: This isn’t just another example of MAGA chaos. Elon is skirting Congress to actively dismantle the federal government, slash foreign aid and put USAID workers on leave, and install his loyalists to seize total control. Trump is letting un-elected Elon Musk take over entire agencies. This is authoritarianism in action, and we are NOT letting it go unchecked. Unite the Country is mobilizing NOW to call out Trump and Elon’s abuses of power, hold his administration accountable, and make sure every American knows exactly what’s happening before it’s too late. But we need every Democrat in this fight with us — especially you, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = We can’t afford to sit this one out. name: =?utf-8?q?=E2=80=9CIlhan_Omar_via_Justice_Democrats=E2=80=9D?=
subject: Elon Musk said I hate America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140600?t=1002&akid=36403%2E1203867%2EYYWBMB ]Tweet by Ian Miles Cheong: Ilhan Omar is very upset about how Trump is
dismantling USAID, which she claims makes him a “dictator.” Quote tweet
from Elon Musk: She’s a major grifter and hates America

Peter — Elon Musk called me a
“grifter who hates America” earlier this week.

He needs to look in the mirror.

Because frankly, there is no bigger grifter and nobody doing more to harm
America today than Elon Musk.

He’s the richest man in the world and he’s using his wealth and access to
the President to dismantle the parts of the government he doesn’t like,
while collecting the private data of the American people.

He’s never been elected by anyone, and he’s trying to take control of the
Treasury department! Trillions of dollars in medicare payments, social
security, and more.

Not to mention the billions of dollars he and his companies get in
Department of Defense contracts each year.

So yes, I will keep saying that Trump is acting like a dictator and
enriching himself and his oligarch friends at Americans’ expense, no
matter how many times they come after me for it.

I’ve never let the right-wing attacks stop me, and I don’t plan on doing
so now. But I can’t take them on alone. Nobody can. It’s going to take a
movement. So I need to know if you’re with me.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250207-io?refcode=em20250207-36403&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36403_1203867_YYWBMB&akid=36403%2E1203867%2EYYWBMB ]Peter, can
you please chip in $5 or any amount to my campaign and
Justice Democrats to help us fight back against Trump, Musk, and the
oligarchy trying to take over our government? The amount of the donation
today isn’t as important as the donation itself, I’m just grateful to know
you’re in this fight alongside me.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250207-io?refcode=em20250207-36403&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36403_1203867_YYWBMB&akid=36403%2E1203867%2EYYWBMB ]Contribute $5

They are breaking the law and lying about it to the American people. It’s
despicable behavior. And together we will hold them accountable.

In solidarity,

Ilhan

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250207-36403-footer&t=1003&refcode2=36403_1203867_YYWBMB&akid=36403%2E1203867%2EYYWBMB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=36403%2E1203867%2EYYWBMB

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Slams Healey’s Reelection Bid: Calls for New Leadership to Get Massachusetts on the Right Track
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YjgYgy1cxoxCi4i8ORV1sRlGDGidxA6w-wqXCqXCgEYj692S1mxTYjoJItasYKr2cLd-lXsgsp8u2v_XsSK2UFluqupe-emv_DLmZ0dj-Kv6BoIJVbLDL9PmHqn4MHgF9feIeLu9yopjGKlPMWVcpQ==&c=WF2yabZWRu2wcL_6fRDwPtGjZP8X5moCoPVoKK8fBAKJyYBpnnYdyQ==&ch=tVYbYoXsDBZ7TGAUapizj_OLnk17WqCKjz-I3r59H1lrhGnZSm5eKQ==)
---
| MassGOP Slams Healey's Reelection Bid: Calls for New Leadership to Get Massachusetts on the Right Track
---
---
| Boston, MA -Today, Governor Maura Healey announced her bid for reelection. Over the past four years, Healey has overseen a taxpayer-funded humanitarian crisis, soaring costs of living, tax hikes, reckless spending, and the least transparent government in the nation. Massachusetts residents deserve better. We are confident that voters will reject another four years of the Healey-Driscoll Administration and elect a common-sense Republican to restore accountability, affordability, and good governance to the Commonwealth.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale responded to Healey's announcement, stating, "Governor Healey has disappointed residents time and again, steering Massachusetts into an era of secrecy, mismanagement, and financial irresponsibility. Under her leadership, the Commonwealth has become the least transparent state in the nation, with billions wasted on a migrant crisis that has spiraled into a full-blown humanitarian disaster--marked by sexual assaults, drug trafficking, child abuse, and violent crime. Instead of implementing necessary reforms, she continues pushing for hundreds of millions in additional spending that Massachusetts simply cannot afford. Meanwhile, municipalities are struggling to make ends meet, and Healey's solution is to raise taxes and dig deeper into the pockets of hardworking residents. The numbers speak for themselves--more Massachusetts residents are leaving than arriving, a clear testament to Governor Healey's failed leadership."
Carnevale continued, "Massachusetts needs a leader who will get us back on track--someone who will cut taxes, reduce burdensome regulations, and prioritize funding for local communities rather than perpetuating wasteful government bloat. We need a governor who will restore transparency to Beacon Hill and focus on putting money in the hands of residents instead of expanding state bureaucracy. We need a leader who will strengthen our business climate, increase wages, and make Massachusetts a place where people want to live and work. Simply put, Massachusetts needs a governor who will prioritize the needs of residents and put the good of the Commonwealth above political gamesmanship. We are actively engaging with several Republicans who would all make strong candidates, and we are confident we will have a formidable challenger ready to take on Healey and restore prosperity to the Commonwealth."

### ###
---

# [Meet the Team - Evan Newman and Ali Rak](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=155921987&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1OTIxOTg3LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg5NDE5MjAsImV4cCI6MTc0MTUzMzkyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lfbrnx3ywUOWXRRmuCN07NzS0coC-tV80pbqQWkv-Sc)

Friends,
The State Freedom Caucus Network has grown rapidly over the last three years, so we thought it would be a good idea to introduce ourselves to all our new supporters and followers. If you missed our last seven emails, we did a short Q&A with:
1. [Network President Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/c6783767-6081-432b-84a1-0849cc2d1533?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2. [Senior Vice President Justin Ouimette](https://substack.com/redirect/e85a835b-6c08-4c10-b88e-e5325447fe34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3. [VP of Development Dana Craycroft and Sr. Development Director Sara Prinzi](https://substack.com/redirect/1718e114-228b-486e-af51-1f60f6c7450e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
4. [VP of Government Affairs Cesar Ybarra](https://substack.com/redirect/8c234bd1-de58-443e-8700-ca8948e522fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
5. [State Directors Connie Hair (LA) and Nathan Dahm (OK)](https://substack.com/redirect/105607dc-875e-4589-bb00-c7e54a309b4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
6. [State Directors Collin Moseley (IL) and Tim Jones (MO)](https://substack.com/redirect/586e296f-35e1-47c5-95b0-bc2bca6c03fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
7. [State Directors Jessie Rubino (WY) and Darin Gaub (MT)](https://substack.com/redirect/f8ea044f-6a22-481a-87c9-675487e35500?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

This week are two more of our amazing state directors representing South Carolina (**Evan Newman**) and Maryland (**Ali Rak**).
Two interesting facts about them - Evan has won 2 different Office TV show trivia contests. Ali is a classically trained singer who _almost_ majored in music in college. Enjoy!
* * *
**EVAN NEWMAN**
**What is your role with SFCN?** I am the State Director for South Carolina.
**Where are you originally from and where do you live now?** I am originally from Augusta, Georgia. I now live in Greenville, South Carolina.
**Tell us about your family! And Pets!** I live with my Basset Hound, Elvis. My oldest brother and sister-in-law live in Anchorage, Alaska and both work in healthcare. My middle brother lives in Brooklyn, New York and is a teacher. And my parents live in Augusta, Georgia. My dad works at a tire manufacturing plant and my mom is a teacher.
**What 's the best part of your job?** The best part of my job is building relationships with the members and the grassroots. Watching the members learn the process, develop their own personal skills, and lead fearlessly is inspiring to me, and energizes me to do the job everyday. The grassroots who dedicate their free time and resources to support the conservative movement with the hope of improving this state for their families and others is the ultimate form of service, and they deserve our admiration and praise for their commitment to the cause.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?** I worked as a political consultant, specifically helping candidates put together winning campaign strategies as well as helping various 501c3s and 4s execute on legislative advocacy priorities, and I also did a brief stint as a Congressional staffer.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?** The 2012 Presidential election was the first presidential election to which I paid close attention. After researching the candidates, Ron Paul became my preferred candidate, and he became incredibly impactful in shaping my political ideology. I'd also say John Warren who gave me my start in politics when he ran for Governor in 2018. John's no-nonsense commitment to service and real-world business savvy solutions to pressing policy issues have inspired me to always think outside of the box when solving legislative problems and thinking of policy, and remind me that the work is about the people who deserve our best effort.
**My favorite book:** _Farewell to Arms_ by Ernest Hemingway
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ed96153-62d5-4662-9c96-c31fc05198ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**ALI RAK**
**What is your role at SFCN?** I'm the Maryland State Director. I'm one of the newbies!
**Where are you from originally? Where do you live now?** I am originally from Buffalo, NY (Go Bills!). My husband and I have been in Charles County, Maryland since we were married in 2010. We live in beautiful and historic Port Tobacco.
**Tell us about your family! And pets!** We have FIVE kiddos: Matthew (13), Christian (11), Margaret (9), Jacob (7), and Elliott (almost 2). We have two dogs, an emotionally complicated rescue named Athena and a 10-month lab/shepherd mix named Mira.
**What's the best part of your job?** I hate boring, mundane, or routine tasks. Being with the Maryland Freedom Caucus every day always brings something fun or challenging to do. This job allows me to be creative, strategic, and bold which is the best part so far.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?** I'm pretty lucky in that I was familiar with almost all of our MD Freedom Caucus legislators before they officially came under the SFCN banner this year. I've been involved in state-level politics and citizen activism for almost a decade. When the position became available, I really felt it was a perfect merger of my skills and interests.
I've been a jack of all trades my entire adult life. I was a political science and classical studies double major undergrad, went on to be a special education teacher in the Teach for American Mid-Atlantic Corps, then quit teaching to raise my young family. For the last ten years, I've worked for my Catholic parish in full-time ministry. But that entire time, grassroots advocacy was my main hobby. I've been in various pro-life and liberty movements since 2015, including leading the pushback against Covid Tyranny in my county from 2020-2022.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?** Ron Paul. His way of communicating the importance of human freedom, sound money, and foreign policy just made sense to me. But I would never have given him a second listen if not for my husband, who from our first date was always challenging me to examine my beliefs.
***Pick One To Answer*: Favorite food? Favorite place to vacation? Favorite Book? Favorite Quote?** My family and I adore Hilton Head Island, SC. We love our home state of Maryland, but when we need to smell the fresh air of freedom, we head south 😅.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8d93ee76-1bea-4266-8fb2-16ff6c3638d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**Keep fighting,**

_Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/b1a88b66-48c4-460c-be3c-367290e02b44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

name: AOC
subject: This is personal to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Did you know that over half of all Members of Congress are millionaires? Meanwhile, the median household income is only $70,784. 👈🏽 **This is wild.**
Many of our lawmakers have no lived experience of working paycheck to paycheck or trying to pay rent working a low-wage job.
To me, policy is personal. When I worked as a bartender, I relied on tips to pay the bills. I know the urgent and daily stresses of working class people because I have lived them. And I intimately understand how important measures like raising the minimum wage, universal health care, universal child care, and free college can be for families living in financial uncertainty.
That’s why I’m in Congress: **to represent working families like mine.**
I am honored to be here, and I can’t do this work without you — the grassroots supporters who have had my back every step of the way. I can’t self-fund my campaign by writing a big check, and I don’t do any donor call-time or exclusive fundraising events.
[We rely completely on small-dollar donors, so if you are able, can you chip in $5 today to our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250207.jV0fBC&refcode=em20250207-8088-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)
****
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250207.jV0fBC&refcode=em20250207-8088-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-8088-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=21&refcode2=8088_2526796_8eVs1M&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250207-8088-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8088%2E2526796%2E8eVs1M)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: It’s morning again in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ee6bba937e0349e594f1d2fc8055d5fe&_e=lcKm_LkGiEBIBVsErZ1dO0x_dcHcMMwu5cair5le01v0e3i43zt8yFM-0V1l1BcmhhWiH5ZtE_4m52Vrr7ov-m1Yycrt08zKjpylJ8BmSy3YwUroTDkdEiNBbHHAcOGGTMnHYhBds5ia3i1r_xnyTJB6C3XoaBo7cG3yRoqokYBr2B5eUMtqxgLo6BUcu20MxRynTWyjsJrVtsWMkNTX7P6XrDv-BFaEYjNTbvrIB_UkhNSBQytKzpMVlwroW76Y-Pa3UliQY731fQadB68GuA6o-0SLcAPEN7J_o4LnVfrDpgMxmzq1WV8pCrX1b5ZzO7ufhSc3Vi5s0JOY8sQD-WqLD7JMYUDNTzm20LOnXxk%3D)
---

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ee6bba937e0349e594f1d2fc8055d5fe&_e=lcKm_LkGiEBIBVsErZ1dO0x_dcHcMMwu5cair5le01v0e3i43zt8yFM-0V1l1BcmhhWiH5ZtE_4m52Vrr7ov-m1Yycrt08zKjpylJ8BmSy3YwUroTDkdEiNBbHHAcOGGTMnHYhBds5ia3i1r_xnyTGhKIzbABqBWeGOf5MGp9Rjnk9OmntEU0U_J1EUBrKHA1ADlHNoG-9IXpAkSFHpWf2tV4p7M1hcsTYcTj8s4oxfpHCyva0w9Cu410yFXEzo9bFhoK-6JoVBYdw8tHAq31C1msfMdERkBE_K44rz1W3hIhCkfqXt1jzly6oQHFNgcbhs_ilXeHATdXL4INnwrbA%3D%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ee6bba937e0349e594f1d2fc8055d5fe&_e=lcKm_LkGiEBIBVsErZ1dO0x_dcHcMMwu5cair5le01v0e3i43zt8yFM-0V1l1BcmhhWiH5ZtE_4m52Vrr7ov-m1Yycrt08zKjpylJ8BmSy3YwUroTDkdEiNBbHHAcOGGTMnHYhBds5ia3i1r_xnyTGhKIzbABqBWeGOf5MGp9Rjnk9OmntEU0U_J1EUBrKHAEL1EsqI90MmiXDBQ-P1i5irVE2hS-inHq1_DhbIs67VZ87TAAKt9IJysZnBYGr0MUoeB476ehVfZkG7HcGGdTzDfHcbo_8NXvijfaTEXH8wZ0z6uL1ze2fLBto958UN-oZ5fCZBvflQZOuJZmOowAA%3D%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ee6bba937e0349e594f1d2fc8055d5fe&_e=lcKm_LkGiEBIBVsErZ1dO0x_dcHcMMwu5cair5le01v0e3i43zt8yFM-0V1l1BcmhhWiH5ZtE_4m52Vrr7ov-m1Yycrt08zKjpylJ8BmSy3YwUroTDkdEiNBbHHAcOGGTMnHYhBds5ia3i1r_xnyTGhKIzbABqBWeGOf5MGp9Rjnk9OmntEU0U_J1EUBrKHA-KvI5Xah5scXP91zHrFlnjo9uINnvL1hpO_USKnagJAL0LdWDcdN78TVCM8MVvr83JRB3GM1icr6vlKMT7mdX3nsZz_sgw9Ly_t7BVP6HvnGm2sQLuK4rxjMAiFNltVWAv7cDWFMy-0Xm5BR2ESXRA%3D%3D)
Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=ee6bba937e0349e594f1d2fc8055d5fe&_e=lcKm_LkGiEBIBVsErZ1dO0x_dcHcMMwu5cair5le01v0e3i43zt8yFM-0V1l1BcmhhWiH5ZtE_4m52Vrr7ov-m1Yycrt08zKjpylJ8BmSy3YwUroTDkdEiNBbHHAcOGGTMnHYhBds5ia3i1r_xnyTJB6C3XoaBo7cG3yRoqokYBr2B5eUMtqxgLo6BUcu20MFGMWhfqw3SCbZe7PXf3TXcJbWTycNmiJpetwSClMIG-lfxrfYs8D2DKM_F_v30TYO1fXG0zoPCSLL9S1PGGKxYcz4J8jz_8Umj2z2ZjuFr-SqzuyXV1zk89hMdqqxRyw7hDLMhbK_o3pOofiVFfyX12wn95vVRAbSA1HR2V048Y%3D)**
The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right.

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

clean_body: I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office. Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you, and God Bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville? | | | [ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4f898c46d1f4b27a2c818a46c7eb84d&_e=a2TzXGTF8jGbpEAR1aR7hr_rGswYJGwhyizxWXRfq_jtpqc8Wvo6m49IwOa4ZX59MhkG7vp2a-59enRWwISGJ81FxxpiwSEU4VL1K1fQWgsDyhRAZrHRIGQ_hpARJaCinNkYJoabzSWKHns56awt8a1E57H0uz3MvAdxCaRMt-kKhbiTeHhuPEiNGYOghczd4ov_iQVuCI6wCWMe9qYFZytsbneoj-L3pu4_U7q_qDoOJ_AUnxGnt523zJX2F5X2)

Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter. Since arriving in Washington, he has been one of the most determined conservatives standing up to Joe Biden’s disastrous policies. **Now, as he prepares for re-election, it’s up to us to make sure he has the support he needs to keep battling for America.**

Before politics, Coach Tuberville built championship teams on the football field. He knows what it takes to win, and he’s brought that same leadership to the Senate. When it comes to standing up for our conservative values, he never backs down from a fight.
---
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4f898c46d1f4b27a2c818a46c7eb84d&_e=a2TzXGTF8jGbpEAR1aR7hr_rGswYJGwhyizxWXRfq_jtpqc8Wvo6m49IwOa4ZX59MhkG7vp2a-59enRWwISGJ81FxxpiwSEU4VL1K1fQWguqLF6SbtxkG9PbygUE40PFcXbnJFQeOTbj3gIJzyERZ_u_gGPCpV6Ge_yv-VgorSuuF9U2PHHBsdYyccudZOKL9sXr6y39vIcQ9exPWBo76U_N8DZteOUdiIdjZppUrDINKRtQ2LgMvbblkpiatMK4)
---
He proved that when he took on the Pentagon’s outrageous policy of funding abortion travel with taxpayer dollars. While others stayed silent, Coach Tuberville stood firm. His pressure ultimately forced the Pentagon to reverse course — a major victory for life and for American taxpayers. Now Coach Tuberville is leading the charge to protect women’s sports from being undermined by radical gender ideology. His bill to enshrine President Trump's executive action into law is common sense, but Democrats refuse to accept reality. Thankfully, Coach isn’t afraid to call them out and fight for policies that promote truth and fairness. **Sadly, the Left is already gearing up to take him down. They know how effective he is, and they’ll do everything they can to defeat him in 2026. We can’t let that happen.** **[**Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4f898c46d1f4b27a2c818a46c7eb84d&_e=a2TzXGTF8jGbpEAR1aR7hr_rGswYJGwhyizxWXRfq_jtpqc8Wvo6m49IwOa4ZX59MhkG7vp2a-59enRWwISGJ81FxxpiwSEU4VL1K1fQWguOT6Q8PXWsXz5HYNU1x2HUshLAP8uZwPsITpx031YmS4G1TSVspo7vZ6e-Se5yErXN4TaBE16kA9Z3oWdeHSrYoEsE8BfVC6JB6yRMXXp8mn-cnDM63jiEuOazjP5hoeFZHQfWbtrTdu_yBtZ1Icww)** _The Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him because we don't use gimmicks that secretly redirect huge chunks of your contribution to other committees and digital vendors._ Coach Tuberville has never wavered in his commitment to our values. _**Now, it’s time for us to have his back.**_ [**Support Coach Tuberville today!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e4f898c46d1f4b27a2c818a46c7eb84d&_e=a2TzXGTF8jGbpEAR1aR7hr_rGswYJGwhyizxWXRfq_jtpqc8Wvo6m49IwOa4ZX59MhkG7vp2a-59enRWwISGJ81FxxpiwSEU4VL1K1fQWgv6gu30A9z8WwJ7qD5RqYMeYKK2DuzCCjLh3jBmdi_NCAhDlZ3feFATPYRJ6IBgJCMYZfLZgMYROwjsabp_LnT8fWtQF8cwMCbVg3q8KENLbXtouwHMu5-EcWqwf-TTg3iXzSS6Kum8Yydw087K9mOL) Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KepzC8NjGD10wZwM-dkO7g~~/AARclBA~/GfTUH3ysEjhzRvl8LFxueTFW7T4qmNHL4hDEBQFfUou7XTW4UJoOy9fB-aC8jJkLDfFwq5bmvhAgRhSL7LsQkMODIZEdUdq_RHpWLpSMnbbLmjFVNVr0zNn_OWZcPh7mewHZwQyfthLjz6IFf1M-ATlNH4TMlQgOqrjYkVlALvbkfV52G_foBj29GN2o-21rIccDIAa1eRLmZ9RS5aJnWnR6gjcNx1cLBekyQj0HFYDq5x5ShQVRImoCzNFsiLHP7GvMBctFoP36kP5k9RflSaSxEPmmKvzgMNw9wEQ2c88~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KepzC8NjGD10wZwM-dkO7g~~/AARclBA~/GfTUH3ysEjhzRvl8LFxueTFW7T4qmNHL4hDEBQFfUou7XTW4UJoOy9fB-aC8jJkLDfFwq5bmvhAgRhSL7LsQkMODIZEdUdq_RHpWLpSMnbbLmjFVNVr0zNn_OWZcPh7mewHZwQyfthLjz6IFf1M-ATlNH4TMlQgOqrjYkVlALvbkfV52G_foBj29GN2o-21rIccDIAa1eRLmZ9RS5aJnWnR6gjcNx1cLBekyQj0HFYDq5x5ShQVRImoCzNFsiLHP7GvMBctFoP36kP5k9RflSaSxEPmmKvzgMNw9wEQ2c88~)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KepzC8NjGD10wZwM-dkO7g~~/AARclBA~/GfTUH3ysEjhzRvl8LFxueTFW7T4qmNHL4hDEBQFfUou7XTW4UJoOy9fB-aC8jJkLDfFwq5bmvhAgRhSL7LsQkMODIZEdUdq_RHpWLpSMnbbLmjFVNVr0zNn_OWZcPh7mewHZwQyfthLjz6IFf1M-ATlNH4TMlQgOqrjYkVlALvbkfV52G_foBj29GN2o-21rIccDIAa1eRLmZ9RS5aJnWnR6gjcNx1cLBekyQj0HFYDq5x5ShQVRImoCzNFsiLHP7GvMBctFoP36kP5k9RflSaSxEPmmKvzgMNw9wEQ2c88~)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6u50-6Kf8ABkvBN6X_4iqA~~/AARclBA~/xjyQPX_j0BL93sZAGI2zgFAgxbWy5ltDXrmb1YjwFT5zsaoZ7SkOtU_TYwHyH7RLrZgY5dI6bXXmbntfybUTNhtimNdngTkJdo20ZWFSk3-0XfixlFvqObIRSeWSj53x9J5ELXp2no43qvZUPkd4M1xsuK2kpIb5uHi4xYii1sLT_DaThqo8y_qr7FhYvt54ml8UJRe5ZDKcGF9g8MdoTA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6gIDzrCE8qcDmLi70ZgDNw~~/AARclBA~/R4d90PwPw0Iy10e9ePhR77WRZXIUeO0vpo6nXl7yHV6_DPO0ACRjZAw29KrDkVtHdFO6mRiaoh4xos2DLhq92vG0ANy4bWayDa39QZ2HH9hWH71Rm1kpnNh35OoPlcTVv6ljaucHnTbXSivGi712VA~~)_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SdO_CjiqFbzaILqLHC8etQ~~/AARclBA~/fajalZz2qQSBguHiH4PFRJROEOWfYv23n6Kjir2MNE0CNWHeyrCMkMbVRKmydVjgX1g_DAApKJTFYKNpAOA3Q27U2Lub4JhY3f9H95lRUsKIpqL-soDE7j0222dJPFU5L2KGNdsE0RileHvXOQAMXECWy9kwW7R8v-0rx4eHZKcBUIemgluYmD3rGmTnUtRENuz0JPNPfhk3L-RGw_I8WUxRYJwzi22XuoN1hT1I025NWi5ca6_6wD4gEH13QQk0pKg_uxDRP1uq39_Ra_0pzgfevVIi__HalXQftYYzvcY~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SdO_CjiqFbzaILqLHC8etQ~~/AARclBA~/fajalZz2qQSBguHiH4PFRJROEOWfYv23n6Kjir2MNE0CNWHeyrCMkMbVRKmydVjgX1g_DAApKJTFYKNpAOA3Q27U2Lub4JhY3f9H95lRUsKIpqL-soDE7j0222dJPFU5L2KGNdsE0RileHvXOQAMXECWy9kwW7R8v-0rx4eHZKcBUIemgluYmD3rGmTnUtRENuz0JPNPfhk3L-RGw_I8WUxRYJwzi22XuoN1hT1I025NWi5ca6_6wD4gEH13QQk0pKg_uxDRP1uq39_Ra_0pzgfevVIi__HalXQftYYzvcY~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SdO_CjiqFbzaILqLHC8etQ~~/AARclBA~/fajalZz2qQSBguHiH4PFRJROEOWfYv23n6Kjir2MNE0CNWHeyrCMkMbVRKmydVjgX1g_DAApKJTFYKNpAOA3Q27U2Lub4JhY3f9H95lRUsKIpqL-soDE7j0222dJPFU5L2KGNdsE0RileHvXOQAMXECWy9kwW7R8v-0rx4eHZKcBUIemgluYmD3rGmTnUtRENuz0JPNPfhk3L-RGw_I8WUxRYJwzi22XuoN1hT1I025NWi5ca6_6wD4gEH13QQk0pKg_uxDRP1uq39_Ra_0pzgfevVIi__HalXQftYYzvcY~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SdO_CjiqFbzaILqLHC8etQ~~/AARclBA~/fajalZz2qQSBguHiH4PFRJROEOWfYv23n6Kjir2MNE0CNWHeyrCMkMbVRKmydVjgX1g_DAApKJTFYKNpAOA3Q27U2Lub4JhY3f9H95lRUsKIpqL-soDE7j0222dJPFU5L2KGNdsE0RileHvXOQAMXECWy9kwW7R8v-0rx4eHZKcBUIemgluYmD3rGmTnUtRENuz0JPNPfhk3L-RGw_I8WUxRYJwzi22XuoN1hT1I025NWi5ca6_6wD4gEH13QQk0pKg_uxDRP1uq39_Ra_0pzgfevVIi__HalXQftYYzvcY~)
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VQKHjN_PYBNeGLNPEidt-w~~/AARclBA~/Gk4pNFNDyHUhJ28W9lSSUZlrMb5j1CT7EH3be6a-aRNm7XXYBxfUrM9eCGWoijPexoux1YMK_dwkzgq-WQUx_WZcw5Z0Zplo9rwQVBLEcHkEop0PrbwVKSRtNtyIWGmvWJ3zplwzy9vAL6XQu2-2lwqctclMQ1rkGE3jKBOjubuCR2_d_HKEe6xl0WQwhU1u6zkhEcAzgWSXAXCvfHjMrbxo-MZ0j8q0tmOvT0qZJug~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_V3VAGHLp21L2W6TVq7CtQ~~/AARclBA~/ad7lsPzIHNLhR3EfAy3jazZzi61FMWInOwrk0nEO8SmBVDrq0KtNh_uUbPH41UYzrOkdpkagQbK8skbUkXIzFrBaY0MAzAGupAcBHwoGB3yntmXRmrDkc5QUBlZI4TcvtcdVjgb9noecP4w9rfBB9A~~)_

subject: URGENT: Minnesota's Democrat Leaders Defiy President Trump
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQm_ABGIy40AggmdMtxpBE1X-n3unIlG9GabKiUD43jedxm99uIpOzfZfNYRo)

Minnesota's Democrat leaders are openly defying President Trump's directives on immigration enforcement, jeopardizing the safety of our communities.
Governor Tim Walz has enacted policies that hinder cooperation with federal immigration authorities, effectively turning Minnesota into a sanctuary for illegal immigrants.
This defiance not only undermines federal efforts to secure our borders but also places Minnesotans at increased risk.
We cannot stand idly by as our state's Democrat leaders prioritize political agenda over the well-being of Minnesotans. It's important that we take immediate action to support policies that uphold the rule of law and ensure the safety of our communities. **[So please make a contribution to help hold Minnesota Democrat leaders accountable for their defiance of President Trump’s immigration plan.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQm_ABGIy40AggmdMtxpBE1X-n3unIlG9GabKiUD43jedxm99uIpOzfZfNYRo)**********

I'm sharing a letter I received today from the president of the American Meteorological Society, an organization I've been a part of for nearly 15 years.
Dear AMS community,
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fXT_l90TktGgR_jdbHKPTZv3bcPCkJ-_XKIjRtXM0fg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156679746)
In recent weeks the new administration has been rolling out executive orders that directly impact the public sector component of the weather and climate enterprise and are already reaching into the other sectors. The depth of these changes is unclear, but it seems apparent that the weather and climate enterprise we know today will not be the same tomorrow.
Our community has worked diligently and constructively over several decades to delineate the roles played by the private, public, non-profit and academic sectors in service to our nation. The goal has been to increase the effectiveness of the weather and climate enterprise, taking advantage of the strengths of each sector and building synergies across sectors. The result of these partnerships has been impressive, providing a very large return on public investment by all measures that I have seen. In addition to advancing foundational science that is critical to weather forecasting, we provide essential services that the public relies upon to stay safe, that businesses rely upon for their economic health and security, that guide future investments across large portions of the economy, and that educate future leaders.
Communication with our elected representatives is crucial right now. We all have a voice, and we are stronger together than apart. AMS is working with other scientific societies to amplify our voice about the importance of science and our community's role in service to the nation. At this critical juncture, I urge you to contact your elected representatives in the U.S. House and Senate and share your perspectives on our successes and their importance to our country.
Whichever sector you work in, you are a valued and integral part of the weather and climate enterprise and you should be proud of all that we have accomplished. The work we do is a vital part of our nation's infrastructure and contributes to its security and prosperity.
David Stensrud
2025 AMS President
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

The Electoral College is a dangerous loophole that opponents of voting rights can exploit to override the will of the people. And with everything that's going on it's only going to get worse.
RUSH $25 or more to protect our democracy by ending the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=020725_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020725_1&amount=25]
WPRI: Movement seeks to remove Electoral College, elect president by popular vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=020725_1&amount=25]
It’s simple, folks. Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. Chip in $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=020725_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A climate of fear
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723496/526865568/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=)
I want to share a story that I feel is instructive at this moment. Like any trustworthy neighborhood meteorologist, I have friends at the National Weather Service (NWS). And what I’m hearing is deeply concerning. People who’ve dedicated their lives to keeping us safe are radio silent right now, out of fear – fear of losing their jobs, or worse. The current administration’s anti-science, anti-climate bullying has some of the most talented experts in the world trying to find alternative ways to communicate with each other, because anything in writing might be weaponized against them and their lifelong mission. When the truth is silenced, when our best public servants have to deny reality or face retribution, we’re acting no better than the most anti-democratic, third world countries. **Think about this, Peter: we’re not just losing time that could have been spent innovating and leading in climate science, something we’ve proudly done for decades, but basic services – like alerting the public ahead of major storms – are being crippled out of fear.** **This is a five-star alarm, and it’s important that we not look away while this is happening.** We absolutely have to flip the House to secure a majority that will protect our safety and act on climate, but until we have that chance we have to use these next two years amplifying these acts of terror being committed on the public servants who commit their lives to a better America. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign on today to commit to continue mobilizing against Trump’s attack on climate science. Everything from our home insurance prices to our neighbor’s safety depends on it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723500/526865569/413780487?refcode=em-2.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=&emci=4edcd89c-c1e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9127f102-6ee5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) | [Sign on – Protect Climate Scientists](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723501/526865572/413780487?refcode=em-2.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=&emci=4edcd89c-c1e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9127f102-6ee5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858)
---
As long as we stick together we will prevail, Peter.
-Eric
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723504/526865573/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=&emci=4edcd89c-c1e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9127f102-6ee5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723507/526865578/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=&emci=4edcd89c-c1e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9127f102-6ee5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723511/526865581/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=&emci=4edcd89c-c1e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9127f102-6ee5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101723512/526865583/1514584251?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI3ZjEwMi02ZWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXY0svlUqf-rrkLsHL-G87d2Uj1ccLswHJ5pbSmGXaw=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://act.ericforillinois.com/p/uulxx7KmPEOHzSyNB6xzow2?unsubscribedata=koQr3uODwkqHSRxIWh3Cx18QtEZNHKAcvyClhCYFvShVr6xVUaNn9viAn7g94cu%2BnUgaEsNK4GaOYPtavmWo5MebH0cZYRdfh61rpIMxZsWbEkCSJ1eb8WQy7qiBIpgh4Tpkv000dQuLLI3Jv7YwDGgXVbGTugWJDg%2BAfkd%2BpblQC1OOXQB4i8hPZW7OzWt1TzIscPQkNlW0%2FR%2BfA%2Flrocctsi1rKHwmm12P1zp8qy4dQSl1pV5EXdKyw8QMJp9RZYq9sIFhuOHcZyx27xgojQqsKMMgiD7xxNhvibbVC3bfP4KIzc7WZlcaRNXEXKFkLyd2sS0rRzMKOsGDnFNXSHMZQH8lzeQ1W5AlsBIpVNYqBGZcF636womCbsTzFf%2FXvve6oZ4pDfAA%2BEf61ZgUq%2FsKs%2Bv1EcV%2B%2B7VtNZtpE29MioDMzO8q6O9w7mBqW%2FuJ). Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen
Eric Sorensen for Illinois
P.O. Box 1172
Moline, IL 61265

name: Chris Murphy
subject: What's happening with USAID: -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Team -

Elon Musk announced on Twitter late Sunday night that he and Donald Trump were shutting down USAID. Then Trump made it official and put Secretary of State Rubio in charge of USAID.

Let that sink in: The richest man in the world, who was not elected to anything and does not hold a Senate-confirmed job, took to the website he owns to set U.S. foreign policy that would spell global catastrophe.

This comes after days of rumors from the Trump Administration that they were trying to move USAID under the State Department. Aid programs everywhere have been closed. They took down the USAID website entirely over the weekend, and USAID employees woke up Monday to emails telling them not to report to the office for work.

It's hard to overhype how dangerous this moment is. This is a naked attempt to seize government by the right-wing billionaire class so they can steal from the American people. That's why I showed up outside of USAID to fight back and rally public opposition to this coup.

**My colleagues in the Senate and I will continue working to stop Trump and Elon Musk's takeover.[We will continue to fight for you everyday, but we could do so much more if we elect more Democrats to fight alongside us. So I have to ask: Will you split a $5 donation between me and the DSCC to help defeat MAGA Republicans for years to come?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21056?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250207-ChrisMurphy-MurphyUSAIDMuskTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250207-ChrisMurphy-MurphyUSAIDMuskTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=19559%2E9716520%2E0805uU)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21056?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250207-ChrisMurphy-MurphyUSAIDMuskTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250207-ChrisMurphy-MurphyUSAIDMuskTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=19559%2E9716520%2E0805uU)
---

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21056?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250207-ChrisMurphy-MurphyUSAIDMuskTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250207-ChrisMurphy-MurphyUSAIDMuskTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=19559%2E9716520%2E0805uU)
Trump and Elon Musk do not have the authority for any of this. USAID is by law an independent agency funded by Congress.

These people are trying to destroy U.S. power in the world with wildly unhinged allegations and you have to ask why this benefits them. Well just look at who is cheering it on: China and Russia. What will Moscow and Beijing give Musk and Trump if we hand the world to them? We know Elon Musk makes a ton of money in China, and Trump feels he owes him for buying the election — and whoever else is buying all of the secret Trump meme coin to build Trump's wealth.

It all feels so corrupt because it is.

I am doing everything I can to get to the truth of what's happening and shine a light on everything. We cannot roll over. We have to fight — pull every lever of power at our hands, and I need you to join me and make noise too. We know what happens to democracies and governments when people choose to stay silent out of fear.

So I'm asking you to send a message that you have my back and to make sure we have the resources to take back power from Republicans who refuse to stand up:

clean_body: | | | Team - Elon Musk announced on Twitter late Sunday night that he and Donald Trump were shutting down USAID. Then Trump made it official and put Secretary of State Rubio in charge of USAID. Let that sink in: The richest man in the world, who was not elected to anything and does not hold a Senate-confirmed job, took to the website he owns to set U.S. foreign policy that would spell global catastrophe. This comes after days of rumors from the Trump Administration that they were trying to move USAID under the State Department. Aid programs everywhere have been closed. They took down the USAID website entirely over the weekend, and USAID employees woke up Monday to emails telling them not to report to the office for work. It's hard to overhype how dangerous this moment is. This is a naked attempt to seize government by the right-wing billionaire class so they can steal from the American people. That's why I showed up outside of USAID to fight back and rally public opposition to this coup. My colleagues in the Senate and I will continue working to stop Trump and Elon Musk's takeover. | | Trump and Elon Musk do not have the authority for any of this. USAID is by law an independent agency funded by Congress. These people are trying to destroy U.S. power in the world with wildly unhinged allegations and you have to ask why this benefits them. Well just look at who is cheering it on: China and Russia. What will Moscow and Beijing give Musk and Trump if we hand the world to them? We know Elon Musk makes a ton of money in China, and Trump feels he owes him for buying the election — and whoever else is buying all of the secret Trump meme coin to build Trump's wealth. It all feels so corrupt because it is. I am doing everything I can to get to the truth of what's happening and shine a light on everything. We cannot roll over. We have to fight — pull every lever of power at our hands, and I need you to join me and make noise too. We know what happens to democracies and governments when people choose to stay silent out of fear. So I'm asking you to send a message that you have my back and to make sure we have the resources to take back power from Republicans who refuse to stand up: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Friends of Chris Murphy and the DSCC. | | | | Every best wish, Chris Murphy U.S. Senator, Connecticut | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. We talk a lot about [#WhyCourtsMatter](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yim5GHuJnsPLzNGeudYjaJJpBnsfwlPPqX-2FpYEIyARkeApFpH3Qn7SWitJUmGekPeOwLG-2FPYij3G4uMfiQZ-2Bh12m-2FtDzlPHzpxnOOEMTFXS7oHORDX5fJhkzNN3NGlsE0pmf5p1hHUqdTPSPjLkBYOC37OiLjQa2g-2BpmY3bAbQ-2FJv7j4u94-2FQTZd1DqozdxjoWilpY-2FGdXN5KaEONzGSZqtnidM6iUIrNug0xK0t-2Bk-2FpHL50aF2IzWNPMjwnrrWM9PdozAmf-2BgoSN09Lmk3T-2FwWxXL77jcFLIpcWcyqC3yn-2F6hrVwd1mBoW7xQfpiYrQYzF6UINEwWSvFCyTd2BeHk7IJRxnaguD-2Beq-2Bj7ki-2FvenmC7g_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY0dKCak2fESVQcf1yBjLI69EUPWP7O45-2FBDoVADGWgArIZBnRfHlC6Qbod0Mn5hJdWpl8vca1HebuF9jxr8f9alXAQZLMB-2FEU65gLtP41u0nZUZmBO0xw8EyrAhpbab-2BxV1Gp2-2F4-2FG1-2FwbGoaIu1r91LwLe-2BrKIvlNDJRNKVP43kybsJechy2O55c7XxR5jss) around here, and how they affect your rights and freedoms. During this black history month, we want to highlight one of the most important cases for our cause: Brown v. Board of Education. The landmark 1954 Supreme Court Case declared state-sponsored segregation in public schools **unconstitutional**. The Supreme Court ruled that segregation in schools violated the Equal Protection Clause of the 14th Amendment, which guarantees equal rights to all citizens. The case was argued and won by **Thurgood Marshall** , who in October of 1967 became the first African American Supreme Court Justice. This decision was a major victory for human rights, the Civil Rights Movement and also helped pave the way for desegregation in schools and other public places. clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! As Tom Nichols writes in his op-ed for The Atlantic Daily, "Americans who care about democracy have every right to feel appalled and frightened. But then they have work to do." We need to stay inspired. This year our work is more important than ever. In our hands we have the power to help shape our country and preserve democracy. Local, municipal and judicial elections are going to be critical as they are the last line of defense.Let's affect change on the ground by making sure our courts and local elected officials remain impartial. The work we do matters!#CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin | | | | | | | | Why Courts Matter: 301 Thursday February 27th 6:30-8:00PM Online via Zoom How do the courts affect our rights and freedoms? Why should we be involved in judicial elections? We will be hosting our third virtual town hall alongside Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania , focusing on the importance of our federal courts and the role elected officials play in nominating and confirming judges. | | | | | We talk a lot about around here, and how they affect your rights and freedoms. During this black history month, we want to highlight one of the most important cases for our cause: Brown v. Board of Education. The landmark 1954 Supreme Court Case declared state-sponsored segregation in public schools unconstitutional. The Supreme Court ruled that segregation in schools violated the Equal Protection Clause of the 14th Amendment, which guarantees equal rights to all citizens. The case was argued and won by Thurgood Marshall , who in October of 1967 became the first African American Supreme Court Justice. This decision was a major victory for human rights, the Civil Rights Movement and also helped pave the way for desegregation in schools and other public places. | | | | | | | "RNC asks SCOTUS to restrict provisional voting in Pennsylvania Using the radical independent state legislature theory, the Republican National Committee asked the U.S. Supreme Court to reverse a Pennsylvania Supreme Court decision that allows voters to cast provisional ballots if their mail-in ballots were rejected." "An appellate court in New York a lower court overturning the state’s John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act (NYVRA) — a law that grants voters additional protections not covered by federal law.The four-judge panel ruled unanimously that Newburgh, New York, failed to show how remedying vote dilution in accordance with the NYVRA would violate the 14th Amendment’s Equal Protection Clause." "The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is from accessing sensitive Department of Labor (DOL) data and access to its systems — thanks to an agreement with the federal government until a judge hears the case Friday." | | | "Shortly after the new U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi was sworn in Wednesday, Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger (R) asked her to drop the Department of Justice’s (DOJ) lawsuit challenging the state’s 2021 voter suppression law, S.B. 202. Raffensperger also asked newly minted Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem for greater access to immigration data to verify voter registrations a day earlier." "The state has been trying since 2019 to upgrade the Statewide Uniform Registry of Electors, or SURE, a database of the state’s voters that was built in the early 2000s and still undergirds many of the functions of running elections. Local election officials complain that the system is outdated, has a tendency to crash, and requires complex workarounds for some processes." "Counties that allow mail voters to fix errors that could otherwise get their ballots disqualified rejected fewer ballots during the 2024 general election, a Votebeat and Spotlight PA analysis has found." | | | Staff members of the affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF), continue to provide voters with civic education.Pennsylvanians have a lot of questions regarding the many confusing executive orders they're seeing on the news. One of the ways NPPEF helps reduce this confusion is by uplifting Michael Coard's " Capital rally in Harrisburg | | | | | Dauphin County | | | | | | Strawberry Square in Harrisburg Allegheny County Re-entry support event in Homewood. Lancaster County Crispus Attucks | | | "Newly inaugurated Attorney General Pam Bondi ordered the defunding of jurisdictions that refuse to cooperate with federal immigration authorities Wednesday — potentially cutting off a significant money source for New York... Other sanctuary states include California and Connecticut — while major cities such as Chicago, Philadelphia and Washington, DC, also have such policies." "While deportations are not new under U.S. presidents from either major party — Democrats Bill Clinton and Barack Obama both had high numbers of returns and removals during their terms — Trump has already made significant changes to the way in which they can be carried out after a series of executive orders. These include rescinding “protected areas” like schools and hospitals from enforcement actions." "Today, roughly 4.5 million people use Medicaid-funded HCBS as an alternative to institutionalization; the waivers help pay for home healthcare workers, durable medical equipment, career coaching, case management and other services. No one claims that the program is perfect—but most criticism has come on the basis of shortfalls, not overspending. More than half a million disabled people remain on waitlists for HCBS." | We need to hear from you | | | All of us know democracy works best when it works for everyone. That is why we want to hear about the issues you care about the most in 2025. If you haven't done so yet, please, take a couple minutes to let us know how we can continue to empower our communities to get out and vote in ALL elections! | | | Last day to register to vote for the Primary Election: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Gay Valimont
subject: My Opponent is Just Another Trump Fan
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**My opponent is riding the MAGA train, and is desperately trying to please the Right rather than focus on the people of District 1.** Greetings from Gay Valimont. I am running for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, and **need your help ASAP.** Recent reports indicate that my opponent and Chief Financial Officer of Florida, Jimmy Patronis, has pledged to join the Delivering Outstanding Government Efficiency (DOGE) Caucus if elected to Congress. This caucus, formed after Trump's appointment of tech entrepreneurs Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the planned Department of Government Efficiency, aims to identify ways to cut costs and regulations within the federal government, **and has done nothing but eliminate other key jobs within our government, all while pushing their personal agendas. **
---
---
Patronis has expressed admiration for Musk's approach to business and innovation, and this kind of favoritism CANNOT EXIST if we are to have an efficient government for the people, by the people. Securing the support of people like you, real Americans, can eliminate such alliances and the potential impact they have on our communities. We must remain vigilant in advocating for policies that prioritize the well-being of all citizens. **Supporting Patronis is supporting another politician looking to cut down on public goods in order to line their pockets. Special elections are just around the corner, and I need your help.**
---
**[Join us today to ensure my MAGA-head opponent does not get into power, and gets special treatment when he least deserves it. clean_body: | | | My opponent is riding the MAGA train, and is desperately trying to please the Right rather than focus on the people of District 1. Greetings from Gay Valimont. I am running for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, and need your help ASAP. Recent reports indicate that my opponent and Chief Financial Officer of Florida, Jimmy Patronis, has pledged to join the Delivering Outstanding Government Efficiency (DOGE) Caucus if elected to Congress. This caucus, formed after Trump's appointment of tech entrepreneurs Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the planned Department of Government Efficiency, aims to identify ways to cut costs and regulations within the federal government, and has done nothing but eliminate other key jobs within our government, all while pushing their personal agendas. Patronis has expressed admiration for Musk's approach to business and innovation, and this kind of favoritism CANNOT EXIST if we are to have an efficient government for the people, by the people. Securing the support of people like you, real Americans, can eliminate such alliances and the potential impact they have on our communities. We must remain vigilant in advocating for policies that prioritize the well-being of all citizens. Supporting Patronis is supporting another politician looking to cut down on public goods in order to line their pockets. Special elections are just around the corner, and I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Don’t allow another Trump fanatic to take office. Help today to ensure Patronis does not go through with his plans tomorrow. Thank you for your continued support and commitment to our cause. Sincerely,Gay Valimont | | | | | Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress PO Box 1258 Gulf Breeze, FL 32562 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Action Alert (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Support the lawsuits against Elon Musk and his “Department of Government Efficiency”
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Why the hell is no one stopping Elon Musk? Actually, THESE people ARE, and we need to show our support](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d1610a8-8b32-43a8-8315-97c8494e364e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2759c2a6-4836-474e-ba96-dd375e36decd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Right-wing billionaire Elon Musk is trying to dismantle our government from within, giving his team of tech bros access to Treasury payment systems and the private information and data of millions of Americans. No one elected Elon Musk, and yet he's been elevated to this position of power by Donald Trump to cut critical programs that Americans rely on, just to help himself and his fellow billionaires. He must be stopped. Thankfully, there is a lawsuit in a DC federal court against Musk and his "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE) which has temporarily halted millions of records from being turned over to them. We need to show our support for this lawsuit and any others targeting Musk and DOGE to stop them from infiltrating and destroying our government. **The courts may well be the last guardrail keeping Trump from destroying our democracy.** [**Sign your name: Support the lawsuits against Elon Musk and his "Department of Government Efficiency" >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48c6fda3-ee94-4e4b-9fc5-8112cf1621af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Right-wing billionaire Elon Musk is trying to dismantle our government from within, giving his team of tech bros access to Treasury payment systems and the private information and data of millions of Americans. No one elected Elon Musk, and yet he's been elevated to this position of power by Donald Trump to cut critical programs that Americans rely on, just to help himself and his fellow billionaires. He must be stopped. Thankfully, there is a lawsuit in a DC federal court against Musk and his "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE) which has temporarily halted millions of records from being turned over to them. We need to show our support for this lawsuit and any others targeting Musk and DOGE to stop them from infiltrating and destroying our government. The courts may well be the last guardrail keeping Trump from destroying our democracy. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

body:
Trump gave Musk unchecked power. We need to act now.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101725567/526870261/1328794144?refcode=ea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZWJlMjA4LTcwZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LnoS5aU-X7fpf4NiNVIHZC2RjA5jomsjLAmcNf8dbtY=&emci=2bec6c2f-d2e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)

Elon Musk has never been elected to public office. He’s never been confirmed by the Senate for any government position. Yet in a matter of days, he gained access to sensitive government databases — including the Treasury Department’s payment system — and is already using his unchecked power to gut key federal agencies. This isn’t just corruption. It’s a full-scale takeover. And Trump is letting it happen. We can’t let two billionaires turn our democracy into their personal empire. **[Read our urgent message below and add your name to demand Musk’s removal from the Trump administration immediately.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101725569/526870262/-642596121?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4%26ms%3Dea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=ea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZWJlMjA4LTcwZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LnoS5aU-X7fpf4NiNVIHZC2RjA5jomsjLAmcNf8dbtY=&emci=2bec6c2f-d2e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101725571/526870263/-642596121?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4%26ms%3Dea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=ea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZWJlMjA4LTcwZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LnoS5aU-X7fpf4NiNVIHZC2RjA5jomsjLAmcNf8dbtY=&emci=2bec6c2f-d2e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9debe208-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)

> We need to talk about Elon Musk.
> As you know, Trump tapped the richest man in the world to lead the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) — a position that gives him massive influence over federal programs, with no formal oversight or accountability.
> **This is the same Elon Musk who made a Nazi salute at Trump’s inauguration celebration. The same Elon Musk who criticized Germany's commitment to Holocaust education and called for the country to “move beyond” guilt over its Nazi past. And the same Elon Musk who turned X into a breeding ground for antisemitism and far-right extremism.**
> Musk will use his position to gut government-backed programs while fast-tracking his extremist agenda. As Trump’s handpicked “efficiency czar,” he’d have the power to strip regulations that get in the way of his business empire and funnel even more profits to Trump and their billionaire allies.
> Let’s be real, **Trump is installing Musk to help carry out his ultimate goal to slash government agencies, fire thousands of public servants, and consolidate power for himself and his cronies.**
> Think about it — the richest man on Earth helping the most corrupt president in history will turn our government into their personal ATM. That’s not democracy. That’s a full-blown oligarchy in the making. We can’t let this happen.
> **[That’s why we’re joining forces with a coalition of organizations to demand accountability, but we need your voice in this fight.
