clean_body: Trump gave Musk unchecked power. We need to act now. | Elon Musk has never been elected to public office. He’s never been confirmed by the Senate for any government position. Yet in a matter of days, he gained access to sensitive government databases — including the Treasury Department’s payment system — and is already using his unchecked power to gut key federal agencies. This isn’t just corruption. It’s a full-scale takeover. And Trump is letting it happen. We can’t let two billionaires turn our democracy into their personal empire. | It’s now or never. — Team JanePAC Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: JanePAC Date: Feb 3, 2025 Subject: ✏️ Sign on: Demand Elon Musk’s removal from the Trump administration | --- We need to talk about Elon Musk. As you know, Trump tapped the richest man in the world to lead the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) — a position that gives him massive influence over federal programs, with no formal oversight or accountability. This is the same Elon Musk who made a Nazi salute at Trump’s inauguration celebration. The same Elon Musk who criticized Germany's commitment to Holocaust education and called for the country to “move beyond” guilt over its Nazi past. And the same Elon Musk who turned X into a breeding ground for antisemitism and far-right extremism. Musk will use his position to gut government-backed programs while fast-tracking his extremist agenda. As Trump’s handpicked “efficiency czar,” he’d have the power to strip regulations that get in the way of his business empire and funnel even more profits to Trump and their billionaire allies. Let’s be real, Trump is installing Musk to help carry out his ultimate goal to slash government agencies, fire thousands of public servants, and consolidate power for himself and his cronies. Think about it — the richest man on Earth helping the most corrupt president in history will turn our government into their personal ATM. That’s not democracy. That’s a full-blown oligarchy in the making. We can’t let this happen. --- Thank you for making your voice heard. – Team JanePAC P.S. If you’re tired of Musk’s nonsense, we’ve got good news — he’s not on Bluesky. Follow us there: | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101725791/526870637/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.07_FreezeStories_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4MzhhNC03MGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vup4c01MB13Fwl0SyedpJfxvdGAgqkbX5f-WNwfZyJE=&emci=474d396c-a5e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eea838a4-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Last week, the Trump administration tried to freeze support for all federal grants and loans — an illegal action that affects everything from Medicaid and Head Start to Pell Grants and rental assistance. Many of you spoke out, and a federal judge halted the freeze. But I’ve heard from folks in the 6th District reeling from Trump’s order: Websites are not working, support groups cannot access the funds they need for payroll, and struggling families are bracing for the next drastic policy shift. [_**If you or someone you know has been impacted by Trump’s funding freeze, please click here and share your story with us →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101725792/526870638/598682061?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.07_FreezeStories_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4MzhhNC03MGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vup4c01MB13Fwl0SyedpJfxvdGAgqkbX5f-WNwfZyJE=&emci=474d396c-a5e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eea838a4-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101725793/526870639/598682061?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.07_FreezeStories_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4MzhhNC03MGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vup4c01MB13Fwl0SyedpJfxvdGAgqkbX5f-WNwfZyJE=&emci=474d396c-a5e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eea838a4-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) **_[I hear your fear and frustration](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101725794/526870640/-578772061?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.07_FreezeStories_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4MzhhNC03MGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vup4c01MB13Fwl0SyedpJfxvdGAgqkbX5f-WNwfZyJE=&emci=474d396c-a5e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eea838a4-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442)_** that your elected leaders aren’t taking action fast enough. The actions that can be taken most rapidly are lawsuits, which we’re seeing from state attorneys general and groups like the ACLU. Our committee leaders are coordinating with outside efforts wherever possible. My colleagues and I are working on legislation to address the Trump administration’s actions as quickly as possible. This week, we will be sharing stories on the House floor from our constituents — like you — to tangibly show how Trump’s actions are disrupting our lives. **The more stories we have from people who have been personally affected by the freeze or the mass confusion and chaos it caused, the stronger our arguments can be.** [_**Please share your story of how Trump’s federal funding freeze has impacted you or your business →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101725795/526870641/598682061?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.07_FreezeStories_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4MzhhNC03MGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vup4c01MB13Fwl0SyedpJfxvdGAgqkbX5f-WNwfZyJE=&emci=474d396c-a5e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eea838a4-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101725796/526870642/598682061?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.07_FreezeStories_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4MzhhNC03MGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vup4c01MB13Fwl0SyedpJfxvdGAgqkbX5f-WNwfZyJE=&emci=474d396c-a5e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eea838a4-70e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) The bottom line is that House Democrats are taking all available actions to stop this freeze and protect programs that help working families. Trump, Musk, and MAGA Republicans want to cut programs like Medicaid to pay for tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. It’s disgusting and unconscionable, and we need to use every tool in our toolbox to fight back. Thank you so much for everything you do. — Emily

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Standing up to crooks and bullies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8288%2E5257348%2EvcbCJI ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, we’ve
heard from people all over who are desperately worried about their future.

From residents in the Central Valley, wondering where they can find
healthcare for a sick child if the only rural healthcare center in the
community loses its funding.

From federal employees, trying to figure out how they’ll pay rent in a few
weeks if they’re laid off.

From people around the world, wondering where their next meal will come
from after humanitarian help is withdrawn. Wondering why their long-time
ally is abandoning them in their time of most need.

The Trump Administration has turned our lives into a series of question
marks — sowing chaos and confusion at the expense of lives and
livelihoods.

That’s why I spoke out on the floor of the Senate this week to hold up
Trump’s nominations for key federal agencies. I’m calling out the
administration for their unconstitutional executive orders and memos, for
their chaos.

For Trump, Elon Musk, and their cronies, the cruelty and chaos is the
point. They want to distract us from what they’re doing — highway robbery
of federal resources for their personal enrichment and gain.

I won’t let them. I’ve made it my life’s work to stand up to crooks and
bullies, and I’m not stopping anytime soon.

We need to speak out and make sure voters across this country know exactly
what’s going on.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250207_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=8288%2E5257348%2EvcbCJI ]That’s what I plan on doing, and I hope you’ll pitch in
$10 or
anything you can to help amplify this message to voters: Donald Trump
doesn’t care about you, and he never will. He will tear this country and
our government apart if it will enrich and empower him further unless we
stop this assault on our democracy. And we will.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q12025_abs_em.UcG9Ic&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250207_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=8288%2E5257348%2EvcbCJI ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

Adam

body:
---
Derek, it’s David Hogg. Last weekend, I was honored to be elected DNC vice chair. This is a huge win for our movement to strengthen our Party’s outreach and engagement with young voters and build the next generation of leadership. 💪 [**If you’re as ready to get to work as I am, I hope you’ll make a $3 contribution to help us build the resources we’ll need to build the strong Party we need:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250207_2725_fr&refcode2=2735_22930333_988KV_&akid=2735%2E22930333%2E988KV_) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250207_2725_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2735_22930333_988KV_&akid=2735%2E22930333%2E988KV_)** After Parkland, our country was in a similar moment — we had a Republican trifecta in Washington, and countless pollsters, pundits, and consultants told us that we as young people weren’t going to be able to make any change. But guess what? We didn't listen to them. We took on the NRA, _and we won._ We raised the age to buy a gun in Florida to 21 and passed a red flag law that's been used over 19,000 times; a law that has been so popular not even Ron DeSantis has been able to repeal it. We got Republicans on the defense because we went on the offense. **So now, I’m asking you, Derek: Are you ready to go on the offense?** We have to win back young people. We must show them that we care about them and that we will invest in them. We need generational change — and we need to support the emerging leaders who are making that happen. [**I’m excited to help build a new and improved Democratic Party focused on engaging young voters. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider chipping in today to help fund this work:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250207_2725_fr&refcode2=2735_22930333_988KV_&akid=2735%2E22930333%2E988KV_) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250207_2725_fr&refcode2=2735_22930333_988KV_&akid=2735%2E22930333%2E988KV_)**

name: Government Takeover via Our Revolution
subject: We MUST stop Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011?refcode=email-02072025_v&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

The UNELECTED richest man in the world is RACING to complete a full
government takeover. Bernie has called out Elon Musk’s illegal actions,
and the time to fight back is right now.

Musk is seizing payment systems that disburse trillions of dollars
annually – from Social Security to Medicare and Medicaid. He shut down
USAID by storming the office and locking employees out, all while
threatening that other departments will soon follow. It’s illegal plain
and simple – and protests are growing bigger on Capitol Hill to stop him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1061&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Stop Musk

And, Musk is doing all this WHILE STILL RUNNING companies with billions of
government contracts. It’s a massive conflict of interest, not to mention
a blatant, illegal seizure of Congress’s power.

Members of Congress and government employees are starting to mobilize to
stop him. As DOGE came for the Labor Department earlier this week,
protests kept them out of the building. But to have a shot at actually
stopping Musk’s takeover, we’re going to have to make this even bigger.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is working overtime, jamming phone
lines, organizing nationwide protests, and unleashing powerful lobbying
pushes to Congress. Will you rush a donation to help us stop Musk?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Musk and his team of loyalists are fanning out across the government,
gaining access to vast amounts of sensitive personal data. Nowhere (and no
one!) is safe. First it was the Treasury payment system...then this week it
was Medicare and Medicaid.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1060&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ][IMG]

He’s not stopping there. At last weekend's hostile takeover of USAID, two
top security officials were forced out after refusing to grant access to
the agency’s security systems and personnel files, including classified
information. Then, USAID’s website went dark while staff was put on leave
and locked out of their systems. Vital programs ground to a halt.

But there’s something Musk doesn’t want us to know. This crusade to
dismantle USAID comes months after it started a probe into Musk’s
Starlink.

It’s all part of a massively corrupt plan to allow billionaires to take
over our government. Musk’s companies rake in billions in federal
contracts, including a new mega-deal to build a network of hundreds of
U.S. spy satellites. And since election day, he’s become $154 BILLION
richer.

The public is starting to wake up and see what is happening, but it’s
going to take outcry from ALL of us to stop this takeover. Our Citizen
Action Team is leading the way, keeping up massive pressure on Congress to
shut Musk down and mobilizing the grassroots to raise the temperature so
much that Trump has no choice but to rein in Musk’s assault.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-02072025nd&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Can we count on you to chip in to help?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7672%2E5885482%2Ed9rGOh ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

name: Team NPPEF
subject: This is a human rights issue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
Team,

In an effort to ramp up mass deportations, the Trump administration rolled back restrictions, allowing ICE agents to arrest immigrants in places that were previously safeguarded, such as houses of worship, schools, and hospitals.

As stated in the BBC, undocumented people are scared to seek medical attention in hospitals, send their children to school, go to work, church, and more. President Trump has pledged to deport “millions and millions” of immigrants, and we are horrified by what we are seeing taking place in our communities.

It was reported that late last week, ICE agents showed up without a warrant at a Puerto Rican restaurant in Pennsylvania under the false assumption that people working there were undocumented. We are seeing these attacks happen across the nation.

To put it simply: this is a human rights issue.

Our thoughts are with immigrant communities as Trump deploys ICE to terrorize our neighbors across the country. The administration is working to instill fear across our nation, and it’s more important now than ever before that we have leaders in our state who are willing to stand up for what’s right.

There are critical local, municipal, and judicial elections happening in Pennsylvania this year. Help us ensure that voters understand their power and show up to the polls by pitching in $5 today.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nppef_24/?refcode=EM_F_250206rights_N_NPPEF_90DO_6_NG_N_PT

Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund supports our staff’s voter and community engagement efforts including; voter registration, civic education, organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.

Together,

Team NPPEF

The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making.

Will you support us with a contribution today?

DONATE NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nppef_24/?refcode=EM_F_250206rights_N_NPPEF_90DO_6_NG_N_PT
Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
New PA Project Education Fund
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381

clean_body: Team, In an effort to ramp up mass deportations, the Trump administration rolled back restrictions, allowing ICE agents to arrest immigrants in places that were previously safeguarded, such as houses of worship, schools, and hospitals. As stated in the BBC, undocumented people are scared to seek medical attention in hospitals, send their children to school, go to work, church, and more. President Trump has pledged to deport “millions and millions” of immigrants, and we are horrified by what we are seeing taking place in our communities. It was reported that late last week, ICE agents showed up without a warrant at a Puerto Rican restaurant in Pennsylvania under the false assumption that people working there were undocumented. We are seeing these attacks happen across the nation. To put it simply: this is a human rights issue. Our thoughts are with immigrant communities as Trump deploys ICE to terrorize our neighbors across the country. The administration is working to instill fear across our nation, and it’s more important now than ever before that we have leaders in our state who are willing to stand up for what’s right. There are critical local, municipal, and judicial elections happening in Pennsylvania this year. Help us ensure that voters understand their power and show up to the polls by pitching in $5 today. Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund supports our staff’s voter and community engagement efforts including; voter registration, civic education, organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. Together, Team NPPEF The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making. Will you support us with a contribution today? subject: The GOP is selling our environment to big oil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress

|

Peter — Yesterday I attended a rally with fellow Dems to protect the Environmental Protection Agency from the far-right and demand that Donald Trump and Elon Musk stop their assault on federal programs that keep our planet clean.

**Senator Ed Markey, Congressman Paul Tonko and I also asked to meet with DOGE — and were denied.** We later heard from employees that DOGE employees are already in the building. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101727942/526877152/1740130684?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250207_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjgwNTgwMi03NWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1XLZo4lWJVCvb2qg5HT44ESJRKpRH5VcYLvNXsUrSc=) Donald Trump began enacting his right-wing agenda on day one, pulling the United States out of the Paris Climate Agreement and doubling down U.S. investment in non-renewable resources.

I began my career working on the team that helped deliver the Paris Climate Agreement. I know all too well that our climate crisis is just that, a crisis that impacts everything from public health to national security.

Our communities are hotter than ever. In 2023, the Phoenix metro saw over 130 days that reached 100 degrees or warmer and **over 50 days where temperatures climbed over 110 degrees.**

The heat is unsafe and the more we ignore this crisis the more lives are at risk. In that same year, _**645 people across Maricopa County died from heat-related causes.**_

[**Dismantling the EPA means selling out our climate and our communities to Big Oil billionaires. ### Bondi makes clear that the "again" in MAGA refers to the period of Jim Crow America
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Feb 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156594978&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NTk0OTc4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODk0NzkwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzQxNTM5OTA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zWHP0hWiCDspwyIWX5_-Yc6b8B7urvunzD3Sfeav8jM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156594978&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NTk0OTc4LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg5NDc5MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0MTUzOTkwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.anffVe2S6grxHUx4FrOLr7NWgBpzO0gaIm5-sREufT4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156594978&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NTk0OTc4LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg5NDc5MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0MTUzOTkwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.anffVe2S6grxHUx4FrOLr7NWgBpzO0gaIm5-sREufT4)
---
| | [](https://substack..J_eNOb8GjqvPu_lWsOsWYKqiimRf2dThfgmnKvgq0o0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/ag-bondi-to-criminally-prosecute?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This week a contact at the DOJ sent me a dozen memos just been issued by new US Attorney General Pam Bondi. The memos, among a range of instructions, informed DOJ employees that the Department will criminally prosecute private entities that implement Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility (DEI/DEIA) policies. This is Project 2025 in action. This is fascism, plain and simple. And it will only get worse. **Let 's Address This.**
**Earnest Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join 112,000+ fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..9cVvxz6oUGUKx-sIiFea_WNX0KzsMq8AOUlMywUb0X4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156594978)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/089b0414-f27b-4c6b-8974-7c17459ddb9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump & then Florida AG Pam Bondi at the White House. [Credit: Getty]
## Weaponizing the DOJ Against Private Business
AG Pam Bondi was confirmed 54-46 after PA Democrat John Fetterman voted with Republicans in the Senate hearing. Bondi's barrage of memos to the entire DOJ read in part, "_Ending Illegal DEI and DEIA Discrimination and Preferences_." She frames this fascist strategy as "_fulfilling the Nation 's promise one quality for all Americans_," and then elaborates:
>
> By March 1, 2025, consistent with Executive Order 41713, the Civil Rights Division and the Office of Legal Policy shall jointly submit a report to the Associate Attorney General containing recommendations for enforcing federal civil-rights laws and taking other appropriate measure to encourage the private sector to end illegal discrimination and preferences, including policies related to DEI and DEIA. [The memo promises to] investigate, eliminate, and penalize DEI and DEIA policies.
And then to ensure she is explicitly clear about her fascism, Bondi defines what she means by "encourage...to end DEIA" as the following:

Strip federal funding from the private sector and educational institutions, bring civil lawsuits, and bring criminal investigations.
Bondi provides no legal argument, no legal theory, and no practical example as to what crime has been committed that she's targeting. She cites no example of alleged discrimination that has occurred that the Civil Rights Division is working to stop. And note the even deeper hypocrisy here. For decades, conservatives have championed "small government", arguing that the government should not interfere in private business. We all remember the "gay wedding cake" case. Apparently, the new MAGA logic is that government _cannot_ force a private entity to bake a cake for a gay wedding--because that's tyranny, but government _can_ force a private entity to _not_ bake a cake for a gay wedding--because that's freedom.
MAGA Republicans seek to protect private businesses from being required to cater to a diverse consumer base, while also punishing private businesses who choose to cater to diverse consumer base. That approach only makes sense when your goal isn't justice, freedom, or humanity--but to advance white supremacy.
Because that's exactly what this is.
Instead of focusing on real issues--like rising costs of living, corporate corruption, or strengthening the economy (are eggs affordable yet?)--Bondi's DOJ is wasting resources on targeting businesses that dare to hire, promote, and support Black, brown, women, and disabled workers. This solution in search of a problem demonstrably harms American businesses and universities--which again, is likely the point.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..9cVvxz6oUGUKx-sIiFea_WNX0KzsMq8AOUlMywUb0X4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156594978)
## DEIA Increases Profitability and Innovation--This Ban is Self-Destructive
I must again point out that Bondi's move isn't just a violation of fundamental First Amendment rights--it's also economic suicide. DEI programs aren't "wasteful"--they are proven to increase profitability, employee satisfaction, and innovation. Per Forbes, numerous studies show [that](https://substack.com/redirect/5f02dd92-b0bf-4604-a078-9298d6d7d438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
* Companies with strong DEI policies perform better in customer satisfaction, employee retention, and financial strength.
* Diverse and inclusive companies have employee retention rates 5.4 times higher than non-inclusive ones.
* McKinsey & Company's research has shown that gender and ethnic diversity in leadership results in major financial outperformance.

Simply put, while DEIA saves money and boosts company growth, the Trump regime insists on punishing companies who seek to maximize profits ethically through meaningful worker representation. Again, the MAGA goal isn't a strong economy, it's white nationalist control. The receipts back this up.
## Banning DEIA Is About One Thing--Advancing White Supremacy
This is especially visible when we consider who actually holds and has held power in the U.S. historically through today? Consider the facts:
* 98% of all U.S. presidents have been white men.
* 98% of the U.S. Senate is white men.
* 94% of the U.S. Supreme Court is white men.
* 90% of U.S. Fortune 500 CEOs are white men.

At only 30% of the population, white men control every major economic and political institution at a rate of more than three times their population. Yet, conservative white men are so uncomfortable that a fraction of that outsized power is being shared with a slightly more representative cross section of society, that they claim they are being "replaced."
Imagine controlling 100% of the U.S. government and economy for over 200 years--but still crying victimhood because now you "only" control 95%. Imagine being so terrified of equality that you criminalize it with the full power of the Department of Justice. Imagine having such unrestricted privilege for centuries, that the slightest hint of equality feels like oppression. We don't have to imagine, because that is MAGA in 2025 America.
And to be clear, this is the stated intent in their own words and actions.
If you didn't believe Elon Musk when he performed a Nazi salute not once, but twice, and endorsed that America should only accept white South African immigrants, maybe you'll believe his former "DOGE" employee Marko Elez. Elez just resigned after the Wall Street Journal confirmed he's a Nazi and eugenicist and believes in a return to racial segregation. Meanwhile, Elez was illegally given full access to all of our private information via the U.S. Treasury--and this morning Musk made a public push to bring him _back_ to "DOGE" despite his Nazi rhetoric. And if you don't believe Elez, maybe you'll believe Darren Beattie, who Secretary of State Marco Rubio just picked for acting undersecretary for public diplomacy and public affairs. Beattie said just last October:
> Competent white men must be in charge if you want things to work. Unfortunately, our entire national ideology is predicated on coddling the feelings of women and minorities, and demoralizing competent white men.
> | [](https://substack.com/redirect/3632b5ec-0dd8-466d-9f0b-15e335a866ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
> ---|---|---
And if you don't believe Beattie, maybe you'll believe Donald Trump himself when he blamed Black and brown and disabled people and women for the airline crash, his abolishing of DEIA initiatives in the Federal government, his move to get federal employees to snitch on each other for 'secretly' promoting DEIA, and now his move to order the Department of Justice to criminally prosecute even private entities who dare recognize the value of diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility.
Indeed, this isn't about fairness or justice--this is white nationalist fragility in action.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..9cVvxz6oUGUKx-sIiFea_WNX0KzsMq8AOUlMywUb0X4?&gift=true)
## In Conclusion
AG Bondi is moving full speed ahead to criminalize DEIA, and expects a full report from her staff by March 1 on how to execute on this fascist plan. We cannot sit idle. If we allow this to continue unchecked, it will escalate. Abolishing DEIA on paper means MAGAs will further decimate workers' rights, reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, disability rights, immigrant rights, and civil rights--all under the guise of equality (translation: white supremacy). MAGAs will erase every single hard-fought gain for marginalized communities until we are back in the time of Jim Crow America.
I have written at length [on the numerous actions each of us can take](https://substack.com/redirect/7fa8f378-1ece-47e5-ac73-6c465cb7cf1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to more deliberately push back against this fascism and white supremacy. It is imperative we act with urgency, and that we remember what justice looks like--because none of this is just. I will continue to document and expose these autocratic attacks as they unfold, and I need and welcome your continued support to advance my human rights advocacy. Resist. Activate. Communicate. Invest. Educate. Organize. Subscribe. And share. Thank you for your trust in this battle for democracy itself.
**Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’tactivate their 2025 membership? »
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
We’ll cut straight to the chase – without you on our team, we can’t invest in state races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership?** ****
1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 5,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending.
2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections.
3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, _much_ more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power.

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: $20 MILLION for Sesame Street in Iraq?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Major cuts need to be made

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIwN183US1QMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDIxMzUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMDdfN1EtUDMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjAyMTM1LTI4OTkifQ/VpHQv6h3jcA9CXWXsx0KXQ)
---
The waste being uncovered at USAID is unacceptable and should be a wake-up call for everyone in government. Seeing millions of tax dollars being wasted on entrenched bureaucrats' pet projects is an insult to the American people, and it's time for a change.

If you don't believe me, here are a few examples.
---
_**• $20 MILLION**_ for Sesame Street in Iraq
**• $2 _MILLION_** for Moroccan pottery classes
**• $2.5 _MILLION_** for electric vehicles in Vietnam
**• $9 _MILLION_** for Syrian civilians, which ended up in a terrorist group's hands
---
Not only is this spending immoral and unsustainable, **but it’s also dangerous.** We CANNOT allow millions of dollars in government funds to end up in the hands of our enemies, and that's exactly what's been happening right under our noses for DECADES.

I’m determined to put an end to this waste, but liberals around the country are fighting us at every turn to keep the endless USAID spending going. **So, Peter, I’m calling on America First patriots like YOU to help.** **[**Will you sign my petition to demand we uncover the waste and fraud in government?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIwN183US1QMy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDIxMzUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMDdfN1EtUDMuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjAyMTM1LTI4OTkifQ/Qp__opcSHP8a3a1zW-x4Og)**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: It's Black History Month, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr]

Team,

February marks Black History Month. It's a time devoted to reflecting on and celebrating the rich history, resilience, and immense contributions that Black Americans have made in our country from even before our founding.

In too many states and school districts throughout our country, though, this history has become politicized or even erased from classrooms. Voter registration legislation is being implemented in states across the country with a deliberate effort to make it harder for Black Americans to vote. We must work together to stop our country from moving backward.

This month, I invite you to join me in honoring and lifting up the incredible accomplishments and achievements made by Black Americans — both past and present — who've shaped our communities, and making sure we're doing everything we can to keep our country moving forward.

Thank you.

— Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Can you donate now to help support Nellie's re-election campaign?

clean_body: [] Team, February marks Black History Month. It's a time devoted to reflecting on and celebrating the rich history, resilience, and immense contributions that Black Americans have made in our country from even before our founding. In too many states and school districts throughout our country, though, this history has become politicized or even erased from classrooms. Voter registration legislation is being implemented in states across the country with a deliberate effort to make it harder for Black Americans to vote. We must work together to stop our country from moving backward. This month, I invite you to join me in honoring and lifting up the incredible accomplishments and achievements made by Black Americans — both past and present — who've shaped our communities, and making sure we're doing everything we can to keep our country moving forward. Thank you. — Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. Can you donate now to help support Nellie's re-election campaign? Contribute Now [] GIVE Monthly [] Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, PATERSON, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress [] [] [] Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [] . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan is happy to rip up the Constitution
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
In the whirlwind of chaos that has defined the first few weeks of Donald Trump’s second presidency, one executive order stands out: his move to end birthright citizenship.
It’s a craven, unconstitutional move from a man who’s made it clear he has no respect for the foundational principles of this country.
But now, Jim Jordan and his band of ULTRA-MAGA extremists are jumping in to back him up.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250207_birthright_citizenship_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250207_birthright_citizenship_image]
This week, Jordan led a group of House Republicans to file a court brief supporting Trump’s dangerous executive order.
This isn’t about “protecting” America. It’s about shredding the Constitution to push their far-right agenda.
That’s why we’re fighting back. Our movement is taking this clown show head-on, but we need your help to do it. Will you chip in $25, $50, $100, $1,000, $2,500, or $3,300 today to help us hold Jim Jordan accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250207_birthright_citizenship_link1]
What kind of country do we have if our leaders can’t even respect the most sacred text of our democracy?
The 14th Amendment isn’t up for debate — it guarantees that anyone born on U.S. soil is a citizen, period.
But to Jordan and Trump, it’s just another thing to trample over in their quest for power.
Jordan and his ULTRA-MAGA cronies love to wrap themselves in the flag, but let’s be honest: there’s nothing patriotic about trying to rewrite the rules of democracy to suit their whims.
They’re not protecting American values — they’re dismantling them.
Ending birthright citizenship would tear families apart, create millions of stateless people, and undermine the principles of equality and justice that this country is supposed to stand for.
Jordan has spent 18 years in Congress without passing a single bill to help Ohioans.
But he has all the time in the world to back Trump’s illegal moves and attack the very foundations of our democracy. It’s shameful, and it’s dangerous.
Our movement is fighting this authoritarian nonsense, but we need you with us. Will you chip in now to help us stand up for the Constitution, for democracy, and for the true American way? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250207_birthright_citizenship_link2]
Together, we can show Jim Jordan and Donald Trump that their extremist agenda has no place in this country.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/Screenshot%202023-08-30%20at%2012.16.45%20PM.jpeg]

To contribute via check, please address to:
Tamie Wilson For US
273 Saratoga St
Delaware, OH 43015
United States

subject: I wanted to make sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc
body:
View now →
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eb44f6a919e94f3b9fb49e4caf11fe70&_e=1-879YHr4HgNc1f5EUq8lKVg3nDWNDsKaHWJ8HKJVZftCDRXbOQHTUGAHUAtb3FrLssgQiIQ4A_CXvUmgGrBjz7tSFPMurpSwaQLgb3FLYu8pUAZ4sehT_BiZ6-ptt6jlzczX8t0UMZhBjWPY70ESMD9sr3y2jkzlFdIIYPv4QNPhlHjoeK4GWMBK9YfwtURSSLctlgII5oUZKxpNzRCv5T5Blp-0TfdHYkXmHBx130M6yUGltVkuQqwgAxC07cdzu0ExCsUq85elzKkab1JgchIbKgutlXipSWtbdnlPF32b8Fvp0JtIx4oEEJXdhNMHnqg9xSuyFZxh4-8LFzyT_ozyZ6cXZgFoby0SKetCa0eCaLkgu1mWsxXIzPho2op5Fsu2qmPJ2GkWBzbFYLpQwjtFFPhyB9jg3_qr2c57EUIUqK-5uEkwj6QGS8aBKkI)

Fellow American, I have an important update to share with you.

Now that Republicans control the Senate majority, I have become the Chairman of the Permanent Subcommittee on Investigation.

**_[This means I will have the power to issue subpoenas, investigate special interests, expose the Deep State and its agents who work against the interests of the American people.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eb44f6a919e94f3b9fb49e4caf11fe70&_e=1-879YHr4HgNc1f5EUq8lKVg3nDWNDsKaHWJ8HKJVZftCDRXbOQHTUGAHUAtb3FrLssgQiIQ4A_CXvUmgGrBjz7tSFPMurpSwaQLgb3FLYu8pUAZ4sehT_BiZ6-ptt6jlzczX8t0UMZhBjWPY70ESMD9sr3y2jkzlFdIIYPv4QNPhlHjoeK4GWMBK9YfwtURSSLctlgII5oUZKxpNzRCv5T5Blp-0TfdHYkXmHBx130M6yUGltVkuQqwgAxC07cdzu0ExCsUq85elzKkab1JgchIbKgutlXipSWtbdnlPF3DgJFcDOzxi_2bC94x4alTgJWa4Ydh0euadBX1OwgMECL09vUqI4B4Q6fs_Fxio_oWWmuV7bUfKM8TEwLNkl9R8OGnfHjUrYmVxaoUcGs6ISsNoz4KD0StnxDkrOaF12UmHPd_rElP3g9nF6t9mZTs)_**

clean_body: View now → Fellow American, I have an important update to share with you. Now that Republicans control the Senate majority, I have become the Chairman of the Permanent Subcommittee on Investigation. I ran for the Senate because I wanted to bring back transparency and build a government that is ruled by the American people, not by bureaucrats or corporations. As Chairman, I intend to do just that. But here's the truth - We will face a lot of resistance in my mission to restore integrity, and I need you to stand by me. Your support will power my mission to restore integrity and transparency to the federal government. ********** ******** ******** ********** This mission is of utmost importance, and your backing is crucial. Thank you for your commitment, Chairman Ron Johnson Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc. %%subscriptioncenterurl%% PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903

subject: What you told me:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Making Michigan the best place to call home.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=89%2E181023%2E_qK-Rg)
Team, I’m running for governor to ensure our government works for _everyone._
That’s why as I travel our state meeting Michiganders my first question is, **“What can we do to help and make a difference for you and your family?”**
I’ve already heard from many of you about the issues you care about most: increasing access to affordable housing, ensuring every child has the opportunity to receive a world-class education, lowering costs, and more.
I have a plan to tackle these issues and make Michigan the best place to call home, but I can’t do it without your support.
[**My campaign is all about delivering for you and your family. Will you help us build a winning campaign by chipping in today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=89%2E181023%2E_qK-Rg)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q12025.9b6-d1&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=89%2E181023%2E_qK-Rg)

---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q12025.slPEnH&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=89%2E181023%2E_qK-Rg)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=89%2E181023%2E_qK-Rg)
---
Carol in Ann Arbor wrote that she wants to see our campaign “Protecting our state and its people. Speaking up and being strong.” Kimberly in Lansing said, “I’m the parent of an LGBTQ child and I want Michigan to continue to be a safe place for her.” Sergio in Niles said some priorities are “Reversing _Citizens United_ ” and “End gerrymandering.”
These are my priorities too.
I’m fighting for our kids. I’m fighting for a government that works for the people, not for mega-corporations and the ultra-wealthy. I’m fighting to make Michigan the best place to call home.
[**I know that together, we can build a winning campaign that delivers on our shared priorities. Please, if you’re able, pitch in to help elect me as Michigan’s next governor.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=89%2E181023%2E_qK-Rg)

Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
Treasury Secretary and hedge fund billionaire Scott Bessent betrayed Americans by handing control of the federal payment system to unelected and unvetted Nazi nepo baby Elon Musk and his covert DOGE crew of hackers. This move is not just reckless; it’s a blatant attack on our democracy that threatens the financial security of working people across the nation. **We are at a critical juncture in our democracy, and your voice is needed now more than ever.** [**This treachery is OUTRAGEOUS! Join us and tell Congress that Scott Bessent must be impeached!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxnWnvs35zUKyhA0i-rv8g88UVXxaDNy2HIsCWOCg37AeHJGIejKfqjWB5ZfWGFLOwLTMty_67Dn6lF528XZcD9mPlV-KfbOM6nA4bYn9LztxBhmigwdfR0DrLbSNd-Hwo5qtM_sET1GpKjo5F54EaQi1B0gxs4QtuiuLrdqiN2ezGViAcq6TZkR8eP60BKb0UBQEFBAivcUGUD8dXCh2MEinoD7yWZoPJ5TAjFLdrjsdXgbLUligv7OBR2bHRGZ1lx-5EbzLFkpU37aqnXU0D_P4WfO716Eys7Xuqv_yPYdHoh3z_RHTwQnWJq_wXBAJ10ugf-D_yl6TrJBFw1_jRVA/4dt/ETnd_KFSTU2IMJIjAjcj3A/h2/h001.14ikkFbCEvMwVQoIMIZneMYyKW3UFts9UJXc8RScPGc) **** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxnWnvs35zUKyhA0i-rv8g88UVXxaDNy2HIsCWOCg37AeHJGIejKfqjWB5ZfWGFLOwLTMty_67Dn6lF528XZcD9mPlV-KfbOM6nA4bYn9LztxBhmigwdfR0DrLbSNd-Hwor31elr7ek1OUynrIaRy9-C4cIoKUYc6ihxOaYjuu6mIZS31LXnZ9NDWyrg6owrpQnKJUIIQZzpSMG1Vr_Q_huB7CvSNrnSUOqGazUxM_aht8_411HsRGMrzuR9SC0LO1LM6OXdruVLfyj_1uHedfvVm8mfpHMyZS4n56s7yhrpLGw98XsqykjLvuGKX0DYdfCEZPzm76iEfdWlsm5deccw/4dt/ETnd_KFSTU2IMJIjAjcj3A/h3/h001.DaeTGSNjXvJRDwQoybK_Bp8T93OM4lWAz59Gvij0WfQ)

****
Elon Musk now holds the keys to a system responsible for disbursing trillions of dollars in public funds, including vital services like Medicare and Social Security.
This lawless power grab could not have occurred without Bessent's willingness, and it poses an unprecedented risk to Americans’ sensitive information and financial well-being.
**Bessent must be impeached for this betrayal of public trust. We cannot allow unelected billionaires to dictate our financial future.**
[**We urge you to take action today: sign on to demand that Congress IMPEACH Scott Bessent. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Urgent Senate Update: Our Government Belongs to the American People, Not Elon Musk
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501275874%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate_%2bOur%2bGovernment%2bBelongs%2bto%2bthe%2bAmerican%2bPeople_%2bNot%2bElon%2bMusk%250115510.44219769.6931435.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501275874%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate_%2bOur%2bGovernment%2bBelongs%2bto%2bthe%2bAmerican%2bPeople_%2bNot%2bElon%2bMusk%250115510.44219769.6931435.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **February 7, 2025** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Urgent Senate Update: Our Government Belongs to the American People, Not Elon Musk

Over the past few weeks, we've seen unprecedented and illegal actions from the Trump Administration that are threatening our communities. That's why I'm sending you another urgent newsletter update, following the one I sent [Saturday](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fview_newsletter.aspx%3fid%3d273273%26c%3dSenVanHollen&redir_log=223424611194603) and [last week](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fview_newsletter.aspx%3fid%3d274033%26c%3dSenVanHollen&redir_log=941539454412602). I'm also providing constant updates on my social media accounts which you can find here: [Bluesky,](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fbsky.app%2fprofile%2fvanhollen.senate.gov&redir_log=939838092693319) [Instagram](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292), [YouTube](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2f%40senatorvanhollen&redir_log=49030338036296), [Facebook](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284), [Threads](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.threads.net%2f%40chrisvanhollen&redir_log=265053116525280),[ Twitter/X. ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fchrisvanhollen&redir_log=917074285891195)And you can share with us how Trump/Musk Administration actions are affecting you, by [visiting my website here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fshare-how-president-trumps-executive-orders-are-impacting-you-or-your-family&redir_log=08840167418772). We've already heard from thousands of Marylanders, and your stories will continue to help us fight back.

We are witnessing the most corrupt bargain in American history. Elon Musk spent over $280 million to elect Donald Trump, and Trump has handed him the keys to the federal government. Together, they're abusing their power to access sensitive personal information about Americans and to further enrich and empower the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of America.

Elon Musk is now staging a hostile takeover of virtually the entire federal government. This is no time for business as usual, and I can assure you I am fighting back with every tool at my disposal. One of those essential tools is stopping these illegal actions in the courts, and I've spent hours on the phone and in person with lawyers who are assembling and filing the cases to stop this illegal power grab. I am also doing everything I can to rally opposition to the Musk takeover and use the tools of the Senate to oppose Trump nominations and focus on the crisis at hand.

Last weekend, we learned that Trump and Musk were working to shutter USAID. On Monday, they banned workers from entering USAID offices and doubled down on a foreign aid freeze that prevents patriotic USAID employees from doing essential and life-saving work around the world. Make no mistake: Elon Musk's effort to dismantle USAID is a gift to China, Russia, and our other adversaries. Putin's cronies immediately posted on X, "Smart move by Elon Musk." This is not America First - it is America in Retreat. It has nothing to do with government efficiency and everything to do with aiding and abetting our adversaries. In fact, if you talk to American military leaders, they will tell you that USAID is an essential and cost-effective part of our overall national security and foreign policy strategy. USAID makes us safer by helping provide more stability and opportunity to very combustible parts of the world. And when USAID fights disease overseas, they not only save lives there, they also prevent those diseases from spreading here and harming Americans.

Shutting down USAID not only makes us less safe - it's also downright illegal. USAID is established by law. Presidents are not kings, and they don't get to cherry-pick the law. And Elon Musk may get to be a dictator at Tesla - and he may want to play dictator in the nation's capital - but he doesn't get to shred the law.

On Monday, I organized a group of my colleagues to [go to the USAID Headquarters](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2flive%2fstI7ZIb9FDg%3fsi%3dqWd8827Ntr2PbOQS%26t%3d176&redir_log=284755435543452) to stand with current and former employees against this illegal power grab. I was joined by over a dozen Senate and House members, and we attempted to go inside USAID to see first-hand what was taking place. We were [barred from entering](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dQU1G7C1LBcE%26t%3d0s&redir_log=28150111183340) because of orders given by Musk and his cronies. When the Administration continued to double down on these actions, I joined even more current and former USAID employees on Wednesday, [to speak out once again](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dKY1o6PCTDfU&redir_log=505632524736288), and yesterday I [made the case on the Senate floor.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1887560876099612965&redir_log=189885799185333)

What we're seeing at USAID isn't just a battle over providing critical foreign assistance to advance American interests and values across the globe - it's also a test case for many of their other illegal efforts to take over our government. And just yesterday, we learned that Elon Musk and his cronies are planning to [fire nearly all of USAID's 13,000 employees](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1887714097015255296&redir_log=068517024524332). Last night the American Foreign Service Association, American Federation of Federal Government Employees, and the nonprofit Democracy Forward filed a lawsuit to stop this cruel, lawless attack, and I am doing everything I can to support them.

USAID is not the only place we're witnessing Musk's takeover efforts this week. We also learned that Trump has handed Elon Musk access to Americans' personal, private data - ranging from your Social Security number to your bank account information. By providing Musk and his cronies access to the Treasury Department, he's putting the confidential information of millions of Americans at risk.

These systems are so sensitive that they are entrusted to the smallest possible circle of nonpartisan civil servants. Now, they're in the hands of Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire, and his DOGE minions. While a court just restricted their use of this sensitive information, they can still do enormous harm to the privacy and other important interests of the American people.

To protest this unacceptable breach of Americans' trust, on Tuesday, we [rallied outside the Department of Treasury](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2flive%2fty7g1GX5YKw%3ft%3d1553s&redir_log=462239384534314) and called out the Trump Administration for giving away Americans' most sensitive information. I am also using Senate hearings to raise the alarm about what is happening. On Wednesday, [I asked bank executives at our Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs Committee hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1887339929652396232&redir_log=665748160027332) if they would ever allow access to this type of information at their institutions, and they said "no." I also called on the Chair of the Committee to immediately hold hearings about this unacceptable breach of American privacy.

Unfortunately, USAID and Treasury are not alone. We're hearing reports of many other agencies being raided by DOGE, [including NOAA and the Centers for Medicaid and Medicare Services in Maryland](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1886977650909983175&redir_log=479384668492333), as well as efforts to completely hollow out the Department of Education and the Office of Personnel Management, which oversees more than two million federal employees. I'll continue to speak out against each of these illegal efforts - for example, [I joined a rally with teachers, education advocates, and others](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3d5-mTorZh1nM%26t%3d0s&redir_log=373372274466350) on Tuesday to stand up for our students and our public education system.

We must stop this illegal power grab.

Right now, our best recourse for immediate relief is through the courts. I'm grateful for the states, the federal workers' unions, the nonprofits, and the democracy watchdogs who are suing Donald Trump for his illegal actions, and I'm engaging with these groups and doing everything in my power to support their efforts. We've already seen some courts put a stop to these illegal actions. The situation is evolving every day, but here's the latest. Two cases filed against Trump's funding freezes have resulted in temporary restraining orders against these actions. Another court blocked Trump's attack on birthright citizenship. Additionally, a judge partially reined in Musk's access to records at the Treasury Department, and yesterday a judge delayed his sketchy buyout offers for federal employees and will hold a hearing on Monday to review its status. To federal workers considering these buyouts, I once again urge you to proceed with extreme caution.

Baltimore City has also joined a coalition in a lawsuit against the Administration's witch hunt against so-called "DEI" initiatives - an order so broad and undefined that it could freeze funding for everything from afterschool programs for kids to public safety. Federal employees have been put on leave and encouraged to report on their colleagues over "DEI," including in one case for attending a training conducted during the last Trump Administration that was promoted by his former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos.

I'm heartened by the actions our courts have taken so far, and I'll continue working closely to support these efforts.

And while we're not in the majority, I am also determined to fight back in the Senate with every tool we have. Without Republicans on board, we don't have the numbers to stop Trump's moves outright, but we can slow him down. That's why I have said the Senate should NOT operate under business as usual. And that's why I'm voting NO on Trump's nominees. Along with Senator Brian Schatz, I'm holding up every Trump political nominee for the State Department - as well as other nominees - until Trump stops wrecking our government.

For example, this week Senate Democrats held down the floor for 30 hours - the maximum time allowed under Senate rules - to delay the vote on Russell Vought, Trump's nominee to run the Office of Management and Budget. [I went to the Senate floor](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dsk_TDWp5mo4%26t%3d1s&redir_log=284686012595352) as part of this effort to make the case against Vought, who is a leading architect of Project 2025. At his confirmation hearing, I asked Vought if he'd follow the law--and [he refused to say yes](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dFQmLTwK2B-g&redir_log=929922296917288). That should be no surprise; he broke the law the last time he held that position.

Right now, I'm hearing from thousands of Marylanders who have been personally affected by Trump's actions. Firefighters and small business owners who fear that federal resources will be ripped out from under them. Federal workers who fear being forced out of their jobs. Families terrified of losing their health care. I'm committed to fighting back for Marylanders each and every day. **Again, if you are being harmed by Trump 's actions, you can share your story with me by [clicking here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fshare-how-president-trumps-executive-orders-are-impacting-you-or-your-family&redir_log=08840167418772). **

Trump and Musk are engaged in an illegal power grab, trying to accomplish through executive orders and other means what can only be legally achieved through congressional action. They want us to believe they are more powerful than they really are. They want us to think we can't do anything about it. But it isn't true. Together, we can and will keep fighting back. Chris Van Hollen
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15510.44219769.6931435.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2f%2fEsurveyForm.aspx%3f__cid%3dSenVanHollen%26__sid%3d100007%26__crop%3d15702QQQ43394993QQQ6902949QQQ8303970&redir_log=71723308996870)

When the Administration continued to double down on these actions, I joined even more current and former USAID employees on Wednesday, , and yesterday I What we're seeing at USAID isn't just a battle over providing critical foreign assistance to advance American interests and values across the globe - it's also a test case for many of their other illegal efforts to take over our government. And just yesterday, we learned that Elon Musk and his cronies are planning to . Last night the American Foreign Service Association, American Federation of Federal Government Employees, and the nonprofit Democracy Forward filed a lawsuit to stop this cruel, lawless attack, and I am doing everything I can to support them. USAID is not the only place we're witnessing Musk's takeover efforts this week. We also learned that Trump has handed Elon Musk access to Americans' personal, private data - ranging from your Social Security number to your bank account information. By providing Musk and his cronies access to the Treasury Department, he's putting the confidential information of millions of Americans at risk. These systems are so sensitive that they are entrusted to the smallest possible circle of nonpartisan civil servants. Now, they're in the hands of Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire, and his DOGE minions. While a court just restricted their use of this sensitive information, they can still do enormous harm to the privacy and other important interests of the American people. To protest this unacceptable breach of Americans' trust, on Tuesday, we and called out the Trump Administration for giving away Americans' most sensitive information. I am also using Senate hearings to raise the alarm about what is happening. On Wednesday, if they would ever allow access to this type of information at their institutions, and they said "no." I also called on the Chair of the Committee to immediately hold hearings about this unacceptable breach of American privacy. Unfortunately, USAID and Treasury are not alone. We're hearing reports of many other agencies being raided by DOGE, , as well as efforts to completely hollow out the Department of Education and the Office of Personnel Management, which oversees more than two million federal employees. I'll continue to speak out against each of these illegal efforts - for example, on Tuesday to stand up for our students and our public education system. We must stop this illegal power grab. Right now, our best recourse for immediate relief is through the courts. I'm grateful for the states, the federal workers' unions, the nonprofits, and the democracy watchdogs who are suing Donald Trump for his illegal actions, and I'm engaging with these groups and doing everything in my power to support their efforts. We've already seen some courts put a stop to these illegal actions. The situation is evolving every day, but here's the latest. Two cases filed against Trump's funding freezes have resulted in temporary restraining orders against these actions. Another court blocked Trump's attack on birthright citizenship. Additionally, a judge partially reined in Musk's access to records at the Treasury Department, and yesterday a judge delayed his sketchy buyout offers for federal employees and will hold a hearing on Monday to review its status. To federal workers considering these buyouts, I once again urge you to proceed with extreme caution. Baltimore City has also joined a coalition in a lawsuit against the Administration's witch hunt against so-called "DEI" initiatives - an order so broad and undefined that it could freeze funding for everything from afterschool programs for kids to public safety. Federal employees have been put on leave and encouraged to report on their colleagues over "DEI," including in one case for attending a training conducted during the last Trump Administration that was promoted by his former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos. I'm heartened by the actions our courts have taken so far, and I'll continue working closely to support these efforts. And while we're not in the majority, I am also determined to fight back in the Senate with every tool we have. Without Republicans on board, we don't have the numbers to stop Trump's moves outright, but we can slow him down. That's why I have said the Senate should NOT operate under business as usual. And that's why I'm voting NO on Trump's nominees. Along with Senator Brian Schatz, I'm holding up every Trump political nominee for the State Department - as well as other nominees - until Trump stops wrecking our government. For example, this week Senate Democrats held down the floor for 30 hours - the maximum time allowed under Senate rules - to delay the vote on Russell Vought, Trump's nominee to run the Office of Management and Budget. as part of this effort to make the case against Vought, who is a leading architect of Project 2025. At his confirmation hearing, I asked Vought if he'd follow the law--and . That should be no surprise; he broke the law the last time he held that position. Right now, I'm hearing from thousands of Marylanders who have been personally affected by Trump's actions. Firefighters and small business owners who fear that federal resources will be ripped out from under them. Federal workers who fear being forced out of their jobs. Families terrified of losing their health care. I'm committed to fighting back for Marylanders each and every day. Again, if you are being harmed by Trump 's actions, you can share your story with me by . Trump and Musk are engaged in an illegal power grab, trying to accomplish through executive orders and other means what can only be legally achieved through congressional action. They want us to believe they are more powerful than they really are. They want us to think we can't do anything about it. But it isn't true. Together, we can and will keep fighting back. Chris Van Hollen |

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Wisconsin families want some breathing room, not higher prices on food, gas, and cars.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4587%2E35263%2EE1E0SQ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter,

Doing right by Wisconsin and hardworking Americans is the core of my work
in the Senate. That’s why I’ve spoken out against President Trump’s new
tariffs.

Wisconsin families want breathing room — not higher prices — on food, gas,
and cars. If enacted, Trump’s proposed tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and
China would hurt hardworking Wisconsinites’ pockets.

I’ve supported tariffs as a tool to crack down on unfair trade practices
in the past. But the tariffs proposed by Trump will crush certain
industries — like Wisconsin’s notable agriculture and manufacturing
sectors.

These tariffs will also weigh heavily on the pocketbooks of everyday
Americans. We’ll see high prices at the pump and at the grocery store,
which will only continue to rise as our trade partners push back against
these broad tariffs.

In short, these tariffs would hurt our farmers and manufacturers and jack
up prices for families. Our job in Washington is to make life easier, not
harder, for folks — which is why I’m opposing these tariffs.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-feb25.UMK7-b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4587%2E35263%2EE1E0SQ ]I’m working to create a difference for Wisconsinites, and I’ll work
with anyone to get results. I’m drawing the line at these tariffs and will
stand up to any attempt to raise prices for hardworking families. If you

our state.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: President Trump Exposes The Hypocrisy of Arab States on Gaza
body:
[Your campaign brief for February 7, 2025](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/sustaining-membership-cfc)

Peter-

This week, in his typical fashion, President Trump upended the discussion over the future of Gaza with comments that exposed the hypocrisy of Arab states in the region on this issue. The House of Representatives also passed a bill that has been one of my top priorities - the HALT Fentanyl Act, which will help us go after fentanyl traffickers and stop the deaths of tens of thousands of Americans.

As always, thank you for your support. I am already gearing up for my re-election campaign next year, and having you in my corner will be crucial to my victory in our March primaries in Texas. I am fighting every single day for you, for Texans, and for Americans and I want to continue that fight in Congress. [If you are able to donate to my campaign, it will help ensure I can stay in this fight.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/sustaining-membership-cfc)

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/sustaining-membership-cfc)

Now, here's your brief.

HOW PRESIDENT TRUMP EXPOSED THE HYPOCRISY OF ARAB STATES

[WATCH MY INTERVIEW HERE](https://www.cnn.com/2025/02/06/world/video/the-lead-dan-crenshaw-president-trump-netanyahu-gaza-future-usaid-jake-tapper)

President Trump’s comments this week about having the United States “take over” the Gaza Strip sent a shockwave around the world. The White House stepped back and clarified those comments in the days after, but the reaction to President Trump’s comments may have been the entire goal of him making them in the first place.

His comments exposed the rampant hypocrisy that exists among Arab states as it relates to the future of Gaza and the Palestinian people. Every Arab leader blames Israel - and the United States - for the pain of Palestinians in Gaza. They don’t blame Hamas, or Iran, or Iranian proxies for the plight of Gazans. They blame us. But when America and Israel press Arab states to take Palestinian refugees from Gaza, or take any kind of responsibility at all for rehabilitating Gaza, the entire Arab world goes silent. That is the hypocrisy President Trump’s comments exposed.

This is President Trump’s negotiating tactic that we see over and over again. He starts from a position of strength and threatens something that causes an uproar, which brings every interested party to the negotiating table. We saw this recently with his threats of tariffs against Mexico and Canada, which led to concessions on securing the border and stopping the flow of fentanyl. If the past is any indication, President Trump’s comments surrounding the Gaza Strip this week will force key players in the region to negotiate a deal that has been elusive for decades.

Arab states need to step up. President Trump just may have forced them to do exactly that.

THE HOUSE PASSES THE MOST OBVIOUS POLICY IN THE WORLD

[WATCH MY FLOOR SPEECH HERE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dPYDsP3C0pw)

This week, the House of Representatives passed the most obvious policy in the world: increasing criminal penalties for fentanyl traffickers. There shouldn’t have even been a debate on this policy, but of course House Democrats found a way to be against this. You can watch my rebuttal to their nonsensical arguments on the House floor in the video above.

The main argument pushed by Democrats against this bill is one we’ve heard before, claiming that permanently scheduling illicit fentanyl as a Schedule I drug will lead to “mass incarceration” for those who use fentanyl. That’s just not true.

Illicit fentanyl has been Schedule I since 2018—if their claims were true, we’d have already seen these so-called negative effects. We haven’t.

This bill doesn’t target users—it targets traffickers. The criminals lacing drugs with illicit fentanyl and killing Americans every single day. Letting temporary scheduling expire would mean weaker enforcement, weaker laws, and more lives lost.

The House did its job by increasing criminal penalties for illicit fentanyl dealers and giving law enforcement more tools to combat fentanyl trafficking. There was a bipartisan vote for this policy, but 107 Democrats still voted against it. Hopefully, the Senate will follow the House’s lead and swiftly send this commonsense policy to President Trump’s desk.
