https://endexfitness.com/products/stars-and-stripes-t-shirt?variant=51728001728878

[SHOP NOW](https://endexfitness.com/products/stars-and-stripes-t-shirt?variant=51728001728878)

SOCIAL MEDIA

https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1887530526166151622

https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1887258211591286884

https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1886543787251347713

https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1886517682532479477

https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1885413672664596551

NEWS

FOX NEWS: [Trump admin hits brakes on $5B electric vehicle charging station program](https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/trump-admin-hits-brakes-5b-electric-vehicle-charging-station-program)

NATIONAL REVIEW: [A Victory for Women Athletes](https://www.nationalreview.com/2025/02/a-victory-for-women-athletes/)

WSJ: [Meet Chris Wright, Donald Trump’s Energy Evangelist](https://www.wsj.com/opinion/donald-trumps-energy-evangelist-chris-wright-secretary-policy-08097e79?mod=opinion_lead_pos10)

That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading.

In service,

[Congressman and Former Navy SEAL](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/sustaining-membership-cfc)

Dan Crenshaw

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: This isn’t normal.
body:
|
#
So very many of you have reached out with concerns about Elon Musk’s actions at the Department of Government Efficiency. Running roughshod over taxpayer systems, accessing sensitive data, slashing agency budgets, cutting essential services, and disregarding oversight mechanisms designed to protect the public... it is highly alarming. **This isn’t normal, and you have every right to be outraged.** Our government agencies exist to serve the public good, not to cater to the self-serving whims of the richest man in the world. You have my word that I will do everything in my power to hold this administration accountable. That means getting to work in Congress, in the courts, and organizing in our community to keep big tech billionaires from taking over our government. One of the most important things we can do is share our stories of how Mr. Musk’s actions hurt us. If you’ve been personally impacted by the reckless actions of DOGE, reply and let me know. We want to know, and we want to help. Take care, Kristen | **Before you go...** The 2026 election cycle is already ramping up, and every day in Washington is a reminder that we need strong, locally-focused representatives willing to check this administration's worst instincts. Knowing how much funding we have coming in each month will help us plan and budget more effectively, and your sustained monthly donation gives Kristen her best shot at generating the resources she needs. **[So what do you say, will you pledge a monthly donation to our campaign today? Even just $5 or $10 goes a long way!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101735424/526899687/-1606559029?refcode=em-2.7.25-all-a&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA1NGE3Ni03ZmU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvIgOy2MNKbdgtuWAsqCEN7fusWrRdUKz_sVmbM4OjI=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101735425/526899688/-1606559029?refcode=em-2.7.25-all-a&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA1NGE3Ni03ZmU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvIgOy2MNKbdgtuWAsqCEN7fusWrRdUKz_sVmbM4OjI=)

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Relief for Hoosiers: Gov. Braun Sets Out to Tackle Property Tax Reform
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Steaming Forward: Republicans on the Move**_
---
Friends, This week, the Indiana GOP has been proud to stand by our conservative leadership, both at home and in Washington, as they continue to advance the commonsense priorities that most impact Hoosiers. Governor Braun demonstrated his commitment to hearing from everyday Hoosiers, sitting down with homeowners to discuss their struggles with rising property taxes and laying out solutions to combat this issue. Our federal representatives have been working tirelessly to confirm President Trump's nominees, battling Democrat obstructionism and ensuring that the new administration can deliver on the historic mandate Republicans won in November. I am deeply honored by the trust you have placed in me to serve as Interim Chair of the Indiana GOP for the last several months, by your unwavering support, and by the privilege of working alongside you. Ours is a party of dedication, responsibility, and integrity; those are the values that have propelled us to where we are today, those are the values I have strived to live up to as your Chairwoman, and those are the values that are going to continue to grow and strengthen our party. We now have the opportunity to make Indiana a model of freedom and prosperity—setting ourselves apart and achieving for Hoosiers what was once thought impossible. And together, I know we will. Thank you for all you do pals,
---
| |
---
| | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor Braun Hosts Fireside Chat on Tax Relief**_
---
---
**Governor Mike Braun** on Tuesday, sat down with Hoosiers to discuss frustrations over rising property taxes and his plan to address the problem through cuts, caps, and reforms. **What he said** : "I want to thank Mark Gross and Jennie Reith for taking time out of their day to talk with me today about how property taxes are impacting their daily lives. Households across Indiana have seen their property taxes increase, some by double!" **said Governor Braun.** "All taxpayers should make their voices heard like Mark and Jennie did today. I encourage taxpayers to reach out to their legislators to express their concerns about property taxes and the need for relief." \- **Governor****Braun** , via a press [release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/dmUCSuGjB89QlBp4Dq2MKgHnGZINk33meHAeds3O56IV40h3ajMO22CjMfrYac8m3sy-Rlxki8d7TpVmANeDyW5EgvfVpKE57vbHIyUzgq-xoP4nlmCkfQaxKUjwMRFRWpAkBX6DMWDdk95LIBKpnAOkUBFW6A0xLu_QkwE3-iNXnIFhr-1zCu_tkqfNGPC8E5mmUjxsHt1lnQ_kFyn0u-2foDI9IQVJRnZxnqYtQUjPypxXHpENFXeGfExFVjE2hSP5pkiEadlWXdRORPCtZ_5D3xOVIQrJQ8Fez7Goqrm1qKXvScZ9ChmGbDoHbV8KlWYBJOhEmrIIM-icVb8ZT5-lVO1nwmAMot70MNY3J5ip36m5fHWekaYPtk2gbje51Rq-_KDTUoicS1yj0FXQa2KKcIutvjXLHfFHF0QkBT_CND0sWw/TLQ9RHLYc_1NuzC9CxxgY_OIRUH4J2Rx/5).
---
**_Governor Braun Appoints Inspector General Jared Prentice_**
---
---
**Governor Mike Braun** last Friday, appointed Jared Prentice as Indiana's Inspector General. This appointment reflects the Braun Administration's commitment to making state government more efficient, effective, and ethical to ensure the best service for Hoosiers possible. **What he's saying** : "Jared Prentice will be an excellent Inspector General for the State of Indiana. His experience and passion for an ethical and compliance driven culture will align perfectly with our efforts to improve government efficiency for taxpayers. I am proud to appoint such an accomplished individual. Jared is going to do great things for the State of Indiana." \- **Governor****Braun,** via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/RvOJ7EaVels0rR0n_J--Koe-SztwJN4z3JpSyayGJq4Ty9RJGa8GZeEmMAWNOx1bLfTHMSRncS32AzelMGekYBMXYr6iyb6vf2aWnfW2ueEmqYfQmfteNYSZL_wh9qln_xLZh2Ui6tTo-s_m5PvcWSZXjbrN9eT62vWfC6GAj1xzD0SvNKQgX09H8uFMRiqOK7QbW3AV6-FKHof2YzSCU7BJK85M24PDXi6EjquLcJdaBJj7mj406M__eNGtV_nVqQ-2xPjDusfsfBL9rvF7KU_bIpHveZ32SaMiQM71EnJdmDtSJrnOIQAMO-WNGQD6HTuGLzJExXngZUJ7lva6kGECw0p8lUq0chnt/ODb0cKiqpqrxuipfjKPX0gqPX6DxmkDp/5).

_**Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester**_

---
Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Spring Internship Program!

✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning
✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections
✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana

Apply Today! Spots are limited!

Braun**[hosted](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/MkTfCIOv0O2vHT2KfP_p8MaUaZcsRbL_SSlvvZ93NGxNOoeN_R5aJfj-mm_dXYFffCL_qWRAPJc5IjrCqznieyX4UbAEUIH9XwoG2lk_wIjXN54zZec_2DjwbNEoTGbuGah8B38butGQZe02biZRG4YqCDmgKQa6UNXD4v4dYksuI4DdGj_D2Ph0XEQyhr1eMV4qhr2CvuNkBHAW58_GM7u1Goqv_ea8Nc0bRD9eZLGuMPVopbH0CTH6yLVkk-yv4IF_eHWDhoDRmF_r6qOy-PLrsYC1Zb5so0WVvQ/SDHGmIGgRk4R3Vhvd9Yu60D4NWMYFIOI/5) Beckwith**[addressed](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/MxMEChrVDC2KPuOTGXoUjsrXK3KxCwf7Hm7gMJ8GmkwKkngu-RhpeR2Ypx16guS2YDyWgxm8L9L3cxr6AJvXh6IaVQpPNznnPLLq92C9N81JClGDZAl_zfn7SAhdMmLFilOvUvyvvcCwCui0Yhnu7776mdnMhvCuWTEesTy546AGh5JhOzM7JBbbJ-Isv08irxfA4ut1U2oN5NUSTTSJnGTrBDmYK12P2CKcqwTzvMmesvtq5HxnGvYFRu0W3dPNakAwo9KM3Xfx-NeCnqM8ushY3QdqCijZtLAnparlF4KUXls/_lRloGtr1qKJBhbO-QCcsN2srRhx-Djl/5) the Association of Indiana Counties Legislative Conference, discussing property tax relief, agriculture, and rural issues. **Secretary Diego Morales** [attended](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/uke7_WHBf2C_OKrX1Km8rGoCutdO-Wz6xNs-oa-Dw5DOKu794qhZEFe7_N8lKYO6ECySt5EkKT_IN2soM74gvshaVEiLrhTTid6i8zZ80yDHYwdrmnwatfAReebZPM2uo5DwzzTb0iO9Vxk6AZmG99Chg76sq2t8hophVl8cItvmKvYz4Whvr6SYGUvZbmix4P0DSB1S9miqvslQxfU0oZy9SnovwjFlIbb2QEAhOAQS4mff95ftef8NIk8PpFfnR0hMHwRt2tlUGuSRwLcYJq2eirLJSlG1nwHBBqjPzzhX-ylBWBmhsx07ztyHLLIiKkcLMMNUbrorOG1AKJWwBx4qcJbXX-HytXooUHd-8oQnipr5cKZvlgQnlKuYITK5RzoyVLmQlL0weKebf-zVCrnpRvb67X32O_jniho5W2RTyhQXF30xC8tD5ZK83UijICievJ7D68pw63WF-BPMoHi_GgxGvQ/H-liXgLoF0b0EnoQ4Q_H2tsrhEZysQx0/5) the 2025 National Association of Secretaries of State (NASS) Winter Conference in Washington D.C., joining colleagues from across the nation to discuss key issues facing states and share best practices in elections, business services, and other vital areas of state governance. **Treasurer Daniel Elliot** [shared](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/0u7ZpGvTk5Qh4aYuH5Uf5K-0clbvFKMQTlpdhk2_JyrA3AESZeA9Chb_Uw0LDCr66dERdEqCIOcvyJHB3GLTFFreBlkEvhXre2o3YuH3OVBGSDUj4XNNxPUVvqwN-JOPbrYnDX_d9-DhEETXmDl3HfKyI5o7FU2R92LI7u2F-oj8Oj7sr9EH6bK75EhCKIsxgYS9FlQYsRTkNLbmdncGMMrA8VYKA2owOEN8IOP99TL88sPQH5R59aiHLKZu7D4zKC-2jA5gHhRfUgmSr0_2gimPh6ueCK11sl0kJRKN8A/Rz80JtIlMIDdyOx9Y07_57iJOGhIPheA/5) his experience of public service with the Indiana State Senate Intern class at the Indiana Statehouse. **Comptroller Elise Nieshalla** [gathered](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/0CBhJsKcoRnipeE8fF_qg4z3jnTgoMtND-Nz6w-j1G53qICTTgIVrUJwxOYZgyMv1J5dEIOjbD6dVcZtKKWImCNFJby0cHti_FlsAJ2ZSLXh8XSk-xzQhuOBwSdfHgsZxIx8WU_S28gKFaJMAVUYhv4nb6UXIi1NZRqIyjDw7LV2iNYO2rXrQM5hHOMhgfRZ9WOLiLB2BFQK0TUizvzTo9l2hl-6q4S2co2bzBB4tXelRZgLttSe8wWhAgRnbMNJT_hKPJVNzzic5dSHcJYQvdblmQdji0ohvvbE2tg3ncLAeZu5rWoh9vPuAz7g09epCn_PHhMXZqAc3VRwSlb9Wlb4BnyWvBzqORmu/SExwcVM3Wk9K3gEjZtqGPEqb8UFx9Dtb/5) local government leaders from around the state for a roundtable discussion geared toward process, training and cybersecurity enhancements. **Attorney General Todd Rokita** [obtained](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/DojQ-JGGE1O7uN0Iwtg3h7V2tEMAgwZJ5YhYdHgeXE7G9WLxwW7ZO1h11BNmcOIOsUsHgpL5PIucIyLVmCR6M5d12uJp4yLPcdxUSD1XE2nOZsLJV0rWi3z20E729ajZaPb0VuBnyKRZ6DsJbFCLCAFhAvX9zgQ39km8Zb3ILJXLqSljn_iN05Hojx5wGrZn_75bDDzZucTVBc6upuap2OCl0yFJ2uXRkj5TePn9sSMdSImDUVOTKeGHwpAXrFAgI0ltB73zOdD4Pnej894sSORIpswCjgwTQxBefx8Al4ExAzVOQhjyim7TImYJFxedbtLKy3AuOlEyPiiaQyS41H1L9O194sFLlPxdc2HfsSkxW9nUY8rqfdrliEDsBR-fT2m0E22JOYFUVMWCdutUni-KJpHqLXN3_E_DaNNAkV4ex806fPqMnC86ZDvAvW3TzN0yhjk2dUfiJKMYigtravvQImRtV46OFQZ6SklPqL0/ugCkVs1iN4wukWv_FZrMiWbEBvBlQPJH/5) clean_body: | | | | | | | Steaming Forward: Republicans on the Move Friends, This week, the Indiana GOP has been proud to stand by our conservative leadership, both at home and in Washington, as they continue to advance the commonsense priorities that most impact Hoosiers. Our federal representatives have been working tirelessly to confirm President Trump's nominees, battling Democrat obstructionism and ensuring that the new administration can deliver on the historic mandate Republicans won in November. I am deeply honored by the trust you have placed in me to serve as Interim Chair of the Indiana GOP for the last several months, by your unwavering support, and by the privilege of working alongside you. Ours is a party of dedication, responsibility, and integrity; those are the values that have propelled us to where we are today, those are the values I have strived to live up to as your Chairwoman, and those are the values that are going to continue to grow and strengthen our party. body:
| | **_The Cook Political Report_ has officially rated WA-03 as a toss-up for 2026.

clean_body: They want to cut programs working families rely on so they can cut taxes for their billionaire backers. = Peter, House Republicans are dutifully falling in line with Donald Trump and J.D. Vance’s radical agenda. That’s why they’re putting forward a plan to slash trillions of dollars from programs working families depend on – like Medicaid, the Affordable Care Act, and anti-hunger programs – so that they can cut taxes for billionaires. = It’s clear that House Republicans are taking orders from Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies. Unlike them, Emilia is in Congress to serve Northeast Ohioans. These cuts would hurt thousands of families in our community, which is why Emilia is standing strong against the extreme House GOP. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Sykes A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. name: VoteVets
subject: Our first ad buy of the year:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re targeting eight Republican Veterans in swing districts over Trump’s call for the United States to occupy Gaza
#
Peter —
VoteVets just put thousands of dollars behind our first advertising campaign of the year.
We’re running them in the Congressional districts of eight Republicans, all Veterans:
* Eli Crane: AZ 2
* Gabe Evans: CO 8
* Mariannette Miller-Meeks: IA 1
* Zach Nunn: IA 3
* John James: MI 10
* Scott Perry: PA 10
* Jen Kiggans: VA 2
* Derrick Van Orden: WI 3

We’re using them to mobilize their constituents and direct them to call and write to demand that they stand against Trump’s calls for the United States to occupy Gaza.
We just finished the longest wars in our nation’s history. We’ll be dealing with the fallout from the War on Terror for the rest of our lives, and VoteVets will not stand by as Trump looks to send American Troops overseas to “nation-build” in Gaza.
VoteVets was founded because our “leaders” lied us into preventable wars and got a bunch of our friends killed. We’re going to do everything we can to prevent another generation of American Troops from suffering the same fate.
This is the core of our mission, and we’re asking you to chip in to help us keep these ads running.
**[Make a donation of $5 and help us keep the GOPs feet to the fire as Trump attempts to drag American Troops into another needless conflict. Anything helps. Every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250207-1-f&t=1&akid=34143%2E3013755%2E0SOFmO)

Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter. Since arriving in Washington, he has been one of the most determined conservatives standing up to Joe Biden’s disastrous policies. **Now, as he prepares for re-election, it’s up to us to make sure he has the support he needs to keep battling for America.**

Before politics, Coach Tuberville built championship teams on the football field. He knows what it takes to win, and he’s brought that same leadership to the Senate. When it comes to standing up for our conservative values, he never backs down from a fight.
---
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=01d8609c3341458ea1bb63ac6a3e5fb4&_e=A9jWp3pXAU39Lr_YjB8CPW9_-TqhmuvntZR30YQ0iLJ_1jMQz8WM-cq6T8E2nr2oJ3AjNMMT0r6HJaV6wxctLGZWAdim3pAf7M_Hx0qrxzvvjVrq-5VOyIRi8KIeMSOqF5NhcFt7751EJJR0porM7bNTC5aWljp3t2d6xahz4j3T8ca2UJbLCa-1XpWfj628UF14mnKppt7mOAoKuvj5x-ed-gMMFJkUCYVyoCOqhKa8-U6z0T3yEYrMQa5OnVq5)
---
He proved that when he took on the Pentagon’s outrageous policy of funding abortion travel with taxpayer dollars. While others stayed silent, Coach Tuberville stood firm. His pressure ultimately forced the Pentagon to reverse course — a major victory for life and for American taxpayers. Now Coach Tuberville is leading the charge to protect women’s sports from being undermined by radical gender ideology. His bill to enshrine President Trump's executive action into law is common sense, but Democrats refuse to accept reality. Thankfully, Coach isn’t afraid to call them out and fight for policies that promote truth and fairness. **Sadly, the Left is already gearing up to take him down. They know how effective he is, and they’ll do everything they can to defeat him in 2026. We can’t let that happen.** **[**Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=01d8609c3341458ea1bb63ac6a3e5fb4&_e=A9jWp3pXAU39Lr_YjB8CPW9_-TqhmuvntZR30YQ0iLJ_1jMQz8WM-cq6T8E2nr2oJ3AjNMMT0r6HJaV6wxctLGZWAdim3pAf7M_Hx0qrxzujebtlf0V3Gcxt-bmiMzg9ZmAvBAmD-e2KZUDrELkcQT2QUxb9srXUOXXyhm31xxO9UwhSwuyZpowHdFqTbyJXXlZauNkdWXscHACZLXE6xbklvKCGIEOt2hKTRLenZR20-w2xsYfl46DDQzIbnrz8)** _The Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him because we don't use gimmicks that secretly redirect huge chunks of your contribution to other committees and digital vendors._ Coach Tuberville has never wavered in his commitment to our values. _**Now, it’s time for us to have his back.**_ [**Support Coach Tuberville today!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=01d8609c3341458ea1bb63ac6a3e5fb4&_e=A9jWp3pXAU39Lr_YjB8CPW9_-TqhmuvntZR30YQ0iLJ_1jMQz8WM-cq6T8E2nr2oJ3AjNMMT0r6HJaV6wxctLGZWAdim3pAf7M_Hx0qrxzt_Oxp4bm8VB2QwZ3t9YWhcwe7Z2ym-PccfuDNKWpZ1LvnviUEuOjBF55YwaMnQtVvuXiUFhi5ekJkxvbHAOwiDyGOQ_iTIZ8VGvpy_cpJdDgyU22304LWd3lBybY87Qca0OYiWb8XHFRpVX7i6xEfc) Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: I am staying in the fight, and I’m asking you to do the same
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737115/526905552/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQyOWNhYi04M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYEj2TSNWXwXOUoso1bxcHrs4Igb_7bsMNAsa9rBRSM=) I want to be clear about this. I ran for Congress to fight for freedom, opportunity, and dignity for every single American — and I’m going to keep doing exactly that. I’m going to keep fighting **for our Constitution, for accountability, and for the rule of law**. Every single day, every way I can. I’m going to keep fighting for an economy that **puts the needs of working families first** , before the profits of billionaires like Elon Musk. (And I’m fighting to keep him the hell away from your private data.) I’m going to keep fighting for **the freedom to choose, the freedom to vote, and the freedom to be who you are and love whoever you love**. I’m going to use every tool I’ve got to fight back against the chaos the Trump administration is inflicting on the American people, because it’s causing **real harm to millions of people** — seniors missing meals, patients losing access to their clinical trials, Head Start classrooms closing their doors on young families. The list keeps going. Here’s what that means: It means **voting no on EVERY effort to hurt working Americans**. It means **supporting legal fights** to stop President Trump and Elon Musk’s illegal actions in the courts. We’ve already seen some success here, but it isn’t enough. It means making clear, in no uncertain terms, that I will **ALWAYS stand with LGBTQ+ Americans** no matter how much Trump and his right-wing allies try to vilify and scapegoat them. It means **spreading the word** — loudly, clearly, and repeatedly — about Trump’s illegal actions, so that people have a clear understanding of how his actions harm them. And it means getting to work NOW on winning the next election — because flipping the House blue is one of the most powerful ways we can fight back against Trump’s agenda. **I’m asking you to join me in these fights, too — because winning will take all of us. Spread the word in your community. Call your senators and members of Congress and tell them to stand up for the rule of law. Support nonprofit organizations that are fighting for the causes you hold most dear. And get involved in the fight to win the 2026 midterms, because even though they’re not until next year, the work has already started.** More to come soon, but for now, thanks for staying in the fight. Have a great weekend. -Andrea | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737117/526905554/-533866197?refcode=email_020725_fight-back&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQyOWNhYi04M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYEj2TSNWXwXOUoso1bxcHrs4Igb_7bsMNAsa9rBRSM=)
---

| This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://action.andreasalinasfororegon.com/a/unsubscribe?unsubscribedata=q6%2BzDREKlenUwhUV%2F%2B%2B9KYPBRuE6hXTIkr%2BYE3xhOgXoFSdlJKsT2ULmjD0dOidna49UVrAB4krfhrXYw8BB7m4ZZyCbVsADkLV4aXnGCY2cfcjxXKvnzZwFyHUZxWAOyns1VC5dmLbapSCmy8ZQMlE7RNw%2BL3HOaQF5VpkK9TJLNO4JL5keh5ZJQSmkE%2F5apQk54SJFLJKg0nqVIKPnrhFYdsrWiYEJypmQEKo9fzvG3yqPEqK93qiV2bEK%2BgYU73qvJi1C6eD8JizRQkOuAG4gRIEZvFFfzJIC%2Fg00hGp2n2zfi6VP9JomtFozncHM4tDtMBoE2QZcdPfDF5wj1jDF%2FYqEZLT8ky8u7Bg0zovbAIkJXAM9Chi0%2FG8elxOF28BoieAoTYWjTvUEgv0y3%2BRRNlA8FggXMQpCSnyoO1A%3D).** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737119/526905556/-1080040549?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQyOWNhYi04M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYEj2TSNWXwXOUoso1bxcHrs4Igb_7bsMNAsa9rBRSM=)

And it means getting to work NOW on winning the next election — because flipping the House blue is one of the most powerful ways we can fight back against Trump’s agenda. I’m asking you to join me in these fights, too — because winning will take all of us. Spread the word in your community. Call your senators and members of Congress and tell them to stand up for the rule of law. Support nonprofit organizations that are fighting for the causes you hold most dear. And get involved in the fight to win the 2026 midterms, because even though they’re not until next year, the work has already started. More to come soon, but for now, thanks for staying in the fight. Have a great weekend. -Andrea | | = | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States

name: Ritchie
subject: Blatantly unconstitutional and wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Let me explain >>

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737140/526905776/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFmZDBjNy04M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YmWRFZJbKA5jOvzBgAeqKciadOQAdOFUTnhrgQZVTqE=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. I’d like you to give a short history lesson:

In 1898, in _Wong Kim Ark v. United States,_ the Supreme Court affirmed that the son of noncitizens — who were at the time rendered ineligible for naturalization under the discriminatory Chinese Exclusion Act of 1882 — had a birthright to citizenship.

The Court based the citizenship of Wong Kim Ark not on the immigration status of his parents, but on the place of his birth: _the United States of America._

**127 years ago, the Supreme Court spoke clearly on the issue of birthright citizenship.__Now, Donald Trump is trying to change this.__**

Peter, I want to make a few things clear:
1. Birthright citizenship is guaranteed by the 14th Amendment to the US Constitution.
2. President Trump’s Executive Order is blatantly unconstitutional. It cannot and will not be allowed to stand.

**Peter, whether it’s attempting to end birthright citizenship or altering the Constitution so he can run for a third term, Trump has made it clear that he has little regard for our rule of law. Now, we must _all_ do our part to fight back.**

[These are trying times for our Democracy, and I’ll do everything I can to fight back — but I can’t do it alone. Will you join me by chipping in $3 or $7 towards my people-powered movement today? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737141/526905804/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250207_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFmZDBjNy04M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YmWRFZJbKA5jOvzBgAeqKciadOQAdOFUTnhrgQZVTqE=) | **[$10,000 WEEKLY GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO JOIN RITCHIE IN THE FIGHT FOR OUR DEMOCRACY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737142/526905805/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250207_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFmZDBjNy04M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YmWRFZJbKA5jOvzBgAeqKciadOQAdOFUTnhrgQZVTqE=)**

clean_body: Let me explain >> | = Peter, it’s Ritchie. I’d like you to give a short history lesson: In 1898, in Wong Kim Ark v. United States, the Supreme Court affirmed that the son of noncitizens — who were at the time rendered ineligible for naturalization under the discriminatory Chinese Exclusion Act of 1882 — had a birthright to citizenship. The Court based the citizenship of Wong Kim Ark not on the immigration status of his parents, but on the place of his birth: the United States of America. 127 years ago, the Supreme Court spoke clearly on the issue of birthright citizenship.Now, Donald Trump is trying to change this. Peter, I want to make a few things clear: 1. Birthright citizenship is guaranteed by the 14th Amendment to the US Constitution. 2. President Trump’s Executive Order is blatantly unconstitutional. It cannot and will not be allowed to stand. Peter, whether it’s attempting to end birthright citizenship or altering the Constitution so he can run for a third term, Trump has made it clear that he has little regard for our rule of law. ---
**Neighbors,** The fight to save Bill Evans Field is not over. During a recent community meeting, Councilwoman McKenzie stated that she expected Bill Evans Field to be a topic of discussion at the next Business & Industrial Development Authority (BIDA) meeting. We suspect they will discuss the sale of the field and we need to be there.

### **Where We Stand:**
* **Creed Acquisitions,** the developer chosen to buy the field for apartments, **missed their deadline.**
* **BIDA rejected** extending their time, a win for the community.
* **Now, the issue may be back on the table.
**

### **Why It Matters:**
Bill Evans Field isn’t just land—it’s a historic green space that has shaped Major League talent, provided a home for local baseball, and offered a safe place for generations of kids. Morehouse College and MLB great Marquis Grissom have proposed a **$2 million investment** to preserve and enhance it for future athletes and families. This is about more than just baseball. It’s about **protecting our community’s future
**
|
---
| [ ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NzAzOTgxODI3NDkxNDAxLFwiclwiOjE0NTcwMzk5MjM3NTExNzQxOH0iLCJzIjoiN2I4N2VlNjljNjk4M2FmYiJ9)
---
|
---
****Get Into the Facts:**** There’s been **a lot of misinformation** about Bill Evans Field. Let’s set the record straight: ❌ **Myth:** College Park kids don’t use the field. ✔ **Fact:** Kids in College Park **do** use this field. It’s designed for **older players—high school, college, and beyond** —who need a regulation-sized field. Without it, aspiring athletes lose opportunities to play at higher levels. ❌ **Myth:** Morehouse never seriously proposed a plan for the field. ✔ **Fact:** Morehouse **tried to bring a proposal to the city** —but an email from Councilwoman McKenzie **shows she instructed someone to remove it from the agenda.** Morehouse has continued to try to engage, but the city has refused to connect.

### **Take Action:**
We need to show up and speak up. **Your presence at this meeting could make the difference.** 📅 **Date:** Wednesday, February 12, 2025
📍 **Location:** Georgia International Convention Center
2000 Convention Center Concourse, College Park, GA 30337
⏰ **Time:** 6:30PM

Arrive early to **engage with your BIDA Representatives** _(your neighbors)_ and express why you what to keep this beloved greenspace in the community.
**
Bring an appetite.** BIDA always serves an _**AMAZING FREE DINNER**_ for those who attend the meetings. Together, we can ensure Bill Evans Field remains a **place of opportunity, not lost to development deals made behind closed doors.**[**

Email your BIDA Board Representatives**](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NzAzOTgxODMzNzgyODU5LFwiclwiOjE0NTcwMzk5MjM3NTExNzQxOH0iLCJzIjoiZmIyODExNmFkYTYxNWY0NyJ9) _(our neighbors)_

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: The Super Bowl and Coming Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral]
Hi Friend,
While we await the big game on Sunday (Go Birds!), I wanted to share with you my speech during Thursday's City Council session about the importance and value of this momentous celebration for Philadelphia and for each of us.
Sports have a unique power to bring people together , regardless of race, ethnicity, gender, or political beliefs. When we come together to cheer for our teams, we put aside differences and share in a collective experience—one of pride, passion, and community.
As we approach the Super Bowl this Sunday, we see two teams from different regions, different cultures, but the same goal: excellence. The Philadelphia Eagles, represent the heart and resilience of our city, reminding us that teamwork, perseverance, and unity lead to success.
In our current political climate where some are working to disenfranchise and divide us, we must hold onto what unites us. Just as we stand side by side in stadiums and living rooms to cheer for the Eagles, we must stand together in our communities to defend our rights and our democracy.
The teamwork, resilience, and unity we celebrate in sports must carry over into our fight for justice and equity . Just as athletes train, strategize, and execute to win, we must organize, vote, and advocate to ensure our voices are heard. If we can come together for our teams, we can certainly come together for our future.
Whether you’re an Eagles fan or just in it for commercials and halftime show, we all crave moments of connection and shared joy. This joy and unity is what can carry us forward—beyond the game , beyond the political cycle, and into a stronger, more inclusive city.
Enjoy the Super Bowl and remember: the real work happens off the field. Stay engaged, stay informed, and stay active in your community. Together, we can ensure that unity, justice, and progress win—on and off the field.
Click HERE to watch in full [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DFwOhlqpEPz/?igsh=eDVkb29pYzVleXd5]
Go Birds!
Nina
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106735/images/NA%20Eagles.png]

Peter,we know that the news these days is overwhelming. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101737621/526907267/553781765?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250207_FR_Headlines_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTc3NjMxMS04NWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iuu0hHYd1GOcdSM_ia3hme_Jlt9SwOLNb7qd7NtuKw=) From rising prices due to tariffs, to attacks on LGBTQ+ people, to deportations, to threats to the Constitution itself, and more, Donald Trump’s first weeks in office have left the country in chaos and fear.

clean_body: | | Peter,we know that the news these days is overwhelming. = From rising prices due to tariffs, to attacks on LGBTQ+ people, to deportations, to threats to the Constitution itself, and more, Donald Trump’s first weeks in office have left the country in chaos and fear. We’re with you. This isn’t easy. It’s heartbreaking. But this is our time to work harder than ever. This is our time to take that fear and anger and turn it into action. From local elections to the state Supreme Court elections, we have a chance to put up roadblocks to Trump’s mission, but we have to put in the work.= | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We successfully kept extremism out of our state in 2024, and we need to do that again in November. We can’t be complacent, and we can’t block out politics, no matter how hard it is. Our fight is now. From now until November 4th, we need your help to put in the work and elect Democratic Justices and judges to these seats. = Thank you, PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and **! name: Tina Kotek
subject: Reaching our climate action goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, from my days as Speaker of the Oregon House to the past two years as Governor, I’ve been proud to fight for strong policies and investments to address climate change. I believe, at my core, that we have to be good stewards of the planet, and that **our state and our nation can and should do more to fight climate change.** Even in the face of a federal administration that is determined to roll back the progress that’s been made, I’m determined to stay the course, fight back, and keep pushing forward – and that means addressing climate change holistically by keeping energy rates affordable and rapidly transitioning to renewable energy. Donald Trump and his anti-climate allies are sowing chaos and confusion, but here in Oregon, we’re not flinching. Federal climate funds that were allocated and promised to Oregon should be respected for what Oregonians want to do with our tax dollars. [_**I’ll always fight for our planet's future, Peter. If you’re committed to fighting for an environment we’re proud to pass down to the next generation, can you pitch in to help my team reach our grassroots contribution goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101738935/526912047/763240580?amount=&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTQ2ZDE0Ny04N2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elzFxGjNbIM7IulCWJjge0AhgaGpBoV3pEiNCdP_wCA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101738936/526912050/763240580?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTQ2ZDE0Ny04N2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elzFxGjNbIM7IulCWJjge0AhgaGpBoV3pEiNCdP_wCA=)

clean_body: | Peter, from my days as Speaker of the Oregon House to the past two years as Governor, I’ve been proud to fight for strong policies and investments to address climate change. I believe, at my core, that we have to be good stewards of the planet, and that our state and our nation can and should do more to fight climate change. Even in the face of a federal administration that is determined to roll back the progress that’s been made, I’m determined to stay the course, fight back, and keep pushing forward – and that means addressing climate change holistically by keeping energy rates affordable and rapidly transitioning to renewable energy. Donald Trump and his anti-climate allies are sowing chaos and confusion, but here in Oregon, we’re not flinching. Federal climate funds that were allocated and promised to Oregon should be respected for what Oregonians want to do with our tax dollars. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Now’s not the time to let up, and with your support, we can reach our climate goals. Thank you! Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

Peter,

As you know, leaders come from every place and every background imaginable. Is there a rising star in your community? Now is your chance to celebrate her on a national level!

Every year, EMILYs List recognizes a woman currently serving in a state or local office with our **Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award**. This award highlights a leader with a promising career in public service, and honors her for showing the same dedication, determination, and commitment as our award's namesake.

[**We want to hear from you, Peter! Nominate a woman serving at the state or local level in your community for a 2025 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101739062/526912355/1780037799?sourceid=1055684&refcode=WUENE210_20250207_RisingStarNomsOpen_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYwMDA1Ni04N2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zNnDmn7sX4QP_IGzQPv4r8PTuz3xJDiWsSBZvrgWbo=&emci=0c7a2b10-86e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=f0600056-87e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=5177934)

The recipient of the 2025 Rising Star Award will not only be honored at our annual We Are EMILY event this spring, but will also know that the millions-strong EMILYs List community sees her work and has her back!

Past recipients have included former Georgia state Rep. **Bee Nguyen** , Rep. **Ayanna Pressley (MA-07)** , Harris County, Texas Judge **Lina Hidalgo** , and Rep. **Emilia Sykes (OH-13)**. These women have made a huge difference in their cities, states, and our country.

We are so excited to find and honor our next Rising Star, but first, we need your help to find her!**[Nominate a Democratic pro-choice woman serving in public office for this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award: ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101739067/526912358/1560774316?sourceid=1055684&refcode=WUENE210_20250207_RisingStarNomsOpen_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYwMDA1Ni04N2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zNnDmn7sX4QP_IGzQPv4r8PTuz3xJDiWsSBZvrgWbo=&emci=0c7a2b10-86e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=f0600056-87e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=5177934)**
[NOMINATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101739071/526912363/1780037799?sourceid=1055684&refcode=WUENE210_20250207_RisingStarNomsOpen_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYwMDA1Ni04N2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zNnDmn7sX4QP_IGzQPv4r8PTuz3xJDiWsSBZvrgWbo=&emci=0c7a2b10-86e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=f0600056-87e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=5177934)

Emily Parés (she/her/hers)

This unelected, unvetted, unconfirmed individual has been given the authority to refashion our government and our democracy in his own horrifying image.

And worst of all, Mike Johnson and his MAGA House Majority will rubber-stamp whatever “President” Trump and Elon Musk demand.

The only way to put a stop to their horrific agenda and save what’s left of our country is to defeat these extremists at the ballot box next year. I’m already working to do just that, and I’m counting on your help now more than ever. This is what happens when you put a conman convicted felon into the White House... HE DOES NOT FOLLOW BY THE LAW.

We can’t sit on the sidelines and watch as he destroys our democracy.

Courage is not defined by where you stand in times of comfort but by where you stand in times of discomfort. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me and Maxwell Frost in the fight against Donald Trump and Elon Musk before it’s too late. >> (http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/oDSriItKwOyCYiWvIV35og~~/AAPPABA~/A6sm5srMnErTp5GWLpWkShXPeiiu4ccnt1f8GwISf2V8S80DvN_vnYHS0yxwff1lsU1jEzaZ3VrjuL3UOAHv95bGZHDm7rBEw5eyuWU9veMtQqlJYUhinTLhsmp8c1M86ITZRdF0PPChXS-HqFPfIlw1XxAgHztUfaEcZyjQn2qDctNB_xrGupwqPurUaCZhSOq9jiDYdpWotRZX3MTqzA~~)

name: AOTL Census Watch
subject: Just because the cards are stacked against us

body:
We must fight back to protect the 2030 Census and ensure an accurate count and fair representation.
|
---

Peter — In the last few weeks, there has been a flurry of attacks targeting a fair count in the U.S. Census.
It’s a lot to keep up with, so here’s a quick recap:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101740619/526917259/508201740?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_CensusHdlns_email_20250207-AOTL-Tier1-CensusHdlns_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250207-AOTL-Tier1-CensusHdlns_&utm_campaign=CensusHdlns&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyYjIwNWYxLTg5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cKkc0HgRVu7zfRwB0kWPez1Q_bdJAmeOEsDAJPwyHTM=)

With the Census Bureau Director position now open for Trump’s nominee, the Trump administration has another potential pathway to undermine our democracy.
The Census is the foundation for redistricting. Without an accurate count — if the administration is successful at excluding traditionally undercounted people like communities of color, the LGBTQ community, and Native communities — it will be impossible to create fair maps that truly represent the communities who live there.
**But just because the cards are stacked against us doesn’t mean we’ll back down without a fight.**
Before the last census, our grassroots movement successfully blocked Trump from adding a manipulative and racist citizenship question. And with you by our side, we can stop his attacks once again.

clean_body: We must fight back to protect the 2030 Census and ensure an accurate count and fair representation. | Peter — In the last few weeks, there has been a flurry of attacks targeting a fair count in the U.S. Census. It’s a lot to keep up with, so here’s a quick recap: = With so much at stake, we must fight back to protect the 2030 Census — just like our movement was able to defend the 2020 Census from the first Trump administration — and ensure an accurate count that leads to fair representation.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = With the Census Bureau Director position now open for Trump’s nominee, the Trump administration has another potential pathway to undermine our democracy. The Census is the foundation for redistricting. Without an accurate count — if the administration is successful at excluding traditionally undercounted people like communities of color, the LGBTQ community, and Native communities — it will be impossible to create fair maps that truly represent the communities who live there. But just because the cards are stacked against us doesn’t mean we’ll back down without a fight. Before the last census, our grassroots movement successfully blocked Trump from adding a manipulative and racist citizenship question. name: Sen. Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible
body:
I need to hear from you directly.
I'm counting on your response. // I need to hear from you directly.
| | |
---
Friend, two weeks ago, Donald Trump was inaugurated for his second term in the White House.

Listen, I get it – it's tempting to tune out this moment and disengage from updates about this administration. But with Republican majorities in Congress and a Supreme Court that's been stacked with ultraconservative justices, Trump has more power than ever to implement his most dangerous policies.
**That means we cannot tune out. We cannot disengage. The stakes are too high – and it's exactly what Trump is counting on. Because if we bury our heads in the sand, he has a clear path to do whatever he wants – completely unchecked.**
So we _must_ fight to hold Trump and his allies accountable. We _must_ fight to defend our fundamental freedoms. And we _must _fight for a better future for our families. I'm not saying it will be easy, but I'm ready to put my all into it – and I need you with me.
**My team put together a brand-new focus group for you to share your thoughts with me directly so we can align on our priorities for the first months of the Trump administration.[Since you’re one of my most engaged supporters, will you please take a moment now to share your input in this crucial focus group? It won't take more than a minute.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101740672/526917530/-1133207435?code=jtk3067-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmU0NjVhMy04YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fagz0AKHGzVbrgFXGse4xCfJWGehFVmJaXTZpFq4qao=&emci=76fe858d-d7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=b6e465a3-8ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=858201)**

Dear Friend,
---
**Prayer changes things!** Matthew 21:22 says, _“And whatever you ask in prayer, you will receive, if you have faith.”_ Tonight at 6 PM, we are holding **12 hours of prayer** —a _“12 Hour Burn.”_ As we prepare to launch the **Revive in 25 Tour** tomorrow in New Orleans, we are kicking it off with prayer! Yesterday, we got an early start with my friend **Pastor Lorenzo Sewell, **who joined from the Rotunda of the U.S. Capitol!! We spent ten minutes interceding for America, our leaders, and the future of our nation. Watch the video and join us in prayer as we begin a powerful weekend of **praise, worship, and intercession** for some of the most broken cities in America!
---

What will it take to stop the coup?

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Shut it down](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=156691833&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NjkxODMzLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg5NTcxNjMsImV4cCI6MTc0MTU0OTE2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tJ8DgAW9aPCd63G-UKO05BORNJbxD8_2dAjXFO2SbyM)
### What will it take to stop the coup?
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Feb 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=156691833&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NjkxODMzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODk1NzE2MywiZXhwIjoxNzQxNTQ5MTYzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BTT9bJ43TBFuDaTHSwM3KYPFI5eUKFeLAdbxB43AIrs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e90bf502-c784-41ee-ad0d-1e6d384b5257?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Electrician turning off power for electrical outlet at circuit breaker box. Photo by Scott Habermann, Shutterstock.**
**(Hypothetical scenario)**
**Dispatcher** : 9-1-1. What is your emergency?
**American** : There are people storming the capitol, smashing things, beating up police officers, and rampaging congressional offices.
**Dispatcher** : You need to file a lawsuit. We can't do anything to stop what you are describing.
### That's not what we did on January 6, 2021
Just imagine. It was hard enough to watch the scene on January 6, 2021, especially during the long interval in which there was no resistance, and no call from Trump for his supporters to stand down. If you are blurry on the timeline, it is [here](https://substack.com/redirect/17b61de4-9938-474e-9342-5dbd04e680e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Did the siege start at 8 in the morning when 10,000 people dressed in ballistic gear began to gather? Or when Trump made his speech at the ellipse? Or when the crowds actually breached the Capitol? Doesn't matter. On that day, we knew that the court systems would eventually be called upon to render some form of justice. But we knew not to let it continue while we called lawyers, filed documents in court, and awaited hearings.
As difficult as that day was, by 5:40 pm National Guard troops arrived at the Capitol, and by 11:32pm that day, Congress certified the results of the 2020 election.
We could, perhaps, set the January 28, 2025 [order by Donald Trump to stop payments to federal programs](https://substack.com/redirect/c47da7da-aedb-427b-b0b6-45ec71456d07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as the first day of this new chapter in the coup. Here we are, some 10 days later, and we are still waiting for some definitive halt in the theft of our systems. Much of the work is being carried out by unelected billionaire, Elon Musk, and approximately six young men who are not government employees and who have no security clearance.
### **It was always about Russia**
[Wired.com, on Feb 6, 2025, revealed that one member of Musk's staff, 19-year-old Edward Coristine, has previously solicited a cyberattack-for-hire. ](https://substack.com/redirect/ddc5ab42-de01-4a46-8ad7-30b1998c8c67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)That same Coristine owns an LLC that operates websites with at least two Russian-registered domains. Coristine's company deploys AI bots, specifically into the Russian market.
Many readers struggle to understand what I mean, exactly, when I speak of bots. Has anyone else found their social media, especially Facebook, infiltrated by dubious posts from previously-unherad of profiles? Bingo. You have interacted with bots.
I cannot connect the dots. But I find it too much of a coincidence that Trump's admiration for All-Things-Putin has now manifested in a 19-year-old tech protege who has websites and AI bots in Russia. And that same 19-year-old is still at work, downloading your data, accessing our nation's payment systems, and doing goodness knows what else.
By now, I'm sure the [wide-sweeping collection of data gathered by Musk's musketeers ](https://substack.com/redirect/3cdf96d0-b257-4f39-9504-3b5d2f9c0db8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)has been sent via Starlink to unknown players with no connection to the United States government.
### **Meanwhile ...Trump's supporters are getting the protection of a new task force.**
Bolstered by the Religious Right, and ostentatiously evangelized since the [shooting in Pennsylvania at a campaign rally](https://substack.com/redirect/5b14a395-d49c-444c-a8ed-a30ec4397963?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Trump has declared that he has the protection of God and the mandate of the People.
Musk and his musketeers can proceed, undeterred, ostensibly with the full support of the Republican leaders in Congress and the Cabinet, and with the knowledge that they won a majority of the popular vote in the 2024 election. Trump is far above the fray, girding himself in the proper wash of words that would sooth his Conservative Christian supporters as he announced at a prayer breakfast that he would sign another executive order to keep them all safe. Who wouldn't be loyal to a President who promised to keep them safe?
> "Trump said the task force would be directed to "immediately halt all forms of anti-Christian targeting and discrimination within the federal government, including at the DOJ, which was absolutely terrible, the IRS, the FBI -- terrible -- and other agencies."
> Trump said (U.S. Attorney General Pam) Bondi would also work to "fully prosecute anti-Christian violence and vandalism in our society and to move heaven and earth to defend the rights of Christians and religious believers nationwide." Source: [AP News, Feb 6, 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/17136312-c827-4146-95eb-827bdcf192c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hours later, Trump signed an [Executive Order Establishing a Task Force to Eradicate Anti-Christian Bias](https://substack.com/redirect/c1eb5a66-1c3a-4301-858f-70175a6873a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with marching orders given to cabinet members and agencies to "ensure that any unlawful and improper conduct, policies, or practices that target Christians are identified, terminated, and rectified."
### **Democrats are being Democrats**
Meanwhile, Democrats are busy. We elected a new DNC Chair, Ken Martin. I understand - the man is elected to help Democrats win elections. But I was not jazzed when, five days into the coup, on Feb 4, 2025, DNC Chair Ken Martin had this to say on NPR:
> ...It's hard to slow down what Donald Trump and the Republicans are doing right now. But the best thing we can do to stop Donald Trump's unimpeded power is to win - win elections, and that's why I'm here. And so we have big elections coming up in Virginia and New Jersey this year and other special elections for the U.S. House coming up that could put us back into the majority. And so if we really want to stop Donald Trump right now, and if people are pissed off about what he's doing, the best way to punch back and to fight back is to roll up your sleeves and help us build the infrastructure so we can win elections again. Source: [NPR, Feb 4, 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/621a1321-df4f-4323-905f-d5ef93940d83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
You'll pardon me, Chair Martin, if I do not feel confident or inspired by those remarks. Did I mention that there is a coup going on?
### "It's like they've shown up to a knife fight with a cheese stick."
In any upcoming election, Democrats will have an uphill climb. We are kidding ourselves if we think that the people who voted for Trump in November will "see" his destruction and be motivated to vote blue. After all, if they believe everything about his power, they would be afraid to vote for any other party, particularly now that there is an Executive Order to eradicate "[any unlawful and improper conduct, policies, or practices that target Christians.](https://substack.com/redirect/c1eb5a66-1c3a-4301-858f-70175a6873a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
MAGA voters believe that Donald Trump is the answer to their prayers. Democrats will have difficulty building trust and inspiring confidence among the non-MAGA voters that the Democratic Party has the strength and courage to lead. Witness how many people are volunteering -- not with the Democrats, but with other affiliated groups. They aren't Trumpists, but they aren't really Democrats, either.
Many people are quite angry with the tepid response from Democrats. Writing in The Atlantic, Elaine Godfrey reported on a conversation:
> "I assumed that we would be prepared to meet the moment, and I was wrong," said Shannon Watts, the founder of the gun-control group Moms Demand Action. "It's like they've shown up to a knife fight with a cheese stick." Source: [The Atlantic, Feb 1, 2025. ](https://substack.com/redirect/435a46d0-ba78-46c7-938e-d9a4543b1c2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **I wonder what any of this look like by April, when the Special Elections in Florida take place?**
As you know I was unsuccessful in getting the Democratic party's nomination to the ballot for the Special Election in NY-21. I'm disappointed. But maybe the 15 county chairs did me a huge favor. (For example, I probably would not have written so punchy an article as this, if I were still the candidate.)
I think we will likely have very tough Special Elections in the Spring of 2025. Beyond that, frankly, I am not sure whether we will have elections or not.
Trump has moved to [fire the U.S. Federal Elections Commissioner, Ellen Weintraub](https://substack.com/redirect/a3713b64-4d59-4f68-87ed-8af4d382c6e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They are currently in a "Yes I can", "No you can't" sort of paper war as to how she will be fired.
During the 2024 campaign season, Trump famously said, "[You don't have to vote again](https://substack.com/redirect/74ff5830-272f-4b7e-b317-28d6ef64f89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" because "[We'll have it fixed so good, you're not going to have to vote.](https://substack.com/redirect/74ff5830-272f-4b7e-b317-28d6ef64f89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
On Jan 23, 2025, Congressman Ogles, (R-TN) proposed a 22nd Amendment, allowing a [president to serve a third term](https://substack.com/redirect/a75c9d68-a5db-40ec-a098-19a34c7899ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I suppose we should be encouraged that they are even envisioning a sham election. A third term would effectively give Trump power for the rest of his life. At least, at a current age of 78, another 8 years would seem to support that math.
I'm seriously concerned what this will look like as we move forward.
### "We're not going back," and "There is no going back"
I remember when Kamala Harris sent goosebumps up my arm by saying, "We're not going back." It seemed fresh, progressive, and hopeful for the dawn of a new day. The first time I heard her say it, I took a deep breath, smiled from ear-to-ear, and thought, "We're going to be OK."
Writing months later in the NY Times, Jamelle Bouie said, "There is no going back". Describing a situation in which there is no going back to the old status quo, Bouie made the point that whatever our earlier belief system was, it has been deeply shaken.
> "And so the president's opponents, whoever they are, cannot expect a return to the Constitution as it was. Whatever comes next, should the country weather this attempted hijacking, will need to be a fundamental rethinking of what this system is and what we want out of it. Anything less will set us up for yet another Trump and yet another Musk." Source: [NY Times, Feb 5, 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/646b928e-b3a3-47be-91e7-ef317972ef40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Another Trump? Another Musk? By then, what is left of the country will simply be the most expensive third-world country on the planet.
### **What will it take to stop the coup?**
Ten days in, and the coup continues. Yes - we need the courts to be involved. That is how our system, no matter how temporarily irrelevant it seems, works. Similarly, we wanted court action against the January 6 rioters. (Lots of good that did, since they were pardoned by Trump as soon as he took office.)
### Civil Disobedience
I am encouraged by the numerous protests in front of government buildings. Arms raised in strength, signs that quip courage and outrage. Politicians and activists screaming into crowds.
I was also encouraged that New York's Representative Paul Tonko, along with Sen. Ed Markey (D-Massachusetts) and Rep. Yassamin Ansari (D-Arizona) [went to the Environmental Protection Administration (EPA) Building](https://substack.com/redirect/d73b0286-feb1-4b76-9fa0-00d9a2aa6fee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and attempted to meet with representatives from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and newly-confirmed Director of the EPA, Lee Zeldin (also a New Yorker). The Congressional team was turned away.
As I am writing this, I'm getting updates on [action at the Department of Education building, where a group of representatives were turned away](https://substack.com/redirect/afa0a644-ee1b-4290-92a6-ff3e6240b342?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
"Members yelled "shame" and questioned why members of Congress, some of whom sit on the education committee, were being denied access to a federal building. They were told they did not have an appointment."
### **Really??? You yelled, "Shame"! Is that all ya got?**
Why did they not press on? Were they afraid of being arrested? **In the name of the U.S. Constitution, I wish they had caused a whole lot more of a ruckus.**
I realize I have the luxury of being a civilian sitting at a laptop in another city, but why are they not pressing on?
Our nation has a long history of civil disobedience. Make a plan to get arrested!
Talk to any of a number of protestors who show up regularly with the stated intention of getting arrested. **The senators and representatives could have planned to have staffers there to document the interaction, and supporters ready to bail them out had they been arrested.**
### **It 's time to shut off the breakers or cut the power lines to the buildings where Musk and his crew are working.**
The coup is now in its 10th day. **If this were a physical assault, like January 6, 2021, I should hope that we would have responded in some way other than protests and court filings by now.**
People abroad are dying due to our inability to [stop the closure of USAID](https://substack.com/redirect/c60c84a0-4241-45d2-be89-64b15249d628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Arguably, the federal layoffs have [caused planes to crash](https://substack.com/redirect/cf5451f6-a51f-4466-afec-c5680e723346?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Layoffs, firings, a rising threat of bird flu. This is not going in a positive direction.
**I propose that it is time for Democrats, or Indivisibles, or someone who has both courage and loyalty for our Constitution to flip the breakers or cut the power lines to the federal buildings where Musk and his musketeers are working. Or both. And soon.**
If the buildings were on fire, or if there were a hostage situation, that is exactly what emergency personnel would do.
**Well - we have an emergency. Flip the breakers. Cut the power lines. **
The challenge, admittedly, is that we may not have law enforcement on our side because the Trump administration is the named authority right now. It could get messy very quickly.
I propose these actions, fully aware that they would be provocative and inflammatory to the ruling party.
### **We must realize: our Constitution was not made for this type of assault.**
We can file lawsuits, protest, opine, and wave signs in the streets. But we have a political crisis and a constitutional crisis.
Our Constitution was not made for this type of political crisis. Our Constitution was designed for parties who were fair players, with public service ambitions meant for the benefit of all.
I am not the first to state that our Constitution had limitations when faced with bad actors.
John Adams, our second president, wrote:
> "We have no Government armed with Power capable of contending with human Passions unbridled by morality and Religion...Avarice, Ambition, Revenge or Galantry, would break the strongest Cords of our Constitution as a Whale goes through a Net. Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious People. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other." [John Adams to Massachusetts Militia, 11 October 1798.](https://substack.com/redirect/e0036f4b-c395-4a60-ac38-b2bf82744c75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Shut it down.
The proverbial whale that John Adams spoke of has gone through the net. Flip the breakers. Cut the power cords. Treat this like a physical assault on our government properties and processes.
Shut it down.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District in November 2024. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXVsYWZvcm55LnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.jjgr0yaQBnR9xVPTq_KC_PA78bCynUtbgSQR3y5nNIE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156691833)

clean_body: What will it take to stop the coup? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race What will it take to stop the coup? | | | Feb 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Electrician turning off power for electrical outlet at circuit breaker box. Photo by Scott Habermann, Shutterstock. (Hypothetical scenario) Dispatcher : 9-1-1. What is your emergency? American : There are people storming the capitol, smashing things, beating up police officers, and rampaging congressional offices. Dispatcher : You need to file a lawsuit. We can't do anything to stop what you are describing. That's not what we did on January 6, 2021 Just imagine. It was hard enough to watch the scene on January 6, 2021, especially during the long interval in which there was no resistance, and no call from Trump for his supporters to stand down. If you are blurry on the timeline, it is . Did the siege start at 8 in the morning when 10,000 people dressed in ballistic gear began to gather? Or when Trump made his speech at the ellipse? Or when the crowds actually breached the Capitol? Doesn't matter. On that day, we knew that the court systems would eventually be called upon to render some form of justice. But we knew not to let it continue while we called lawyers, filed documents in court, and awaited hearings. As difficult as that day was, by 5:40 pm National Guard troops arrived at the Capitol, and by 11:32pm that day, Congress certified the results of the 2020 election. We could, perhaps, set the January 28, 2025 as the first day of this new chapter in the coup. Here we are, some 10 days later, and we are still waiting for some definitive halt in the theft of our systems. Much of the work is being carried out by unelected billionaire, Elon Musk, and approximately six young men who are not government employees and who have no security clearance. It was always about Russia same Coristine owns an LLC that operates websites with at least two Russian-registered domains. Coristine's company deploys AI bots, specifically into the Russian market. Many readers struggle to understand what I mean, exactly, when I speak of bots. Has anyone else found their social media, especially Facebook, infiltrated by dubious posts from previously-unherad of profiles? Bingo. You have interacted with bots. I cannot connect the dots. But I find it too much of a coincidence that Trump's admiration for All-Things-Putin has now manifested in a 19-year-old tech protege who has websites and AI bots in Russia. And that same 19-year-old is still at work, downloading your data, accessing our nation's payment systems, and doing goodness knows what else. By now, I'm sure the been sent via Starlink to unknown players with no connection to the United States government. Meanwhile ...Trump's supporters are getting the protection of a new task force. Bolstered by the Religious Right, and ostentatiously evangelized since the , Trump has declared that he has the protection of God and the mandate of the People. Musk and his musketeers can proceed, undeterred, ostensibly with the full support of the Republican leaders in Congress and the Cabinet, and with the knowledge that they won a majority of the popular vote in the 2024 election. Trump is far above the fray, girding himself in the proper wash of words that would sooth his Conservative Christian supporters as he announced at a prayer breakfast that he would sign another executive order to keep them all safe. Who wouldn't be loyal to a President who promised to keep them safe? "Trump said the task force would be directed to "immediately halt all forms of anti-Christian targeting and discrimination within the federal government, including at the DOJ, which was absolutely terrible, the IRS, the FBI -- terrible -- and other agencies." Trump said (U.S. Attorney General Pam) Bondi would also work to "fully prosecute anti-Christian violence and vandalism in our society and to move heaven and earth to defend the rights of Christians and religious believers nationwide." Source: Hours later, Trump signed an , with marching orders given to cabinet members and agencies to "ensure that any unlawful and improper conduct, policies, or practices that target Christians are identified, terminated, and rectified." Democrats are being Democrats Meanwhile, Democrats are busy. We elected a new DNC Chair, Ken Martin. I understand - the man is elected to help Democrats win elections. But I was not jazzed when, five days into the coup, on Feb 4, 2025, DNC Chair Ken Martin had this to say on NPR: ...It's hard to slow down what Donald Trump and the Republicans are doing right now. But the best thing we can do to stop Donald Trump's unimpeded power is to win - win elections, and that's why I'm here. And so we have big elections coming up in Virginia and New Jersey this year and other special elections for the U.S. House coming up that could put us back into the majority. And so if we really want to stop Donald Trump right now, and if people are pissed off about what he's doing, the best way to punch back and to fight back is to roll up your sleeves and help us build the infrastructure so we can win elections again. Source: . You'll pardon me, Chair Martin, if I do not feel confident or inspired by those remarks. Did I mention that there is a coup going on? "It's like they've shown up to a knife fight with a cheese stick." In any upcoming election, Democrats will have an uphill climb. We are kidding ourselves if we think that the people who voted for Trump in November will "see" his destruction and be motivated to vote blue. After all, if they believe everything about his power, they would be afraid to vote for any other party, particularly now that there is an Executive Order to eradicate "" MAGA voters believe that Donald Trump is the answer to their prayers. Democrats will have difficulty building trust and inspiring confidence among the non-MAGA voters that the Democratic Party has the strength and courage to lead. Witness how many people are volunteering -- not with the Democrats, but with other affiliated groups. They aren't Trumpists, but they aren't really Democrats, either. Many people are quite angry with the tepid response from Democrats. Writing in The Atlantic, Elaine Godfrey reported on a conversation: "I assumed that we would be prepared to meet the moment, and I was wrong," said Shannon Watts, the founder of the gun-control group Moms Demand Action. "It's like they've shown up to a knife fight with a cheese stick." Source: I wonder what any of this look like by April, when the Special Elections in Florida take place? As you know I was unsuccessful in getting the Democratic party's nomination to the ballot for the Special Election in NY-21. I'm disappointed. But maybe the 15 county chairs did me a huge favor. (For example, I probably would not have written so punchy an article as this, if I were still the candidate.) I think we will likely have very tough Special Elections in the Spring of 2025. Beyond that, frankly, I am not sure whether we will have elections or not. Trump has moved to . They are currently in a "Yes I can", "No you can't" sort of paper war as to how she will be fired. During the 2024 campaign season, Trump famously said, "" because "" On Jan 23, 2025, Congressman Ogles, (R-TN) proposed a 22nd Amendment, allowing a . I suppose we should be encouraged that they are even envisioning a sham election. A third term would effectively give Trump power for the rest of his life. At least, at a current age of 78, another 8 years would seem to support that math. I'm seriously concerned what this will look like as we move forward. "We're not going back," and "There is no going back" I remember when Kamala Harris sent goosebumps up my arm by saying, "We're not going back." It seemed fresh, progressive, and hopeful for the dawn of a new day. The first time I heard her say it, I took a deep breath, smiled from ear-to-ear, and thought, "We're going to be OK." Writing months later in the NY Times, Jamelle Bouie said, "There is no going back". Describing a situation in which there is no going back to the old status quo, Bouie made the point that whatever our earlier belief system was, it has been deeply shaken. "And so the president's opponents, whoever they are, cannot expect a return to the Constitution as it was. Whatever comes next, should the country weather this attempted hijacking, will need to be a fundamental rethinking of what this system is and what we want out of it. Anything less will set us up for yet another Trump and yet another Musk." Source: Another Trump? Another Musk? By then, what is left of the country will simply be the most expensive third-world country on the planet. What will it take to stop the coup? Ten days in, and the coup continues. Yes - we need the courts to be involved. That is how our system, no matter how temporarily irrelevant it seems, works. Similarly, we wanted court action against the January 6 rioters. (Lots of good that did, since they were pardoned by Trump as soon as he took office.) Civil Disobedience I am encouraged by the numerous protests in front of government buildings. Arms raised in strength, signs that quip courage and outrage. Politicians and activists screaming into crowds. I was also encouraged that New York's Representative Paul Tonko, along with Sen. Ed Markey (D-Massachusetts) and Rep. Yassamin Ansari (D-Arizona) and attempted to meet with representatives from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and newly-confirmed Director of the EPA, Lee Zeldin (also a New Yorker). The Congressional team was turned away. As I am writing this, I'm getting updates on . "Members yelled "shame" and questioned why members of Congress, some of whom sit on the education committee, were being denied access to a federal building. They were told they did not have an appointment." Really??? You yelled, "Shame"! Is that all ya got? Why did they not press on? Were they afraid of being arrested? In the name of the U.S. Constitution, I wish they had caused a whole lot more of a ruckus. I realize I have the luxury of being a civilian sitting at a laptop in another city, but why are they not pressing on? Our nation has a long history of civil disobedience. Make a plan to get arrested! Talk to any of a number of protestors who show up regularly with the stated intention of getting arrested. The senators and representatives could have planned to have staffers there to document the interaction, and supporters ready to bail them out had they been arrested. It 's time to shut off the breakers or cut the power lines to the buildings where Musk and his crew are working. The coup is now in its 10th day. If this were a physical assault, like January 6, 2021, I should hope that we would have responded in some way other than protests and court filings by now. People abroad are dying due to our inability to . Arguably, the federal layoffs have . Layoffs, firings, a rising threat of bird flu. This is not going in a positive direction. I propose that it is time for Democrats, or Indivisibles, or someone who has both courage and loyalty for our Constitution to flip the breakers or cut the power lines to the federal buildings where Musk and his musketeers are working. Or both. And soon. If the buildings were on fire, or if there were a hostage situation, that is exactly what emergency personnel would do. Well - we have an emergency. Flip the breakers. Cut the power lines. The challenge, admittedly, is that we may not have law enforcement on our side because the Trump administration is the named authority right now. It could get messy very quickly. I propose these actions, fully aware that they would be provocative and inflammatory to the ruling party. We must realize: our Constitution was not made for this type of assault.** We can file lawsuits, protest, opine, and wave signs in the streets. But we have a political crisis and a constitutional crisis. Our Constitution was not made for this type of political crisis. Our Constitution was designed for parties who were fair players, with public service ambitions meant for the benefit of all. I am not the first to state that our Constitution had limitations when faced with bad actors. John Adams, our second president, wrote: "We have no Government armed with Power capable of contending with human Passions unbridled by morality and Religion...Avarice, Ambition, Revenge or Galantry, would break the strongest Cords of our Constitution as a Whale goes through a Net. Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious People. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other." Shut it down. The proverbial whale that John Adams spoke of has gone through the net. Flip the breakers. Cut the power cords. Treat this like a physical assault on our government properties and processes. Shut it down. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District in November 2024. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?
