I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=99bba05635734022b91d72694640d040&_e=oHKibiQBbnTYkTE6V3E42PxSHO8JRUx48QB3cYrj9EzFoVowhTWaEZ53-wjNZRk08ugi1vJyG7FYZ05OFqkVJ8OMaU2HE57iwOSxK1G-rePSvQ4zbDcy1rIcQ4wwzryodidBp1XaSIs31RBESLcWLd9lUO1TnKptp77WEXAJdMb6y5xHeco41gOiL7_-D_HdoQUToQoiCF5y5Hp9PIJTGvbJ5kVQOT10hO3D6ksLRJzv826s8Jn3gQTjYWf-ss_ZvXtBzXGU7Nt1ZARrmVPD_YOag85eUUlaT1Zn-V-nWHJXT5oFwLUsgVvhAwAdHC6D5GQystu2HX_aFzSkflUrg01KMknhVr7pJM6bG8lFRNsmtuDpI0HWyan23HtFqG-YgoXNDZS2dIbDfKawXvGirA%3D%3D)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250207-1213-foote&t=1001&akid=1213%2E342411%2Ed7SsLx ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’ll be honest: our grassroots fundraising has taken a hit since the
election and the holiday season.

The momentum we’ve built in January was incredible to see, but now we’re
seeing a dip in engagement. We need to ensure that we can keep up our
Squad’s energy all year long — especially over these next four years.

We want to make sure our Squad is ready to weather every obstacle that
comes our way — whether it’s in the halls of Congress or on the frontlines
of our communities. But that takes consistent support from people like
you, Peter.

So, Peter, we’re reaching out to you with an exclusive opportunity to
power our movement forward. For the cost of a cup of coffee (or tea!), you
can ensure that our Squad has the resources to keep fighting against the
far-right chaos.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19309?c0=svfem-20250207-movement.E_xA5Q&refcode=em20250207-1213&t=1004&akid=1213%2E342411%2Ed7SsLx ]By setting up a recurring monthly donation of just $3, $5, or $10
today, you’ll be part of the team that ensures we’re always ready to take
on whatever comes next.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19309?c0=svfem-20250207-movement.E_xA5Q&refcode=em20250207-1213&t=1005&akid=1213%2E342411%2Ed7SsLx ]Start a monthly donation ››

Together, we’ve already proven that when we unite, we are unstoppable.
Thank you for supporting our Squad.

Together,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1213%2E342411%2Ed7SsLx

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:

If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?t=1&akid=22842%2E4449941%2EwYrg6U) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=2&akid=22842%2E4449941%2EwYrg6U) Top Democrat,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

[**Team, we can’t abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith. Fight for Reform

❌ **DON’T SCROLL AWAY** ❌

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from **_every angle_** in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith.

If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Top Democrat, Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country. But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed. We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal! | We’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Smith must be under immense pressure. Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him. Look, Jack Smith has done an amazing job as special counsel. But the GOP DOESN’T care. They’re attacking Smith and his case from every angle in hopes of shielding Trump from justice! We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith. name: Team Truth to Power
subject: Josh Riley’s getting to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn)
Derek,
Josh Riley narrowly won _one of the most competitive_ House races last November, winning by 2.3 points.
**[Will you help keep Josh in Congress by splitting a donation between his campaign and Truth to Power today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250207-1?refcode=em20250207-39424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39424_3422442_kQnFVn&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn)**
As Democrats look for new messengers in Congress, Josh has been at the forefront of calling out Trump’s BS. When Trump announced the federal funding freeze, Josh called it out for what it is:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250207-1?refcode=em20250207-39424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39424_3422442_kQnFVn&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn)
We need Josh–and more people like him–in Congress fighting for us.
At Truth to Power, we’re making our plan to take back the House in 2026, which means protecting battleground seats like Josh’s and finding more candidates whose messages will resonate with voters.
**[We’re asking you to split a donation of $5 or more between Josh’s campaign and Truth to Power today. Your contribution will help us elect Truth to Power candidates across the country in 2026.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250207-1?refcode=em20250207-39424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39424_3422442_kQnFVn&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250207-1?refcode=em20250207-39424&refcode2=39424_3422442_kQnFVn&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn)
Thank you,
Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250207-39424&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39424_3422442_kQnFVn&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39424%2E3422442%2EkQnFVn).

Elon Musk is one of Donald Trump's closest advisors — **and together, they're dismantling the foundations of our government and democracy.** In Musk's first few weeks in government, he's already begun testing the limits of his power, raising the question:** Is any of this legal? **
---
On day one, Trump created the Department of Government Efficiency and put Musk in charge to cut government waste, and he's wasted no time in doing so. From his speech at Trump's inauguration to his efforts to shut down USAID and the Department of Education, it's clear: **Elon Musk's agenda is EXTREME and DANGEROUS.**
---
**We don't believe out-of-touch billionaires should control our government, friend. Now, we want to know where YOU stand. That's why we're collecting data in real time from 250 top supporters in 43614. Before midnight tonight, tell us:**
---

Please, respond before midnight to ensure your voice is included in our dataset. Do you approve of Elon Musk? | | | | | Elon Musk is one of Donald Trump's closest advisors — and together, they're dismantling the foundations of our government and democracy. In Musk's first few weeks in government, he's already begun testing the limits of his power, raising the question: Is any of this legal? On day one, Trump created the Department of Government Efficiency and put Musk in charge to cut government waste, and he's wasted no time in doing so. From his speech at Trump's inauguration to his efforts to shut down USAID and the Department of Education, it's clear: Elon Musk's agenda is EXTREME and DANGEROUS. We don't believe out-of-touch billionaires should control our government, friend. Now, we want to know where YOU stand. That's why we're collecting data in real time from 250 top supporters in 43614. We cannot allow this unprecedented power grab. **It’s Congress’s job to uphold the Constitution and provide oversight over the executive branch of government** (the president). Thank you. In this new term of Congress, I’m again serving on the House Financial Services Committee and the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform, where I’m committed to advocating for working families and holding the powerful to account. **I will continue to resist harmful policies that violate our constitutional rights and that cut essential programs like Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.**
Always fighting for you,
Rashida

Friend,
Right now, the richest person on Earth is seizing control of $6 trillion in Social Security checks, Medicare, tax refunds, and other payments that our families depend on. Elon Musk’s former staff have infiltrated many federal agencies and locked out federal employees from computer systems with sensitive data about millions of Americans.
We must all push back immediately against this unconstitutional takeover and unprecedented power grab. This week people have been protesting in front of agencies like the Treasury Department, with one activist saying, “This amounts to a coup.” And courageous organizations are fighting back by suing the Trump administration for its illegal and unconstitutional actions.
As your congresswoman, I will keep blocking these attacks even if I have to put my body on the line.**I will do everything in my power to hold this lawless administration accountable. All other congressional Democrats need to step up as well.**
[**Congress cannot go on with business as usual while Donald Trump and Elon Musk illegally seize control of federal agencies and torch the government. Trump and his billionaire friends don’t care about people’s well-being, they care about corporate profits.
With a combined net worth of nearly $1 trillion, the three wealthiest men in America—who sat up front at Trump’s inauguration—have no idea what the majority of Americans experience living paycheck to paycheck. People in my district and around the country are drowning just trying to make ends meet, and **we cannot allow an unelected billionaire to hack our data and cut life-saving programs while enriching himself and the billionaire class**.
Many actions from the Trump administration are clearly unconstitutional, including dismantling federal agencies without congressional approval, cutting funding for essential services already allocated by Congress (which has already delayed federal grant payments to essential programs like Head Start), and more.
**It’s Congress’s job to uphold the Constitution and provide oversight over the executive branch of government** (the president). People protesting outside federal agencies this week have held signs saying “Do your job, Congress.”
[**Add your name to join me in saying that we will do everything in our power to block Trump’s policies and appointees. Together, we must forcefully speak out against policies that harm our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmgWCg5eU0K7H_w-CwZHBBlKQAGwtNrOYIIBCjzUs7Zm_aKbu8RJx5i2W0OmG643mw_rAwiEDmztVkrK0VueIYQUf4IXtdJgVdrhTFLTem0CCy82n1Kp5Q1_n1tot0uKfjyyoWtnB9FzG09jJlWnEZkkUOtlFR5CBeEiiJjM4FHAw8Es_ZGp-zH3tkbcf-vjdFJXUIjRaZBCn4_2pfYWyK4pQkXV7ahWL5093s7ZYNEYL2W1SXeQ3DUepJL80CROyKNh1QpTJHQ3g7xXG05vrQDx67FD__gl3LY6LbEaZAp_z5Ei8SAv_7bPsGWTRFAYOwdyqnqnyL7LksS0EhFKj3NaNJ1X_uCfym_rX9lKD_MPsg_q7rry_oAwUYSgIfvqva-vpqDGhs9CQjRLuHxNS5vDz0LNg_8P4bNZz3ymGZWwd_gctucLfUDtaTcUdVYfsTIfh8Yu0v1y5iYkijt7QCrA/4dt/uL1xDQDESma9TIJs9dOkbQ/h5/h001.bEnAxbcD_qqiIL0pFtXGZd1-Alza68_j3fvLIcIvzNM)
Thank you for taking action. Although this frightening violence is harming our communities, **we’ve already seen the Trump administration walk back a number of proposals after Americans spoke up. Remember: Trump won less than 50% of the popular vote. And as Senator Bernie Sanders reminded us,****_“While Republicans may control the House and the Senate, their margins are slim. They are susceptible to citizen outrage.”_**
We will resist together. We will boycott, march, outwork the hate, out-organize the billionaire class, and free our communities from the cruelty of these policies and actions. Together we have power.
Always fighting for you,
Rashida

clean_body: Democrats in Congress must fight back with everything they can to block this unconstitutional power grab. | | | Friend, Unelected billionaires like Elon Musk are seizing control of federal government agencies, including accessing sensitive data and payment systems that send trillions of dollars to millions of American households each year including Social Security checks, Medicare, and tax refunds that families rely on. We cannot allow this unprecedented power grab. It’s Congress’s job to uphold the Constitution and provide oversight over the executive branch of government (the president). | Thank you. In this new term of Congress, I’m again serving on the House Financial Services Committee and the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform, where I’m committed to advocating for working families and holding the powerful to account. I will continue to resist harmful policies that violate our constitutional rights and that cut essential programs like Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. Always fighting for you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Thu, Feb 6, 2025 Subject: Stop Elon Musk’s takeover and attempted coup: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Right now, the richest person on Earth is seizing control of $6 trillion in Social Security checks, Medicare, tax refunds, and other payments that our families depend on. Elon Musk’s former staff have infiltrated many federal agencies and locked out federal employees from computer systems with sensitive data about millions of Americans. We must all push back immediately against this unconstitutional takeover and unprecedented power grab. This week people have been protesting in front of agencies like the Treasury Department, with one activist saying, “This amounts to a coup.” And courageous organizations are fighting back by suing the Trump administration for its illegal and unconstitutional actions. As your congresswoman, I will keep blocking these attacks even if I have to put my body on the line.I will do everything in my power to hold this lawless administration accountable. All other congressional Democrats need to step up as well. Trump and his billionaire friends don’t care about people’s well-being, they care about corporate profits. With a combined net worth of nearly $1 trillion, the three wealthiest men in America—who sat up front at Trump’s inauguration—have no idea what the majority of Americans experience living paycheck to paycheck. People in my district and around the country are drowning just trying to make ends meet, and we cannot allow an unelected billionaire to hack our data and cut life-saving programs while enriching himself and the billionaire class. Many actions from the Trump administration are clearly unconstitutional, including dismantling federal agencies without congressional approval, cutting funding for essential services already allocated by Congress (which has already delayed federal grant payments to essential programs like Head Start), and more. It’s Congress’s job to uphold the Constitution and provide oversight over the executive branch of government (the president). People protesting outside federal agencies this week have held signs saying “Do your job, Congress.” Thank you for taking action. Although this frightening violence is harming our communities, we’ve already seen the Trump administration walk back a number of proposals after Americans spoke up. Remember: Trump won less than 50% of the popular vote. And as Senator Bernie Sanders reminded us,**“While Republicans may control the House and the Senate, their margins are slim. They are susceptible to citizen outrage.” We will resist together. We will boycott, march, outwork the hate, out-organize the billionaire class, and free our communities from the cruelty of these policies and actions. Together we have power. Always fighting for you, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Rhena Hicks
subject: 💸Budget Sunday💸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://freedomva.org/ [https://freedomva.org/]
Last Sunday was Budget Sunday, the day when the House of Delegates and Senate money committees released their respective budget amendments. Here’s what our Co-Executive Director, Ryan O’Toole, said regarding the amendments:
“While Governor Youngkin chooses to ignore the reckless threats from the Trump administration that could throw Virginia’s economy into crisis, we are glad to see the House and Senate money committees prioritize immediate relief for hardworking Virginia families. The governor’s introduced budget amendments failed to recognize the severity of the state’s cost of living crisis, especially the need for affordable housing and health care. We’re especially pleased to see:
* the House adopt a first-time homebuyers’ grant program, a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, and advance one of the strongest Paid Family and Medical Leave programs in the country; and
* Both chambers increase the state’s standard deduction and refundable earned income tax credit, and expand access to affordable childcare.
“As budget negotiations continue, we urge conferees to consider additional ways for Virginians to keep more of what they earn, including a child tax credit and a sales tax exemption for car seats. We also urge conferees to reject state revenue streams built from gaming ventures like skill games that prey on hardworking people and instead generate revenue through a more fair tax code by closing corporate tax loopholes and taxing the ultra-wealthy. We look forward to continuing to work with conferees to advance a fair budget that funds the right priorities to ensure hardworking Virginians can get ahead.”
The 2025 General Assembly is moving quickly, and we’re so pleased with the progress towards affordability that we’ve seen this session!

name: AOC
subject: Flood the zone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Call your reps.
#
What authoritarian regimes often do is ‘flood the zone,’ or do so much at once that you feel paralyzed. It's important to understand that the shock you feel right now is the point.
**We can flood the zone with people.**
The Trump administration is currently trying to get their nominees approved. No Democrat should be voting to advance Trump's nominees while this is going on.
**There has to be a political price to pay**. We have a responsibility as a party to block everything while they're setting a literal match to the federal government. And we need to be a pain in the ass.
Do not assume that your Senator is not going to vote for these nominees, if you are a person that has a Democratic Senator. **Give them a call. Keep calling.**
Tell them, “I do not want you to vote to advance or approve any of these nominees while all this stuff is going on.”
In the House, Republican members that are in districts that Biden carried in 2020 _do_ care what you think and how pissed off you are.
These are things that they can lose elections over. **If we start sending the message that they can now, then we can start getting some traction**.
If you have a Republican representative, you should be making a phone call. They need to know you are paying attention. They need to know that you are pissed off. If they don't think that you're pissed off, they're going to go faster.
[Call your Representatives →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/em-20250107-call/?source=em20250207-8093&t=1&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi)
If you think government is like a George Foreman grill, and you can just set it and forget it — I regret to inform you that is not how participatory democracy works.
We have to lock in, and **start getting people quaking in their electoral boots**.
Even if your call makes them think twice, **it is effective**. Use our leverage. Make them fight for every single step.
The slower they go, the less they can break.
In this house, we jiggle every door handle to find an opportunity. You have got to try a hundred times, sometimes, to make _one_ work. **It's worth it.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250207-2.pphkje&refcode=em20250207-8093-P_ORG_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250207-2.pphkje&refcode=em20250207-8093-P_ORG_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250207-2?refcode=em20250207-8093-P_ORG_CTR_CTR&t=22&refcode2=8093_2526796_7A4eNi&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250207-8093-P_ORG_CTR_CTR&t=23&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=8093%2E2526796%2E7A4eNi)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

We have a responsibility as a party to block everything while they're setting a literal match to the federal government. And we need to be a pain in the ass. Do not assume that your Senator is not going to vote for these nominees, if you are a person that has a Democratic Senator. Give them a call. Keep calling. Tell them, “I do not want you to vote to advance or approve any of these nominees while all this stuff is going on.” In the House, Republican members that are in districts that Biden carried in 2020 do care what you think and how pissed off you are. These are things that they can lose elections over. If we start sending the message that they can now, then we can start getting some traction. If you have a Republican representative, you should be making a phone call. They need to know you are paying attention. They need to know that you are pissed off. If they don't think that you're pissed off, they're going to go faster. If you think government is like a George Foreman grill, and you can just set it and forget it — I regret to inform you that is not how participatory democracy works. We have to lock in, and start getting people quaking in their electoral boots. Even if your call makes them think twice, it is effective. Use our leverage. Make them fight for every single step. The slower they go, the less they can break. In this house, we jiggle every door handle to find an opportunity. You have got to try a hundred times, sometimes, to make one work. It's worth it. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

Dear friends, Gay Valimont here, candidate for FL-1 and advocate for the rights for all.**I need your help before the special elections roll out on April 1st.** Art has long been a powerful force against oppression. In Cuba, musician Carlos Varela—known as the _Poet of Havana_ —has used his lyrics to challenge political hardship and government overreach. **His music speaks to the struggles of everyday people caught in a system that suppresses free expression and silences dissent. A system that now forces many to flee to yet another government that is rejecting them: America under Trump.**
---
---
Varela’s story is a stark reminder of what happens when governments place their own power above the rights of the people. **We see it in authoritarian regimes abroad—but we must also recognize the dangerous shifts happening right here in the United States.** Trump and his allies want to control what we say, what we learn, and even what we believe. With executive orders targeting education, purges of civil servants, and attacks on a free press, they’re chipping away at our democracy. I refuse to stand by while politicians erode our freedoms. My campaign is about putting power back in the hands of the people—not the elite, not the politically connected, and certainly not those who think they can rule by fear. **Just like Varela uses his music to speak truth, I will use my voice in Congress to fight for the rights of every American.**
---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Galveston biolabs disclose mishaps that potentially exposed workers to infectious diseases,** " Houston Chronicle's **Brian Rausch** -- "The mistake happened in an instant.

Inside one of the biosafety level 4 labs at the Galveston National Laboratory - where scientists wear full-body moonsuit-like gear as they study some of the world's most dangerous microbes - a lab worker was uncapping a needle.

The worker had just been handling a guinea pig that was infected with Chapare virus, which has caused [deadly outbreaks](https://substack.com/redirect/38067919-2f72-4a8c-91bf-ac78ef611a99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of a hemorrhagic fever disease [in Bolivia](https://substack.com/redirect/190ac068-5528-4d27-ad15-5d3c529ebcce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and for which there is [no treatment](https://substack.com/redirect/54fae5dc-0b4c-4c72-bf73-8333917d0637?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) other than fluids and supportive care.

As the lab worker uncapped the new needle, it accidentally plunged through their layered gloves and into their finger.

The mishap last August is one of three incidents last year where workers were potentially exposed to infectious pathogens inside research labs at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston, according to an annual biosafety incident summary lab officials released this week.

UTMB officials said none of the lab workers were infected in the 2024 safety breaches, which also involved an incident in October in with [anthrax bacteria](https://substack.com/redirect/3bd571b9-c8c2-4ef4-97d8-f708dad8111d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which can cause serious disease but is not contagious, and in December with [Mayaro virus](https://substack.com/redirect/b846313e-7e0c-4ea7-a61f-b65a1902df5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which is spread by mosquitos and tends to cause a mild disease that includes fever, aches and a rash.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/37770678-56ad-401b-90ba-515704e4ceb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Although lab officials classified each incident as a potential exposure to the workers, they said the risks in each case were very low because of the many layers of precautions used in the labs.

"Because of the practices we have, we've never had a person become ill working in a lab," **Gene Olinger** , director of the Galveston National Laboratory, told Houston Landing.

The Galveston National Lab and the UTMB-Galveston campus' **Robert E. Shope** , MD, Laboratory are among only [about 15 lab facilities in North America](https://substack.com/redirect/bb356ce1-16e2-4a3e-a511-11b94e8f72d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that have labs operating at biosafety level 4 (BSL-4), the highest level of containment used for studying the most dangerous pathogens.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/37770678-56ad-401b-90ba-515704e4ceb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For many years, UTMB has posted a list with synopsis information about incidents involving potential worker exposures at these two BSL-4 lab facilities and also the campus' lower level research labs that study less dangerous pathogens. UTMB officials updated the list late Tuesday, adding the three 2024 incidents to their [previous disclosure](https://substack.com/redirect/a5a1fb89-2836-4a68-b610-0c571317b120?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of 66 other incidents dating back to 2002.

The list does not include research lab incidents where UTMB officials determined there was no potential exposure. Over the years, [the disclosed potential exposures](https://substack.com/redirect/a5a1fb89-2836-4a68-b610-0c571317b120?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have included needlesticks, cuts, animal bites, spilled specimens and a wide range of pathogens including Marburg virus, Nipah virus, Dengue virus, Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus, West Nile virus and SARS-CoV-2. But none have resulted in any worker becoming infected, lab officials emphasized.

"I always talk about trust and transparency," Olinger said. "Trust is we tell you that we have measures in place to protect the community. Transparency is saying this is what's happening and sharing it."

Each of the three incidents disclosed for 2024 had a low likelihood for the worker becoming infected, lab officials told the Landing. But each was treated as a potential exposure out of "an abundance of caution," they said.

During the Chapare virus experiment where the needlestick incident occurred on Aug. 13, the lab worker had disinfected their gloved hands after handling the infected guinea pig. But not enough time had passed to ensure the chemical had fully inactivated any virus on the surface of the worker's gloves, officials said. This created the potential for virus to be carried by the unused needle when it passed through the glove and into the person's finger.

"The likelihood of any true exposure that could result in infection was profoundly low," said Dr. **Susan McLellan** , a physician and the labs' biosafety director for research-related infectious pathogens, who was consulted on the worker's case." TOP NEWS "Galveston biolabs disclose mishaps that potentially exposed workers to infectious diseases, " Houston Chronicle's Brian Rausch -- "The mistake happened in an instant. Inside one of the biosafety level 4 labs at the Galveston National Laboratory - where scientists wear full-body moonsuit-like gear as they study some of the world's most dangerous microbes - a lab worker was uncapping a needle. The worker had just been handling a guinea pig that was infected with Chapare virus, which has caused of a hemorrhagic fever disease and for which there is other than fluids and supportive care. As the lab worker uncapped the new needle, it accidentally plunged through their layered gloves and into their finger. The mishap last August is one of three incidents last year where workers were potentially exposed to infectious pathogens inside research labs at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston, according to an annual biosafety incident summary lab officials released this week. UTMB officials said none of the lab workers were infected in the 2024 safety breaches, which also involved an incident in October in with , which can cause serious disease but is not contagious, and in December with , which is spread by mosquitos and tends to cause a mild disease that includes fever, aches and a rash. Although lab officials classified each incident as a potential exposure to the workers, they said the risks in each case were very low because of the many layers of precautions used in the labs. "Because of the practices we have, we've never had a person become ill working in a lab," Gene Olinger , director of the Galveston National Laboratory, told Houston Landing. The Galveston National Lab and the UTMB-Galveston campus' Robert E. Shope , MD, Laboratory are among only that have labs operating at biosafety level 4 (BSL-4), the highest level of containment used for studying the most dangerous pathogens. For many years, UTMB has posted a list with synopsis information about incidents involving potential worker exposures at these two BSL-4 lab facilities and also the campus' lower level research labs that study less dangerous pathogens. UTMB officials updated the list late Tuesday, adding the three 2024 incidents to their of 66 other incidents dating back to 2002. The list does not include research lab incidents where UTMB officials determined there was no potential exposure. Over the years, have included needlesticks, cuts, animal bites, spilled specimens and a wide range of pathogens including Marburg virus, Nipah virus, Dengue virus, Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus, West Nile virus and SARS-CoV-2. But none have resulted in any worker becoming infected, lab officials emphasized. "I always talk about trust and transparency," Olinger said. "Trust is we tell you that we have measures in place to protect the community. Transparency is saying this is what's happening and sharing it." Each of the three incidents disclosed for 2024 had a low likelihood for the worker becoming infected, lab officials told the Landing. But each was treated as a potential exposure out of "an abundance of caution," they said. During the Chapare virus experiment where the needlestick incident occurred on Aug. 13, the lab worker had disinfected their gloved hands after handling the infected guinea pig. But not enough time had passed to ensure the chemical had fully inactivated any virus on the surface of the worker's gloves, officials said. This created the potential for virus to be carried by the unused needle when it passed through the glove and into the person's finger. "The likelihood of any true exposure that could result in infection was profoundly low," said Dr. Susan McLellan , a physician and the labs' biosafety director for research-related infectious pathogens, who was consulted on the worker's case." | **Common sense? My opponent thinks it’s “common sense” to make it easier for Donald Trump to fire Virginians.**

She is backing President Trump’s “Schedule F” executive order, which makes it easier to fire federal workers and turn their positions into political appointee roles. Virginia is home to thousands of federal employees – nonpartisan professionals who have devoted their careers to serving our country but now have a target on their backs for no reason at all.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101743339/526926852/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFiNDY4ODctOGZlNS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ub1X9ABxWqDFpHIHCs5bfXFkw73FziKIhoL6uAat55c=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Tulsi Gabbard + RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Over the past several weeks, I’ve met with most of Donald Trump’s cabinet nominees and carefully watched their confirmation hearings.
#
Derek, it's John Fetterman.
Over the past several weeks, I’ve met with most of Donald Trump’s cabinet nominees and carefully watched their confirmation hearings.
The truth is I’m open to working with anyone where I can to get things done for working folks in PA.
**But after considering what’s at stake, I will be voting NO on the confirmation votes for Tulsi Gabbard and RFK Jr.**
Pennsylvanians (and all Americans) deserve a Director of National Intelligence and a Health Secretary who will focus on keeping us safe + healthy — not pushing their own pet agendas and undermining vaccine science.
[**Derek, if you’re with me, will you kick in $5 to my campaign and help me keep fighting for PA in the Senate? I really appreciate each + every dollar that comes in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-9876&refcode2=9876_434096_V-iQ6X&akid=9876%2E434096%2EV-iQ6X) [**🙏**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-9876&refcode2=9876_434096_V-iQ6X&akid=9876%2E434096%2EV-iQ6X)

John ❤️
John Fetterman

“**Galveston biolabs disclose mishaps that potentially exposed workers to infectious diseases,** ” Houston Chronicle's **Brian Rausch** — “The mistake happened in an instant.

Inside one of the biosafety level 4 labs at the Galveston National Laboratory – where scientists wear full-body moonsuit-like gear as they study some of the world’s most dangerous microbes – a lab worker was uncapping a needle.

The worker had just been handling a guinea pig that was infected with Chapare virus, which has caused [deadly As the lab worker uncapped the new needle, it accidentally plunged through their layered gloves and into their finger.

The mishap last August is one of three incidents last year where workers were potentially exposed to infectious pathogens inside research labs at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston, according to an annual biosafety incident summary lab officials released this week.

Although lab officials classified each incident as a potential exposure to the workers, they said the risks in each case were very low because of the many layers of precautions used in the labs.

“Because of the practices we have, we’ve never had a person become ill working in a lab,” **Gene Olinger** , director of the Galveston National Laboratory, told Houston Landing.

The Galveston National Lab and the UTMB-Galveston campus’ **Robert E. Shope** , MD, Laboratory are among only [about 15 lab facilities in North America](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOKvqUyXWtkXU0Gi0Wt0pnlHch_6-JOIqklqiM0g1GywfFyygarTRc1yB-_qgC2IwCn1KFad9YnAL65-YsZBGQJiBPfuB6_Z_lfgQ60u-XjdbjTo-lxObwMuRuMTUVe0WssGpsM-y2ZsihsUmhOu83Wa8XAXqpn2iuSCh2CVMYJeIys-Ea7qr4VLgHA8eFOKLbBqGd-FFJuTYsb8umZELTJi_8sDNCA8vzz99RXrEAPu20gXM8A3nHOvrjGU_Y7rTnCD3bGFF0bg9f1e0QFrbdZu05xWIOHo0-1P3sgwmyK1xg78nLtYGlj8AeNeutPaFiUAgugqWhgDXIXp5ZedYEHvFJY7cpe3dPVDAD18VKLrBpQf2PeuX9OJaFVYy0vyZBha3qn93oTU6pjuZnfrvNDZ1_tZSx693dboBVYKmGIo_hDwRuTsLGZ8gTz2rLKAaA/4dt/x6bW1SP4QdCRgVr-jfDEzg/h20/h001.H7RUMee3AjwVxPvXn-9kVmTEIkY29MsFqoi-Z-0lHw0) that have labs operating at biosafety level 4 (BSL-4), the highest level of containment used for studying the most dangerous pathogens.

For many years, UTMB has posted a list with synopsis information about incidents involving potential worker exposures at these two BSL-4 lab facilities and also the campus’ lower level research labs that study less dangerous pathogens. The list does not include research lab incidents where UTMB officials determined there was no potential exposure. Over the years, [the disclosed potential exposures](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.gXT_7YSi5DEU9NdvjtCBTKs6fAy2PLX0--BOHxMuO2DQluJjIwRlF6aRYxcgO27eBBX2xWQA7ygVTCvmYco3csAJpjuyqPuYrFkz-pls2ukl_vegdKFMttwa5d-DtwLyCUKRiKowMWg2n0FfXEzUtepotmXSHYT1MmNZjNjpMYG2SeM2dIx3_KTefSmFlqLg_ksRk2Fd3cEbKUvRt308Vb0wtK20up6XSfCbvzlBjdid_1-P8msjnBf-arm2hicDbLdKP8qpC5KXzEukWuw8htuOedLTT2ttfo1wMlVkb8r4wVLiA8RiN1jVEEs53KxLRdNNqNHXYBLa4lq-KQW11yKcHDt1dLVRpVKKbPOETo98cL6XyIAf7X7jpVqN3tnF1PwIXQgqkw8rzQngBekCIkXuI3DmAat0P4qsd-JW2IROMXqNfeqSdYRDDtyHnG-xlwSIigUtK1GpekK0V66U06zQ4Tr0czfm9eRAbjZCT7hhsdHHuUgVOQbydDd-l3XMGwDd2UmgXThCjCeoXwTgq7fTXmWM9nfT2ZmqEQsxBOMtpvxcJummjpyHuHqGHPir_xIkv4wwEPp6WHuNZVyFGXZfnZgerfkhaBl3PJu96H7UvyG3R29DEleB-eQMM20suG9b8xcF-zfsbxi3oBMd8sDrgljBRN0pTveNIrAEyQZEZ5fwONPTWWKbfDtPndkEBwC7_KZFPnIpwZnc5aN1HGSPkuTpPw6hyTv6muapQkCcG7Quoc9Bt2iLtkLvqekbnDf2Djadvwi1ICVGN9kBJA/4dt/x6bW1SP4QdCRgVr-jfDEzg/h23/h001.SvlTOr9sZCEFQYtAuFIjs59aK_118YplXHiROGw5fe0) have included needlesticks, cuts, animal bites, spilled specimens and a wide range of pathogens including Marburg virus, Nipah virus, Dengue virus, Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus, West Nile virus and SARS-CoV-2. But none have resulted in any worker becoming infected, lab officials emphasized.

“I always talk about trust and transparency,” Olinger said. “Trust is we tell you that we have measures in place to protect the community. Transparency is saying this is what’s happening and sharing it.”

Each of the three incidents disclosed for 2024 had a low likelihood for the worker becoming infected, lab officials told the Landing. But each was treated as a potential exposure out of “an abundance of caution,” they said.

During the Chapare virus experiment where the needlestick incident occurred on Aug. 13, the lab worker had disinfected their gloved hands after handling the infected guinea pig. But not enough time had passed to ensure the chemical had fully inactivated any virus on the surface of the worker’s gloves, officials said. This created the potential for virus to be carried by the unused needle when it passed through the glove and into the person’s finger.

“The likelihood of any true exposure that could result in infection was profoundly low,” said Dr. **Susan McLellan** , a physician and the labs’ biosafety director for research-related infectious pathogens, who was consulted on the worker’s case." The mishap last August is one of three incidents last year where workers were potentially exposed to infectious pathogens inside research labs at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston, according to an annual biosafety incident summary lab officials released this week. UTMB officials said none of the lab workers were infected in the 2024 safety breaches, which also involved an incident in October in with , which can cause serious disease but is not contagious, and in December with , which is spread by mosquitos and tends to cause a mild disease that includes fever, aches and a rash. » Although lab officials classified each incident as a potential exposure to the workers, they said the risks in each case were very low because of the many layers of precautions used in the labs. “Because of the practices we have, we’ve never had a person become ill working in a lab,” Gene Olinger , director of the Galveston National Laboratory, told Houston Landing. The list does not include research lab incidents where UTMB officials determined there was no potential exposure. Over the years, have included needlesticks, cuts, animal bites, spilled specimens and a wide range of pathogens including Marburg virus, Nipah virus, Dengue virus, Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus, West Nile virus and SARS-CoV-2. But none have resulted in any worker becoming infected, lab officials emphasized. “I always talk about trust and transparency,” Olinger said. “Trust is we tell you that we have measures in place to protect the community. But each was treated as a potential exposure out of “an abundance of caution,” they said. During the Chapare virus experiment where the needlestick incident occurred on Aug. 13, the lab worker had disinfected their gloved hands after handling the infected guinea pig. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Galveston biolabs disclose mishaps that potentially exposed workers to infectious diseases,** " Houston Chronicle's **Brian Rausch** -- "The mistake happened in an instant.

Inside one of the biosafety level 4 labs at the Galveston National Laboratory - where scientists wear full-body moonsuit-like gear as they study some of the world's most dangerous microbes - a lab worker was uncapping a needle.

The worker had just been handling a guinea pig that was infected with Chapare virus, which has caused [deadly outbreaks](https://substack.com/redirect/a225b1ed-df57-4670-a27f-a49702cb9a55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of a hemorrhagic fever disease [in Bolivia](https://substack.com/redirect/7f7eeca8-9394-415c-a62c-d6238b7683d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and for which there is [no treatment](https://substack.com/redirect/93b63adf-ab76-41b9-8486-1e4791d9c229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) other than fluids and supportive care.

As the lab worker uncapped the new needle, it accidentally plunged through their layered gloves and into their finger.

The mishap last August is one of three incidents last year where workers were potentially exposed to infectious pathogens inside research labs at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston, according to an annual biosafety incident summary lab officials released this week.

UTMB officials said none of the lab workers were infected in the 2024 safety breaches, which also involved an incident in October in with [anthrax bacteria](https://substack.com/redirect/28024da2-d3fc-4ec8-8155-ac8cc97a8025?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which can cause serious disease but is not contagious, and in December with [Mayaro virus](https://substack.com/redirect/f3888e8b-0f1a-4534-b644-aa58409bd334?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which is spread by mosquitos and tends to cause a mild disease that includes fever, aches and a rash.

Although lab officials classified each incident as a potential exposure to the workers, they said the risks in each case were very low because of the many layers of precautions used in the labs.

"Because of the practices we have, we've never had a person become ill working in a lab," **Gene Olinger** , director of the Galveston National Laboratory, told Houston Landing.

The Galveston National Lab and the UTMB-Galveston campus' **Robert E. Shope** , MD, Laboratory are among only [about 15 lab facilities in North America](https://substack.com/redirect/65acd0ef-1d34-4a39-984c-7bb416a71423?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that have labs operating at biosafety level 4 (BSL-4), the highest level of containment used for studying the most dangerous pathogens.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/7719e849-2ece-4c3d-982c-3f3e0a6210bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For many years, UTMB has posted a list with synopsis information about incidents involving potential worker exposures at these two BSL-4 lab facilities and also the campus' lower level research labs that study less dangerous pathogens. UTMB officials updated the list late Tuesday, adding the three 2024 incidents to their [previous disclosure](https://substack.com/redirect/63f8eff1-70b7-492c-bac0-0d1fcd3128c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of 66 other incidents dating back to 2002.

The list does not include research lab incidents where UTMB officials determined there was no potential exposure. Over the years, [the disclosed potential exposures](https://substack.com/redirect/63f8eff1-70b7-492c-bac0-0d1fcd3128c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have included needlesticks, cuts, animal bites, spilled specimens and a wide range of pathogens including Marburg virus, Nipah virus, Dengue virus, Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus, West Nile virus and SARS-CoV-2. But none have resulted in any worker becoming infected, lab officials emphasized.

"I always talk about trust and transparency," Olinger said. "Trust is we tell you that we have measures in place to protect the community. Transparency is saying this is what's happening and sharing it."

Each of the three incidents disclosed for 2024 had a low likelihood for the worker becoming infected, lab officials told the Landing. But each was treated as a potential exposure out of "an abundance of caution," they said.

During the Chapare virus experiment where the needlestick incident occurred on Aug. 13, the lab worker had disinfected their gloved hands after handling the infected guinea pig. But not enough time had passed to ensure the chemical had fully inactivated any virus on the surface of the worker's gloves, officials said. This created the potential for virus to be carried by the unused needle when it passed through the glove and into the person's finger.

"The likelihood of any true exposure that could result in infection was profoundly low," said Dr. **Susan McLellan** , a physician and the labs' biosafety director for research-related infectious pathogens, who was consulted on the worker's case." TOP NEWS "Galveston biolabs disclose mishaps that potentially exposed workers to infectious diseases, " Houston Chronicle's Brian Rausch -- "The mistake happened in an instant. Inside one of the biosafety level 4 labs at the Galveston National Laboratory - where scientists wear full-body moonsuit-like gear as they study some of the world's most dangerous microbes - a lab worker was uncapping a needle. The worker had just been handling a guinea pig that was infected with Chapare virus, which has caused of a hemorrhagic fever disease and for which there is other than fluids and supportive care. As the lab worker uncapped the new needle, it accidentally plunged through their layered gloves and into their finger. The mishap last August is one of three incidents last year where workers were potentially exposed to infectious pathogens inside research labs at the University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston, according to an annual biosafety incident summary lab officials released this week. UTMB officials said none of the lab workers were infected in the 2024 safety breaches, which also involved an incident in October in with , which can cause serious disease but is not contagious, and in December with , which is spread by mosquitos and tends to cause a mild disease that includes fever, aches and a rash. Although lab officials classified each incident as a potential exposure to the workers, they said the risks in each case were very low because of the many layers of precautions used in the labs. "Because of the practices we have, we've never had a person become ill working in a lab," Gene Olinger , director of the Galveston National Laboratory, told Houston Landing. The Galveston National Lab and the UTMB-Galveston campus' Robert E. Shope , MD, Laboratory are among only that have labs operating at biosafety level 4 (BSL-4), the highest level of containment used for studying the most dangerous pathogens. For many years, UTMB has posted a list with synopsis information about incidents involving potential worker exposures at these two BSL-4 lab facilities and also the campus' lower level research labs that study less dangerous pathogens. UTMB officials updated the list late Tuesday, adding the three 2024 incidents to their of 66 other incidents dating back to 2002. The list does not include research lab incidents where UTMB officials determined there was no potential exposure. Over the years, have included needlesticks, cuts, animal bites, spilled specimens and a wide range of pathogens including Marburg virus, Nipah virus, Dengue virus, Venezuelan equine encephalitis virus, West Nile virus and SARS-CoV-2. But none have resulted in any worker becoming infected, lab officials emphasized. "I always talk about trust and transparency," Olinger said. "Trust is we tell you that we have measures in place to protect the community. Transparency is saying this is what's happening and sharing it." Each of the three incidents disclosed for 2024 had a low likelihood for the worker becoming infected, lab officials told the Landing. But each was treated as a potential exposure out of "an abundance of caution," they said. During the Chapare virus experiment where the needlestick incident occurred on Aug. 13, the lab worker had disinfected their gloved hands after handling the infected guinea pig. But not enough time had passed to ensure the chemical had fully inactivated any virus on the surface of the worker's gloves, officials said. This created the potential for virus to be carried by the unused needle when it passed through the glove and into the person's finger. "The likelihood of any true exposure that could result in infection was profoundly low," said Dr. Susan McLellan , a physician and the labs' biosafety director for research-related infectious pathogens, who was consulted on the worker's case." name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: A 10-Year-Old Hero, a Feline Diplomat, and Michigan's Sunrises
body:
Trey Howard, 10, is being hailed as a hero after shielding his younger sister from flying debris when a [medical jet crashed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L-OszAQBPCnMZ3RZg0mKVx8DV2-9kq0eNdhI_NHYAXl7U-58opr5yeNRvN1H-6kWZfHf5olpEcaSloHBGwtoIVuYNL8HpqKQxJBcZWES-euNw_OYzUFz9RyOwpdMHGCLjo_EidoWqKLg7HS8GkDhA4Bb-jrJuI1Nh4RYseOxDQgrGXd6-eqS5kk5ff6kr2O61zlMJWyHcb9M9gb7M_zrON4LHIeHzfYb5NmYsnbpGSw_8iv1G6ZFrFxp2OyL41F58Mqy1I0qbCdhTVStk8pNq7zRsvbYF_tgbdTc9bDd6aBx0yafzaVv356BfwOAAD__xUub1Y) in northeast Philadelphia last week.

## Boy Shields Sister Amid Philly Crash
Trey Howard, 10, is being hailed as a hero after shielding his younger sister from flying debris when a [medical jet crashed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L-OszAQBPCnMZ3RZg0mKVx8DV2-9kq0eNdhI_NHYAXl7U-58opr5yeNRvN1H-6kWZfHf5olpEcaSloHBGwtoIVuYNL8HpqKQxJBcZWES-euNw_OYzUFz9RyOwpdMHGCLjo_EidoWqKLg7HS8GkDhA4Bb-jrJuI1Nh4RYseOxDQgrGXd6-eqS5kk5ff6kr2O61zlMJWyHcb9M9gb7M_zrON4LHIeHzfYb5NmYsnbpGSw_8iv1G6ZFrFxp2OyL41F58Mqy1I0qbCdhTVStk8pNq7zRsvbYF_tgbdTc9bDd6aBx0yafzaVv356BfwOAAD__xUub1Y) in northeast Philadelphia last week. Howard was with his father and siblings, picking up donuts, when the aircraft went down near their car. The child [shielded his toddler sister](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7GOhCAYBp8GOwx-ILAFxTV2e-2VhsPfhQ2KUW6Nb3_Ze4CrJ5nJfN3Hu085rY9Pv5CbH_NY5zJCoOcCXJhx8ilfo2omNxOBZEOuM9LetJAaTXTGaknotTd9sFYFr3qITnqLDhq30CT3tgkIA4EbdKsCbFAaEMFM0hNTgqZUy94-S1prpDlf5UV7G8rSZBdr3Q4mPxgGhuE8z_bysZQ3ZRhWOg-G4btcvBM8rc-fnSa-xZTzxbfsV-KdlhoK0raxLrnZ3bSdKed0aMOUeCw-5b9U_W__5fAbAAD__8BOXBc) from flying debris—a brave move that landed him in the hospital with a severe head injury. After undergoing emergency brain surgery, his first words upon waking were, _“[Daddy, did I save my sister?](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFugzAQQL_GbI7M4RgyeOjClq4d0cU-wzUGW9gl4u-r9AM6P-np6X3dpzty5G3-xJVsmMNUQ5pAwVUqkKqfPHI8J914G4iAuoZs23fDzajOQLNY0_WGWghBe_3Am8PWu1b1A2q8BiJq2L5tClQPCm5gLtrB4LQBUK73HZLQijzXtF--E291oRDPdNB-cWltol1qzUV0HwJGAaPBh3sDAWNOpQoYPXp_Ss9eFjxIFi6Vdnmmn22WeeGInmJeGGWOuJF0O5ZFHuwqrxLLs8gXPnmb5ZJK5opRwNheB6M7ZQSMzW59fnGMXEwvtJpX5PhXVv-7dVj4DQAA___eB29E)”_ before expressing concern about missing the big game. The young boy, a die-hard Philadelphia Eagles fan, had been eagerly anticipating the Super Bowl. Philadelphia 76ers star Tyrese Maxey has already visited him in the hospital, and a [GoFundMe](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kb2OnDAUhZ_GdB55rgFDQbHSiG7TRFFK62JfgxP_IGMWzdtHE0297XeOvuKc35_6E33waf2BkSa3Ol1d1iCg4wK4UNqiD0_dNnZyRECyoemu5DD2QvbQbJPrAUYUi1zuyyicxI5cN5i7Q4moLDZ-etkECAUCRuhvrYHBtD2AMMpKJNYKsr7mcvuTfaobufDMX1RuJscmTFut-8HkB4OZwXxd123N7kw20qvAYHYM5o3Czu-CPwkLz8FyTLYQ3_KFxfJC5iXk6CoVvgdMxE3BY2NyxlqLX87qc9LeMvk4ApMfSzsOgEJxsh3y1gHxkTrBh8W5rl_UoIaFQR8wrUw-KOlfPxn0Z43aYNzRr4nJh9v1sWGhYyOq7ziS9Wdk8mHOo-ZI5c2PfBZDL573pw4-_W3KZPfLh-CPXrFWrBF9-L9J_e6nrwn-BQAA__9XKph-) for his recovery has raised nearly $127,000.
## Beavers Complete Government Dam Project
In the Czech Republic, a beaver colony has completed a long-delayed [government dam project](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kM2OpCAURp8Gd5hbVwVqwWImFWdVk0mmk14aWi5KNUJFaI399B37AXr__Zyc1_twNz74OP01C2k3uaG4NCBgxwE5yMEaH46hrax2REhNRfoiG3UV0AisZt2oFkcHDpUSeAWhLtARXSwqsG-ddJXX5xogSAS8oqjbEdXYCkQYpW0MsRbI-pLW-pF8LDO5cKSN1npMSxX0XMozs-YXw55hv-97nT9iPPL78XkmGPZTSpZH2jPDvhOyY9j_JrPRmvl_sxG_-xB8ipn3Pvo88xsFc5Dlf86XuFAs_GYW_m9NDxoLf5lpyRQ2ytWq7XM_21lI1sK0GB--scpPqjaNXwEAAP__csVuLA) without permits, blueprints, or taxpayer funding. While officials struggled with red tape, the industrious rodents built several dams overnight, creating a vital wetland where authorities had planned a costly $1.2 million revitalization project. _“They beat us to it,”_ admitted officials. Take a [look at the photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DGO6yAQgOHT2B0WGTAmBcVr0uW1r7QmMNjzNDaWYRNlT7_aPcBe4Nev7999viML78tf3CjkJc8tlxk0jEqD0tOckOU92z6FTARkegqXyfir08ZBvwZtnfbovB3zlcCPOToYJ-PiZLzWj9Rz-K5p0BNouIIbbAQfrQPQcUoGqbOaErdyDv8L722lLO_ypHOIZeslrK0dtTN_Orh1cKN9Ea7rcGLiMsTPDm4PwiedVT0-WJI6BPedkkq4VXWcpVFslJTgnmrEgxSehOq1spCSElFUyZkjo1RVG4so7-1lNK4_QzpeLMLVTZ3Vy4YsP0_tN6dngK8AAAD__2MCbSA). The beavers restored a bypass gully, reversing past damage and benefiting rare wetland species. Environmentalists hailed the beavers' natural instincts, with one official stating, _“Beavers always know best.”_
## Virginia Woman Finds $1M Lottery Ticket in Bible
A Virginia woman was overjoyed when she discovered that the lottery ticket she had tucked into her Bible for safekeeping was [a $1 million winner](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGu4yAQAL8Gd1jrNYG4oLjGXa690sKwtveCIcIoKH9_yn3AK6eZkebPY3k4jpz23-4ku-3bUre8IOBNAkowS3AcP4vqgt2IkMaO7GDG-6Rh1Ngd1rtA6jaR9maY9KQmDUHdHJCGYfWr6dh-bYBgEHBC3SuPd680IngTRkdCAQWuufR_M6d60BY_-U2l9_nsoj1qfV1i_CVwFji31vo955CoXYlqy-XZ57ILnGOulcpHVvZPqvLgEChJTrLl06VLrrxGkuRKuuRBRQ7y5Bg5J4FzV2x4tS9e2ggF--k4_u_Xn568Lf4LAAD__-4JZ1I). She purchased the ticket on Christmas Eve and later realized her luck after seeing a news report about a winning ticket from her town of Moneta. The woman who bought the ticket at Lake Mart & Deli was one of five winners in [Virginia’s New Year’s Millionaire Raffle](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuhSAUxvGnge0aPFDQgaGL2-3a0SAclAblRk8kvn1j0_mu_3z5Jd_3c3y6lNM2f7kVbZzjSLGMIODjIeAhzBhcyteoeLAREVBytK2RXa-F1MAXK0GhbKeuayejvIqhB4y9962eHATV8mRvTYAwIKAH3SgPnVcaQHgTpEOmBIZEZW9-StpowZivcuLe-LLybBei18HkJ4OBwVBrbU6XCxHu1724W9o23I8N68FgyI7woP_GdxteNeWcDm2YEvPqUv6D6d3Z08JvAAAA___491m_). Despite her newfound fortune, she returned to work the next day as a nurse in Bedford County.

The press is finally catching on – are you?

The County Executive’s reckless, lawless militia is making _headlines_ , and we need to keep the pressure on.

**[I’m running for Nassau County Executive and I will disband the militia. Can you chip in today to help power this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101744352/526929670/-1414184198?contactdata=UO+xr9aPzSaALPgC7sTh9D8EsjTlN7R3wdBH31fh4PsuwzO8TQktqqxDs8/cavyXCVRKDy2O9dKwa2qNzWWjIWp0q9cRM/q1izIuwtKZou0=&am=100.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNkZjVmOTItOTJlNS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=36EtA3qstOtRAGPJ9UNBalzuScmwKma92Lrfu3KrUuA=&emci=33f9e14f-87e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c3df5f92-92e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=17551891)**

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Tell Musk: Get out and stay out
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
|
---
| | In the wake of our rally with thousands of people at the Treasury Department to demand accountability over Elon Musk's theft from the American people, we got a rare piece of good news:**a federal judge has locked Musk and any DOGE personnel out of the Treasury system.** This wouldn't have happened if the Trump administration wasn't feeling public pressure. **And it's feeling pressure because**** _people like you_****are showing up, calling Congress, and refusing to be silent about the billionaire takeover of our government.** But this is far from over. Musk is only temporarily shut out of the Treasury. He's already working to find his way into other federal agencies and cause even more chaos. **We have to keep sending Trump and Musk the message that we're not backing down in this fight.** [**So will you sign my petition demanding that Elon Musk get out**** _and stay out_****of our data and finances? Every voice added helps show our strength.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101744469/526930160/1911875531?ms=2025-02-07-musk&refcode=2025-02-07-musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0YjliNi05M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SIHMeWv4XB7jYJhUHNL-qeV2vVmUFG7dMEavibomuws=&emci=645dc313-68e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cca4b9b6-93e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364) [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101744470/526930161/1911875531?ms=2025-02-07-musk&refcode=2025-02-07-musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0YjliNi05M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SIHMeWv4XB7jYJhUHNL-qeV2vVmUFG7dMEavibomuws=&emci=645dc313-68e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cca4b9b6-93e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364) Onward, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101744471/526930162/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0YjliNi05M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SIHMeWv4XB7jYJhUHNL-qeV2vVmUFG7dMEavibomuws=&emci=645dc313-68e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cca4b9b6-93e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364)
---

Over the weekend, Elon Musk and Donald Trump seized control of the highly-sensitive payment system at the Treasury Department.
This means they have access to Social Security and Medicare payments, the money owed to government workers, and much more.
This is an authoritarian takeover of our government.
Needless to say, I am terrified at the prospect of an unelected, Nazi-saluting billionaire having access to the most sensitive inner workings of our federal government.
**Just hours ago, I was in front of the Treasury Department to send the message loud and clear to Elon Musk: get your hands off our money, and get the hell out.**
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101744472/526930163/-2044921950?refcode=2025-02-07-musk&recurring=yes&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cca4b9b6-93e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2E0YjliNi05M2U1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SIHMeWv4XB7jYJhUHNL-qeV2vVmUFG7dMEavibomuws=)
Normally when a bank gets robbed, the thieves have to forcefully break in. **But imagine if the bank manager – of their own free will – happily handed the thieves the keys to the vault.**
That's the best way to describe what is happening right now. Elon Musk wants to rip away Americans' hard-earned benefits and raid the government's coffers to help himself. And the Trump administration just let him walk in and take our most sensitive and private information.
This is illegal. It's an issue of national security and economic stability. And it needs to stop _now._
Musk's access must immediately be revoked, and the American people need fast answers from Secretary Bessent on why he let this happen and what damage has already been done.
More soon,
_Ron_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Elon Musk’s DOGE exposed an alleged hit job against me.
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2ba97cce84f940dfa329274bddea136f&_e=si83j1FU3YPogHdcGhGcL2IjkfAJQ5wFYiqcVyWDB80028Zvs7HV-SDuN3auaMxyDMiOvidZUatZkP2573c8KIPbLRQ9URdP0jETj_-JrQgas5pq1BzNYsRIrQ3zfheiORJPLqlCcYhwiyh6jFIil1eoBdcI3OmIZSHoWMqq0eauKe_2u1ig8N6J8giKEujRQfnnzLFj8c8-9oMuvh99dI1CKVgqxLFawAJRA9-6c286JDt9ARuwQvjd0i8Tn9h5xcbq7MEd1CSksmtHzrTWu3xkXrb-a1i72lZY1aNKN-5GppsLUqdVkmZZ52XMze0GeFES60KH_4G08rW1uv64Tnnpi6KuVD0Hpps8HZoir4WqcisNqRFrtipfyoujRsDY)

ATTN: Fellow Patriot,
---
Now that Elon Musk is running an audit of the federal government, the Deep State’s corruption is finally being EXPOSED...
---
**A report reveals that in 2019 – while I was serving as President Trump’s attorney – the USAID allegedly spent _$20 MILLION_ on a Soros-backed operation to dig up dirt on me and bury me alive.**
---
This is just a glimpse of what the Deep State has tried to do to destroy me _and_ President Trump.
---
And unfortunately, the fight isn’t over.
---
_I am facing bogus CRIMINAL CHARGES in the state of Arizona – where President Trump is PROHIBITED from saving me with a PARDON!_
---
And if fighting the Mafia taught me anything, it’s that when villains get exposed, they don’t run – they dig their heels in _deeper_!
---
It’s honestly a miracle that after everything done to me and President Trump, not even an assassin’s bullet could end our movement.
---
I have to believe that miracle comes from God. But it also comes from the generous support given by kind souls like YOU, who’ve helped me prevail time and time again.
---
_Now, I’m asking for your support once again to win this pardon-proof criminal case so that I can FINALLY live as a FREE MAN!_
---
[**So please, if you can, and truly only if you can, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can win the FINAL BATTLE in this “pardon-proof” case against me.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2ba97cce84f940dfa329274bddea136f&_e=si83j1FU3YPogHdcGhGcL2IjkfAJQ5wFYiqcVyWDB80028Zvs7HV-SDuN3auaMxyDMiOvidZUatZkP2573c8KIPbLRQ9URdP0jETj_-JrQgas5pq1BzNYsRIrQ3zfheiORJPLqlCcYhwiyh6jFIil1eoBdcI3OmIZSHoWMqq0eauKe_2u1ig8N6J8giKEujRQfnnzLFj8c8-9oMuvh99dPjOW3JDYgrZW7PEcATvkyyeELHLNbbdbVYdSLMDdN_vLdqScP7srREXGGYTRZjUdOShsGwrjS9BVjiCTokkxrVN_tVjYu6ySH6Irm_NbX_6EWr0jDWerac2JDetYQ-tMQPsleZfoi6vn_E_96hExVbC2Ech6-FfHc6iQVjP9Wh4)

name: Jo Mendoza
subject: Big news 🚨I’m running for Congress, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101745575/526933815/594325967?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5OGZhOTgxLTk2ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qWKt-G-lBeMYNFhPVS2lzoJ22_bYU982GYy6XUkJckg=)
---
Peter, I’m Jo Mendoza. Fight for Progress said I could reach out, because I have huge news:

**Today, I’m officially launching my campaign for Congress to flip AZ-06 blue!** [_**I’m about to ask you to split a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign to become a Founding Donor, but first, I need you to read this email from start to finish:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101745578/526933825/594325967?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5OGZhOTgxLTk2ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qWKt-G-lBeMYNFhPVS2lzoJ22_bYU982GYy6XUkJckg=)

I’m a retired U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor, a single mom, and Democrat running to flip AZ-06 – one of the most flippable districts in the country.

But if you had told me as a kid in rural Arizona—working the cotton fields alongside my parents—that I’d be running for Congress, I might have laughed. Not because I didn’t have the fight in me, but because people like me weren’t supposed to make it this far.

Neither of my parents had above a high school education. We experienced poverty my whole childhood.

**Only in America can a girl who grew up like me defy the odds and go on to become a Marine, college graduate, mother, and with your help, a member of Congress.**

But this will be one of the most competitive races in the country, and could determine control of Congress.

And we know the special interests – who’ve only been getting richer while working families suffer – will spend every penny they have to keep this seat and stay in power.

Well, after 20 years of military service and leading teams through three combat tours in active war zones, I’m not afraid of a fight. But I also never go into one without a plan.

**And right now, my plan of action is to have 250 Founding Donors in the next 72 hours, but that requires you joining this fight so we can get our fundraising off the ground.** [_**So Peter, will you pitch in a split donation to Fight for Progress and my campaign to become a Day One Founding Donor so I can flip AZ-06 blue and win back our futures for the people? >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101745581/526933835/594325967?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5OGZhOTgxLTk2ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qWKt-G-lBeMYNFhPVS2lzoJ22_bYU982GYy6XUkJckg=)
| [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101745584/526933843/594325967?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-07_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5OGZhOTgxLTk2ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qWKt-G-lBeMYNFhPVS2lzoJ22_bYU982GYy6XUkJckg=)

subject: FWD: Do you support Trump’s executive orders?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=TemOPFj8cy%2BCnFvTx5DardA0nH%2Bj1BEczIY3gVwYWknW3p7loM2ob50PpxXP2g4Vi%2B%2FHkXDfmbxs5BIK3SW8BafCua74UpLD3Cs2NcvBJ4hHBdzNAiWKe4zOkm%2FMHfWe9A62QQAxvWZ%2FM1M6am2JtF7ZVb5qiXrU1wEj72pmBAwqUxkXnMFm8tove0Xx%2FYOvllghzvg990sN%2BSVRPXmx0ZNz%2BuknqPd6E2eqbdv9FfZNqsxwzCnfLZgXHzrzfNYs7Sr6WuPivohZHO%2Bf3xM2UXhi3RudPfrHrYOcYhW%2FS48OJXbwwGwX0I9ESXAk4A%2FKO4fvZa0TBBLIyDDsGkKojXOKLR8IkAHI2vgLme4f0b0cM8qhnO%2Fbww5Wr%2BQ6UK3BpvjeAiWNLHankHrwEATEQNvBDroV1D4xniar8Fz5ZRo%3D]

Peter: Did you take our poll RE: Trump’s executive orders yet? We’re hoping to get to 1,000 signers by tonight at midnight so add your name now. [https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2]

https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2]If you need to know more before taking the poll, check out our email below for all of the details on Trump’s racist and dangerous executive orders. You don’t want to miss this ⬇️

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Texas Organizing Project PAC
Date: Wed, February 5, 2025
Subject: Do you support Trump’s executive orders?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter: You’ve probably seen the news about Trump’s executive orders:

🔴 Ending birthright citizenship which is in DIRECT opposition to the 14th Amendment

🔴 Eliminating certain environmental justice programs that serve Black and Latino communities

🔴 Terminating all diversity, equity, and inclusion programs across the federal government — impacting thousands of federal jobs

And these are only a few out of MANY executive orders.

That’s why we need to hear from you: do you support Trump’s latest executive orders targeting Black and Latino communities? Respond to our poll now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2]

https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2]It’s going to be a long four years. But together, we can fight for a state and nation that works for ALL of us, regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code.

Help us send a message to Republicans that Texas progressives are fired up fighting back by taking our poll now: [https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2]

Take the poll » [https://secure.everyaction.com/zvWZ1LDqi0qoppf9C4hrNg2]

—Texas Organizing Project PAC

subject: Does calcium really protect your bones?
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtuszAQhZ_G3gWZMbZh4UUuv6W_SiP1kkrtzuChuDUJ4paQp6-SpmyPvpnz6di6Cb6cNFErAlB51xEAwpcEYOj5m93vH9tpsd1u3eLEAa85gfUdHWGGD4XdfMiB8-f_Y3c6Z6_L1e48xjPeTw3O8L00wtr6cE3VhjqdgI3LgqKOFU8zCSCAVppJmWKcopB5LoVzLC0ZOBRlIVSZZxn1GhgIBkxBzBLGInTWKesSK2PFOeYkYbeiqGwR-8ofvrF11ocpKo41Dbrq-6a7iRkC5ujy6DAUAYfu96o41gTMXZmAGQmYp8venN-_1i87ws1tNL4ZhVh1lwf3j7baNScfgu-kIgn7_HtDRw0_AQAA__8pC28P)

| | | **WARNING** \- _“You’ve been lied to about Calcium!”_
Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and breaks, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium."
Bad news...
According to a 2013 Harvard publication... Men who took over 1,000 mg of calcium supplements daily were **20% more likely to develop heart issues** than those who didn't take supplements.
A meta-analysis of clinical trials found that calcium, vitamin D, or both supplements were not associated with a lower risk of bone breaks in older adults!
But there's good news... Because a unique protein seems to act like glue inside your bones — helping to halt age-related bone loss. **[Try this protein swap instead](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kVGvlDAQhX_N8LaknYGWfejD3VuJmtXohtXEF1NokUYWG2Dh4q83xc2-NJ0zX-acyZhb6H27KZAnQOy8nQAR6AUQ7zN9M9frp3E7nM9ne1gJXdQBXx_ogk94aIz-Ie5Elw_LtL4dq5fT57eFP_F5C-4JP0xTdzO-j6rUiVUZGt42iVNcUnEUiDkmnSpcS8gdGecK0RJvkArOjpbXGStaWydeIcOcIZPIWcZY6qyx0tjMCC6JXA0Z243SdnRu7vzw243W-H5Lmz-3pFfdPIdpD1YClm2dDmb2iwtm7iIBWI42PmnoAlA5eQukORM5oAj3GkhjxnJJgKLhsfofpziUlT7wnLHYQCD9-v57_BKQLisNKH4O_T7s8vXypSquS1h3cb8C6SXPT9Pfj_ZdMiobVt_3fhISMvZr3yaGXxT-CwAA__8rBIHO)**.
So, if you want to STOP bone loss...
And blow your doctor away with your next DEXA scan results...
**[⇒ Try this unique protein instead.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUFv2zAMhX8NfYshkZYUH3RoqhndkO4wpCuwyyBb0qzNyQTbcer9-kFukYsgPn7gewTtOQ0xrBrUARD76CZABHoAxOtM3-3Ly_O47o7Ho9vdCH3WAR8_0AXv8KWz5oe8En37vEy3t_r0cPj6tvA7Pq_J3-EP09KfbRyyqkzhdIWWh67wmiva1xJRYNHrqhM2eGKB18GGupV-j7WSreycrdrgi6iRoWDIFHJWMVZ6Z52yrrKSKyLfQsU2ozKM3s99vPzxo7NxWMvu77kYdD_PadqCNYBNaMuLnePik537TAA2o8tPmfoE1EzRARnOpACU6doCGayYUAQoO56r9zj7XXMyOy4Yyw0EMo9Pr_lLQKY5GUD58zJsw-ziXp-f1vF3v4nbFcgsQhymf1_cp2LULt3iMMRJKqjYr22bHH7R-D8AAP__HWODAQ)**

name: Team Lateefah
subject: Reject Trump & Musk’s Takeover of Our Government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Donald Trump just handed Elon Musk the keys to our government — no oversight, no accountability, and no regard for the Constitution. Within days, Musk illegally declared USAID null and void, with a plan to wipe out critical global aid programs that leaves both our workforce and the people who rely on lifesaving programs in the lurch.
Make no mistake: USAID is just the beginning. He has made it quite clear that the Department of Education is next . Trump and Musk are gutting our government agency by agency, silencing civil servants, and replacing them with billionaires and yes-men.
Lateefah, for one, isn’t just standing by— she’s fighting back. As a member of the House Oversight Committee, she has already joined her colleagues in launching an official investigation into Trump’s purge of civil servants and Musk’s illegal access to classified information.
Now, we need you to stand with her. Will you sign on today to support the Oversight Committee’s investigation and demand accountability? 📢 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/09zDHbK2HUSobPOB3He5Ng2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/09zDHbK2HUSobPOB3He5Ng2]
Congress has the power to stop this — but only if we show up and demand collective action. Add your name now to say you won’t let Trump and Musk dismantle our democracy. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/09zDHbK2HUSobPOB3He5Ng2]
Thank you,
Team Lateefah
