Will you rush in $14 before midnight? >> [] Chip in $14 immediately >> [] Chip in $19 immediately >> [] Chip in $24 immediately >> [] Chip in $50 immediately >> [] Chip in $100 immediately >> [] Or chip in another amount >> [] Thank you, RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? DONATE [] Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

|

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746153/526935588/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)_ ****
_Hoosier Democrats Working to Solve Waitlist Crisis For Families and Childre_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746154/526935589/1706486640?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Etweet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746155/526935590/1706486640?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Etweet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) Over 10,000 Hoosiers with critical needs are being forced onto waitlists due to the $1 billion shortfall in Medicaid funding impacting families. Solving this crisis is a major priority for Statehouse Democrats, and has been since the legislative session began. Good news came on that front this week, as legislative Democrats worked across the aisle to pass legislation out of committee to set higher standards for insurers who handle these claims. Statehouse Democrats know Hoosiers want this crisis solved, and will keep working to make sure it is addressed this session. ****_Voting Rights Under Attack By Republican Supermajority _ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746156/526935591/-264682906?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746157/526935592/-264682906?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) A number of election bills are moving through the House and Senate which would have disastrous implications for Hoosiers’ right to vote. Despite long lines and poor voter turnout, Republicans have moved bills to cut the number of early voting days from 28 down to 14. In addition, they are trying to ban college students from using their state-owned, university ID to vote. Democrats have proposed amendments to protect early voting access and to keep polls open until 7 PM on Election Day, giving Hoosier voters more time to cast their ballot after leaving work. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746158/526935593/-1573933888?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)
[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746159/526935594/-1573933888?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjJkNjMyYi05OGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqgNexgLszasjtjHR71oAwl7GpBOdee9PTpLZ-xA8WM=&emci=f983bd8d-95e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=eb2d632b-98e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)

Rep. Mrvan announced his subcommittee assignments this week, and he’s continuing his important work for Hoosier families on appropriations subcommittees dealing with water, energy, and infrastructure. He knows we must support workers with investment in critical projects to support jobs and build a better future for all Region families. **** clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Hoosier Democrats Working to Solve Waitlist Crisis For Families and Childre Over 10,000 Hoosiers with critical needs are being forced onto waitlists due to the $1 billion shortfall in Medicaid funding impacting families. Solving this crisis is a major priority for Statehouse Democrats, and has been since the legislative session began. Good news came on that front this week, as legislative Democrats worked across the aisle to pass legislation out of committee to set higher standards for insurers who handle these claims. Statehouse Democrats know Hoosiers want this crisis solved, and will keep working to make sure it is addressed this session. Voting Rights Under Attack By Republican Supermajority A number of election bills are moving through the House and Senate which would have disastrous implications for Hoosiers’ right to vote. Despite long lines and poor voter turnout, Republicans have moved bills to cut the number of early voting days from 28 down to 14. In addition, they are trying to ban college students from using their state-owned, university ID to vote. Democrats have proposed amendments to protect early voting access and to keep polls open until 7 PM on Election Day, giving Hoosier voters more time to cast their ballot after leaving work. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Rep. Mrvan announced his subcommittee assignments this week, and he’s continuing his important work for Hoosier families on appropriations subcommittees dealing with water, energy, and infrastructure. He knows we must support workers with investment in critical projects to support jobs and build a better future for all Region families. Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Make Your Voice Heard! Upcoming Public Input Requests Indiana FSSA – FSSA’s parent body, the Bureau of Disability Services, is seeking public comment on its intent to submit renewals to the Family Support, the Community Integration and Habitation Waivers, and the 1915(b)(4) Waiver Fee for Service Selective Contracting Program to the Centers for Medicare and Medicare Services. In addition, FSSA is hosting three webinars to provide more information on amending a waiver and other key policy changes. Clay County – County officials are seeking public input for the updating of its multi-hazard mitigation plan. These threats include natural disasters and technological ones, such as cybersecurity concerns. SAMHSA – The Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration is taking public comment on its implementation guide for Mobile Crisis Team Services. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, February 10th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on What is Get Out the Vote. INDems IN the News WFYI: WISH TV: Indiana Public Media: Fox 59: WTHR: NW Indiana Business: Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: Middle East peace? Only LaRouche's 'Oasis Plan' Will Work!
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250207_symposium&n=1)
---
| Friend – Everyone is speculating on whether President Trump intended to make such an absurd proposal as the United States taking over Gaza and expelling all the Palestinians seriously, or as a bargaining point. Either way, it will never work that way, and to even express such a thing exposes a disturbing lack of understanding of the regional dynamic, and a lack of recognition that millions of Americans voted for Trump because they hoped he would end the genocide which the Biden/Harris team had been supporting, while claiming that they were "working on stopping it." 50 years ago, Lyndon LaRouche put forward a proposal for a two-state solution based on addressing the real crisis of the entire region: the lack of water. Tonight I will take up his proposal with Jason Ross, of LaRouche's Science Team, and Hussein Askary of the Schiller Institute and the Swedish Belt and Road Institute. Please tune in and urge your friends to do the same.
* * *
### [ Friday Symposium, February 7, 2025, 8:00 PM](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFvM089xP_v1vkXM-v_x_jt7nECyk19QuuDirR_n908Qlc5y0PDJFVD6Qz1LaL0i8qg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250207_symposium&n=2)
[Middle East Peace? Only LaRouche's 'Oasis Plan' Will Work!](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFvM089xP_v1vkXM-v_x_jt7nECyk19QuuDirR_n908Qlc5y0PDJFVD6Qz1LaL0i8qg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250207_symposium&n=3)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: This is who they are.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250207-4742-footer&t=1001&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2 ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter, we need to
talk about the blatant and disgusting displays of racism coming out of the
Trump administration. ⬇️

Exhibit A:
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-4742&amount=3&refcode2=4742_420207_paPCk2&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2 ][IMG]

No, it’s not just some random Twitter troll — it’s Trump’s new Acting
Undersecretary of State for Public Diplomacy. 🤦🏽♀️

Putting someone who would say this in the administration completely lifts
the veil on their DEI nonsense. They aren’t concerned about skill or
competency — they’re concerned about skin complexion.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-4742&amount=3&refcode2=4742_420207_paPCk2&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2 ]Will you rush a $3 donation to help Pramila fight back
and build a government that recognizes the dignity and worth of all
people?

Beattie isn’t qualified to serve in the State Department or any other
federal agency. And unfortunately, he isn’t the only example of this.

Exhibit B:
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-4742&amount=3&refcode2=4742_420207_paPCk2&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2 ][IMG]

But even though Marko Elez resigned when questioned about his racist
beliefs, JD Vance, Elon Musk, and others are now calling for him to be
re-hired. You really can’t make this stuff up.

This is who they are,
Peter — and we have to confront
that in order to make any of this better.

As an immigrant who arrived in the United States from India at the age of
16, this is personal for Pramila. She knows America was built on the idea
of being a refuge for those in need, “the tired masses, yearning to
breathe free.” And she won’t sit down while unrepentant racists try to
destroy it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-4742&amount=3&refcode2=4742_420207_paPCk2&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2 ]But Peter,
Pramila can’t do it alone. We ALL have to do our part to build a better
future. Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to
help us grow our progressive movement and defeat MAGA for good?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250207?amount=3&refcode=em20250207-4742&refcode2=4742_420207_paPCk2&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2 ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Team Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250207-4742-footer&t=1002&refcode2=4742_420207_paPCk2&akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4742%2E420207%2EpaPCk2

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

If the party is going to move forward, we need to get serious about state and local races.
Lieutenant Governor Davis has been showing exactly what that looks like here in Pennsylvania. Over the last two years, he has worked tirelessly to improve the lives of everyday Pennsylvanians by focusing on solutions, not rhetoric.
But now, he needs our help. Republicans are already gearing up to spend millions of dollars on downballot races like his in 2026, and we need to be ready to fight back.
[Can you make sure we have the resources to take on whatever Republicans throw our way by rushing $10 or even $25 right now? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746606/526937000/-1030828174?amount=10&source=AD_020725_EM_FR_Local_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTIxNDA2OC05OWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oDPPydJnCiAuMSG3Jq86uh8h8MBYYCzlLb4781S-mPs=)

name: Mark Kelly for Arizona
subject: Executive Orders
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly campaigned on fighting climate change, lowering prescription drug costs, and defending our democracy — and each of these efforts are under threat from the Trump administration.
#

Team —
One of the first things President Trump did when he took office was sign a flurry of executive orders.
He withdrew the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement.
He rescinded a 2022 order from President Biden’s administration to lower prescription drug costs.
He pardoned more than 1,500 people charged with crimes for their actions on January 6th.
Since then, he’s continued issuing executive orders that attack the very foundation of who we are as a nation.
Mark Kelly campaigned on fighting climate change, lowering prescription drug costs, and defending our democracy — and each of these efforts are under threat from the Trump administration.
Mark’s still leading the fight, but he needs your help to raise the resources to counter President Trump’s agenda.
We’re humbly asking:
[**Make a donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign so that we have what we need to fight back.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb25/.w4QhX4&refcode=em250207-1-f&t=1&akid=5958%2E6688874%2EpPwFvn)

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Peter, have you heard the latest on our Major Threat?
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746545/526936877/-119294984?am=20&contactdata=tG3zMQL/LMYH0Ru48BJwRchfA7I77tdT7qt0vuIsc4KWY6d84TPI52fKcyqCS5TAnEoeal5LkI80DvO0ReGSR++yEuLtNOH7XGAtONXKSk41aocbBlnkdsv6VxTLHyL4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, Last week we announced the [**first Major Threat of the session to Oregon’s health and clean air, HB 3119,**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746546/526936878/1208847377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) a bill that will delay Oregon’s clean truck rules. In the same week, the House Climate, Energy, and Environment Committee held a hearing on this bill, deciding to review the comments and testimony and put together questions before reconvening. While many of our members and those in our state’s climate action network took action and put together testimony, we are still facing [strong opposition](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746547/526936880/-1833910610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) from the trucking industry and big oil, who are both working to delay Oregon’s clean truck rules. We were overwhelmed by so many of our members springing into action to protect healthy and clean air by opposing HB 3119 — thank you! Unfortunately, the trucking industry and big oil are laser focused on getting this bill across the finish line, so [**we need even more support now**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746550/526936882/-119294984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) to stop this before the next hearing. What we need now is more resources to gather even more testimonials, educate Oregonians on this Major Threat, and lobby our elected officials. [**Are you able to make a timely gift of any amount today to stop this Major Threat?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746557/526936887/-119294984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
[**Donate now**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746561/526936892/-119294984?am=20&contactdata=tG3zMQL/LMYH0Ru48BJwRchfA7I77tdT7qt0vuIsc4KWY6d84TPI52fKcyqCS5TAnEoeal5LkI80DvO0ReGSR++yEuLtNOH7XGAtONXKSk41aocbBlnkdsv6VxTLHyL4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
| | We can’t stop this Major Threat without your voice. Right now it’s extremely important that we put our foot down and tell our legislators what we won’t accept this session - especially while we have supermajorities. Our state cannot afford to backtrack on our climate progress by delaying our clean truck rules, when DEQ has already adopted additional compliance [flexibilities in November](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746567/526936899/1687407526?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) and will be engaging in ongoing conversations during the permanent rule making process. [**Please consider an urgent gift to our work to defend our state against Major Threat HB 3119, a bill that would backtrack on our climate progress.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746574/526936913/-119294984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
[**Donate now**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101746576/526936924/-119294984?am=20&contactdata=tG3zMQL/LMYH0Ru48BJwRchfA7I77tdT7qt0vuIsc4KWY6d84TPI52fKcyqCS5TAnEoeal5LkI80DvO0ReGSR++yEuLtNOH7XGAtONXKSk41aocbBlnkdsv6VxTLHyL4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlMmIwNzU1LTk5ZTUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OGi-qpD3TgXXjMWPEx9MX6YafkOKdI-tana04ReJOmY=&emci=b1b3d9eb-71e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ae2b0755-99e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
Thank you for standing up for our clean air! Together,

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Last week we announced the a bill that will delay Oregon’s clean truck rules. In the same week, the House Climate, Energy, and Environment Committee held a hearing on this bill, deciding to review the comments and testimony and put together questions before reconvening. While many of our members and those in our state’s climate action network took action and put together testimony, we are still facing from the trucking industry and big oil, who are both working to delay Oregon’s clean truck rules. We were overwhelmed by so many of our members springing into action to protect healthy and clean air by opposing HB 3119 — thank you! Unfortunately, the trucking industry and big oil are laser focused on getting this bill across the finish line, so to stop this before the next hearing. What we need now is more resources to gather even more testimonials, educate Oregonians on this Major Threat, and lobby our elected officials. | | We can’t stop this Major Threat without your voice. Right now it’s extremely important that we put our foot down and tell our legislators what we won’t accept this session - especially while we have supermajorities. Our state cannot afford to backtrack on our climate progress by delaying our clean truck rules, when DEQ has already adopted additional compliance and will be engaging in ongoing conversations during the permanent rule making process. Thank you for standing up for our clean air! Together, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.

| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a8a6410b57914afc894182e21b61d83b&_e=bvGmPsLxXeP3mzMpWRiKYmvvTJc4DUahKdQT2WyhWe-3FJ9bmTloC7Z-80ugRh4Wayj0-5si8IH5uM40LaQM6D8f9rOJtziP2DXj8ZxwbwIixLccxHcRY9oKCipV4Cv_3kzLh8qy_b53gab9iQcEngHZtQio6CV66xKQC4Z--qpuXQoy1jMbBchq19BIBuavKcSD2Xn8ESV5o0rI9xOYwZ43CODt-1no5bgQOlBU2hbLkqk9RnGj-RbPtgZS6smF7JpmmGx28xKlg9IQsWWdMvALS4wisp0lKcvA4_9eY3w1GT10HVW_LBADYUAXbMMA-lW3d17EEv7dLFncmXblHONbL4fKwJPa8XgKnlj_EVjAv1fRdi37JxqBMTweI9odmgo9sF-VssSXKY1ILiX9qtZsKCOGElgihSZulpn2fMY%3D)

| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a8a6410b57914afc894182e21b61d83b&_e=bvGmPsLxXeP3mzMpWRiKYmvvTJc4DUahKdQT2WyhWe-3FJ9bmTloC7Z-80ugRh4Wayj0-5si8IH5uM40LaQM6D8f9rOJtziP2DXj8ZxwbwIixLccxHcRY9oKCipV4Cv_3kzLh8qy_b53gab9iQcEngHZtQio6CV66xKQC4Z--qpuXQoy1jMbBchq19BIBuavKcSD2Xn8ESV5o0rI9xOYwZ43CODt-1no5bgQOlBU2hbLkqk9RnGj-RbPtgZS6smF7JpmmGx28xKlg9IQsWWdMok-0Tc71gYq1d9eZ-Tx9N8OG2M27DypUX7AWxgyu4lExDkrUtuVq-42tTRXDfiK-60XHHPHoOihHIxJuLJefSngFgqD8qfWKAsJ2To9sCb6GXewbp8SH24IXfxFdT2RrDuxiiSddXArt8nwFuRuCa4%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a8a6410b57914afc894182e21b61d83b&_e=bvGmPsLxXeP3mzMpWRiKYmvvTJc4DUahKdQT2WyhWe-3FJ9bmTloC7Z-80ugRh4Wayj0-5si8IH5uM40LaQM6D8f9rOJtziP2DXj8ZxwbwIixLccxHcRY9oKCipV4Cv_3kzLh8qy_b53gab9iQcEngHZtQio6CV66xKQC4Z--qpuXQoy1jMbBchq19BIBuavKcSD2Xn8ESV5o0rI9xOYwZ43CODt-1no5bgQOlBU2hbLkqk9RnGj-RbPtgZS6smF7JpmmGx28xKlg9IQsWWdMqY5IQgKCW41W6Jyedz8FnX-ANVk-dBgsPxoJEjOM2xd-WhJpRtWV3xiNIlGsuzlwUnfxKditWwoduPM4nD-neVZK5jmPahOe6QfrrHpZ0BfsaTJdmcg0lHlHKdBc46cyl4dTXSsfFfxAg0RGDAFkWU%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a8a6410b57914afc894182e21b61d83b&_e=bvGmPsLxXeP3mzMpWRiKYmvvTJc4DUahKdQT2WyhWe-3FJ9bmTloC7Z-80ugRh4Wayj0-5si8IH5uM40LaQM6D8f9rOJtziP2DXj8ZxwbwIixLccxHcRY9oKCipV4Cv_3kzLh8qy_b53gab9iQcEngHZtQio6CV66xKQC4Z--qpuXQoy1jMbBchq19BIBuavKcSD2Xn8ESV5o0rI9xOYwZ43CODt-1no5bgQOlBU2hbLkqk9RnGj-RbPtgZS6smF7JpmmGx28xKlg9IQsWWdMuznzwNoVyDk5LRUQgPMXvvQZR2wzMlv0CQun9QkmW_a_oF1cusb2anTwltx5DzeQ6zm_paPdesw9nfm_OI4PdcCBPHTcxcNNJzjCJPVqXAExXlM2JaMjPk18FHJHAhK93xlLOpUsAEGJZPqJo3WlK4%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a8a6410b57914afc894182e21b61d83b&_e=bvGmPsLxXeP3mzMpWRiKYmvvTJc4DUahKdQT2WyhWe-3FJ9bmTloC7Z-80ugRh4Wayj0-5si8IH5uM40LaQM6D8f9rOJtziP2DXj8ZxwbwIixLccxHcRY9oKCipV4Cv_3kzLh8qy_b53gab9iQcEngHZtQio6CV66xKQC4Z--qpuXQoy1jMbBchq19BIBuavKcSD2Xn8ESV5o0rI9xOYwZ43CODt-1no5bgQOlBU2hbLkqk9RnGj-RbPtgZS6smF7JpmmGx28xKlg9IQsWWdMrVnBzmrzKS1wBin-Zrn8v1em1AKnDYwDSkKhAfS_YOKqOBA0gErK5RHoRT5JC2xK7RWQ5t9tJuJ5DF5FBFHPTvUcPNH5y0trXeu9T1V6SexyBKNFDiNlBo2rg7eMUjQOqxhGHNU1l8hpheOUNTr7Oo%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: These individuals have enormous power and zero accountability| | | ...the deep-state | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem. | | | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). Your participation is of the utmost importance. Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%. Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies? Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year? Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average? What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee? These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. subject: My Black History Month Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
And what the “tolerant” left will never admit about their views
| | | | [](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)
---
[](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)
|
---
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds
I’m the proud son of a single-mother from the inner-city who achieved the American Dream.
But when the “tolerant” left found out I’m a Black Man who supports President Trump, they opened-up the racist floodgates against me.
>From ridiculous slurs to calling me a “white supremacist”, these people go NUTS when I break all of their outdated narratives on race.
**Look, I don’t care what your skin color is. If you love our country, you’re a friend in my book.**
But now radical Democrats are coming after me for my message on Black History Month, and sadly things are taking a turn for the worse for me.
They want each and every one of Trump’s Black MAGA supporters like me out of the picture, and they’re raising MILLIONS to see it happen next election.
I hate to admit this - but I’m at the top of their “ _**Must-Go MAGA List**_ ”, and it’s not looking good.
I’m fighting day and night for President Trump & The MAGA Movement, and I’m afraid their dreams of a Radical Left House Majority will come true if I can’t muster an overwhelming response this month.
Please, I can’t let President Trump down. You’re the only reason I’m able to keep fighting. _**[So if you can, could I count on your support?](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)**_

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)
|
---
Thank you for your timely response,
Byron Donalds _**[]()**_

name: Sharice Davids
subject: How we take action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Seven ways to fight back:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746705/526937273/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=) I’ve heard from many people who are feeling overwhelmed and angry about the Trump Administration’s attacks on the rule of law and on the livelihoods of countless Americans. First, Elon Musk and his allies in the Trump Administration unilaterally shut off funding to vital programs that millions of Americans depend on, like Head Start and Meals on Wheels. Then, Musk and his team accessed sensitive government payment systems that contain private information like Americans’ Social Security numbers — until a court case, temporarily at least, put a stop to it. Meanwhile, Donald Trump has nominated dangerously unqualified people to run our government and oversee our national security. And instead of taking _any_ action to lower prices, Trump has issued a series of executive orders that hurt and divide the American people — and test the limits of his power. [_**If President Trump’s dangerous actions have personally impacted you, your family, or your community, will you take a moment to share your story with me and my team? Hearing directly from folks like you can make a big difference in this fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746706/526937274/1938279200?refcode=email_020725_what-you-can-do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=&emci=1fd11259-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4f4f0347-9ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458) | | [Share Your Story →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746707/526937275/1949920206?refcode=email_020725_what-you-can-do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=&emci=1fd11259-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4f4f0347-9ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458)
---
**So many folks are eager to get involved, but unsure of the best ways to fight back.** And the fact is, being in the minority party in every branch of government makes it difficult to slow any of this down.
But that doesn’t mean we can give up or give in. We can’t let our outrage turn to helplessness. This is a moment that demands action.
_**To that end, here are seven real, concrete actions every single one of us can take to fight back against this chaos, reduce the harm it causes, and stand up for our communities:**_
**1) Call your Senators.** Ask them to vote against, slow down, and block President Trump’s unqualified nominees. You can call the Senate switchboard (202-224-3121) to be connected with your Senators’ offices, or [_**look up their phone numbers to call them directly.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746708/526937276/-829706656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=&emci=1fd11259-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4f4f0347-9ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458)
**2) Call your state’s Attorney General’s office** and push them to join litigation to stop Trump’s unlawful executive orders and Elon Musk’s billionaire takeover.
**3) Invest in your community.** Some of the nation’s most important and lifesaving charity organizations are at risk due to the Trump Administration’s actions. There’s never been a better time to donate to an organization whose mission is important to you. (One of my personal favorites is Harvesters Community Food Network, an organization dedicated to fighting hunger in northeast Kansas and northwest Missouri. You can [_**click here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746709/526937277/408631638?df_id=2800&2800.donation=form1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=&emci=1fd11259-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4f4f0347-9ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458) to make a donation!)
**4) Find your people.** Pick the cause that’s most important to you, find a group of folks in your community who are committed to it, and get involved. If that group doesn’t yet exist, start building it yourself!
**5) Help people understand the real-world impact of what’s happening.** Post on social media about the Trump actions that most concern you — but help people understand why it matters. When people hear about the federal government, it feels like an abstraction that’s far removed from their daily lives. So, share a story about how what’s happening directly impacts you or people you care about. You can even write a letter to the editor or opinion piece for your local newspaper.
**6) Focus on the future — work to elect Democrats in 2025 and 2026.** One of the best ways to bring transparency and accountability back to Washington is to flip the House in 2026. We only need to flip three seats, and [_**hold competitive districts like mine**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746710/526937278/-1118985384?refcode=email_020725_what-you-can-do&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=), to get it done.
**7) Run for office yourself.** We need more leaders who care about real solutions serving in all levels of government. Check out [_**Run For Something**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746711/526937279/-2030851895?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=&emci=1fd11259-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4f4f0347-9ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458) to get started!
I know that these times are difficult. The challenges we’re up against, and the harm we’re seeing every day, are very, very real. **But none of us are powerless.**
If we stick together, speak out, and use every tool we’ve got to fight for a better future, we will get through this. I promise you that I am going to stay in this fight, and I’m asking you to do the same.
With gratitude,
-Sharice
_P.S. If you’ve been impacted by President Trump’s actions, don’t forget to[ _**share your story with me and my team!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101746712/526937280/1949920206?refcode=email_020725_what-you-can-do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRmMDM0Ny05YWU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyKRXXmOn8FhpY3rzvkTjQylpClAn5rNnPw9Ae_fTOU=&emci=1fd11259-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4f4f0347-9ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458)_

| This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. clean_body: Seven ways to fight back: = I’ve heard from many people who are feeling overwhelmed and angry about the Trump Administration’s attacks on the rule of law and on the livelihoods of countless Americans. First, Elon Musk and his allies in the Trump Administration unilaterally shut off funding to vital programs that millions of Americans depend on, like Head Start and Meals on Wheels. Then, Musk and his team accessed sensitive government payment systems that contain private information like Americans’ Social Security numbers — until a court case, temporarily at least, put a stop to it. Meanwhile, Donald Trump has nominated dangerously unqualified people to run our government and oversee our national security. And instead of taking any action to lower prices, Trump has issued a series of executive orders that hurt and divide the American people — and test the limits of his power. | | So many folks are eager to get involved, but unsure of the best ways to fight back. And the fact is, being in the minority party in every branch of government makes it difficult to slow any of this down. But that doesn’t mean we can give up or give in. We can’t let our outrage turn to helplessness. This is a moment that demands action. To that end, here are seven real, concrete actions every single one of us can take to fight back against this chaos, reduce the harm it causes, and stand up for our communities: 1) Call your Senators. Ask them to vote against, slow down, and block President Trump’s unqualified nominees. You can call the Senate switchboard (202-224-3121) to be connected with your Senators’ offices, or 2) Call your state’s Attorney General’s office and push them to join litigation to stop Trump’s unlawful executive orders and Elon Musk’s billionaire takeover. 3) Invest in your community. body:
Bend the knee or pay the price | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkddXL4sy5GSZuEnuBoTdquplK-ZpErqGwCpEI-Nc5a90OwzA_de6xiotLp4ZGvfoDYnUuRwjGxP6oHn0o5aQNkLh1Fr_7CgXXd-fPdckEZA6Ijaqw7dP4xRGAqLKNd4fS-xVXgu1ZxCRl0QYkIyJ-CEiw%3D%3D)

Peter,

**Tariffs... Tariffs... Tariffs!

Bend the knee or pay the price. **
We are entering a post-woke, post-globalist golden age of America. Leadership is never easy, and it’s rarely convenient. Thank you, Donald J. Trump, for applying the pressure and turning up the heat early.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkddQM5T5a4-zbCeOxbaEMQVTIFIBNH2FAWqOoXtDwb6xAJ5hU7GO5Xr-YWX0gE2sRWCv0Xv4ljm5FFxhV673bvr0yVmvYTneGR-2TA58DZ5RPSloqWUiy6lvulNmBX4oXj8hM8c8SUaOjD71hTR_2S4tw%3D%3D)
_We’ve already seen Mexico and Canada bend the knee to avoid paying the price of tariffs on their exported goods. The “experts” called President Trump crazy for introducing tariffs. But THE TARIFFS ARE ALREADY WORKING!_

Mexico has sent 10,000 soldiers to our Southern Border, and Canada has agreed to support America’s border policy already. This was IMPOSSIBLE under the weak leadership of Obama and Biden.

**But now, Radical Leftists are FIGHTING BACK in Congress to oppose President Trump’s tariffs and agenda. This is a CLEAR DENIAL of the People’s will!**

I’m running for Senate to defeat one of the most Radical Senators in America – Tina Smith. She’s been opposing our America-First Agenda ever since she was appointed to the Senate in 2018. It’s time to FIRE HER and elect Minnesota’s FIRST EVER Black Republican Senator.

[**Can you rush just $10 before my midnight deadline to help me beat her?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkddzICP2bxkZrKTtSVTOFJ0lckpUTjJfD_AHxF1veWsou4aH_Q1z4ukOxdm4pHZKw26YP0O5LMfCCrxPj5W9vU684Y3ERhk-NSUx-OX1AkikeDbTFRHN6CufttLQWqNXH7b2MQHxU8fnUsUI-u2MLNPKA%3D%3D)

I’ll do the exact OPPOSITE of Tina Smith in the Senate. I’ll stand with President Trump in his final two years in office, and I’ll commit to advancing his America-First Agenda for my FULL TENURE as a United States Senator.

| [ **THE PEOPLE ARE COMING!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkdd6ErNZYMmLxdMJVeCJTao6CwXqnuQjse62KTXEzsZDwvX82MTJFRZ7ETwE152k9dDWRryqXgRCio9E-10eDrijTp4fzoL3NoGe0QveHTOByhtq4v4OgxDAk3J9l1vjSn4a1m-MGCfZdXA5s-3dqGL8w%3D%3D)
---

[**Just a $10 donation before midnight will give me the resources to start fighting to defeat Tina Smith.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkdd1OfNw7RTxWd9VhXn7_MQNWY0bC1jg_-yDef8084YRYQtgPeV8QkddTZprVkrLv1F6ZwznxuM5z45wPIGv3WQOLq6Riza8u8jO2dSQJja5bdAiniWeBuDG4Wzs2eO4e67mxMPqdd_K_rovSqew0Yfnw%3D%3D)

Godspeed,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkddpxXHVQBEu0Zg2uobgIBmgpc133o5mHrQ_tpXeFOKF1U4PK-pek5aamctKbmR-zmdhLn-m6CejjHwXA6ejPxrIYIrQQaHArqthbaQXRmh96DYRu_5GURTj4dStSls6mFMwZmKtXEFQxA3zIScXI-21w%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ca424fab3ba54674bc8116a7f4183353&_e=pcrQdHV-CTf2uffJLAvBPr_Z2HuHSEqHIBTC5AksmJxKGyPZ97v86fgn9aBv-mXcDa9-mJKtYqabyRHbgFyBFVW6NJAzLIgWUkrsJkVqxB5yLU8xSVRRXua0L4T1ii6PqR6MIkP-7OLR_GteXsphi03s3U6xdJTWlyRvl8gN6-5GEYiOSoKaQPBtlTQWLkdd_AaqHU2vPfFRqw42vdi6tydtYG6-g9qgotl4hQxZ-zXNb-tZNXQM0IyLNA_vDcatYRXU_WsI5nMg2zTOy537o98_OFd_wwys67z_wphZJoev8bBjIH5JuBIg05tzFVeGeFOY9jrjxTiuDcN5tSTRBA%3D%3D)

If we don’t act now to hold them accountable, **Trump and his MAGA allies will try to tear down every Democratic institution in their wake to keep themselves in power.**

**It will take all of us standing together** to reinforce the strength of our democracy and keep Trump in check.

HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Elon Musk is becoming the president
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The government is not a tech company. It provides services for American citizens. Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, food assistance, disability payments for veterans. Musk and these 20 year olds working for him just see the government as a bunch of numbers — but those numbers are people. It’s their lives.
#

Peter, a lot of people have been asking me about Elon Musk.
Here’s the truth: He’s essentially becoming the president. It’s a huge problem.
He’s ignoring the law and using private workers from the companies he owns to come into the government and hack our systems — trillions of dollars in payments at the US Treasury, classified files at USAID, people’s social security numbers, and more every day.
He thinks the government is some big tech company. Move fast and break things.
Look, I have friends in tech. Smart people. But if you found a start-up and it fails, you move on to the next thing. Money might be tight, but you keep going.
The government is not a tech company. It provides services for American citizens. Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, food assistance, disability payments for veterans. Musk and these 20 year olds working for him just see the government as a bunch of numbers — but those numbers are people. It’s their lives.
When the government fails, people die. I deployed to Iraq after the Bush administration lied us into a war that we didn’t need to fight. That’s a government failure. A million Americans dying in a pandemic is a government failure.
The de-facto president, Elon Musk, the richest man on earth, is ripping critical systems out of the government and setting it up to fail. He is putting everyone at risk so he can get a tax cut.
So, I want to emphasize this: I understand what’s happening. I hear your concerns, and I share them. In the Senate we’re looking at all the leverage points we have, but it’s not easy. Republicans have all the levers of power, and that won’t change for at least two years.
But we’re picking fights — we’re working to block Trump’s nominees. We’re gearing up for budget fights to restrict the actions they can take. Lawsuits are rising all over the country, blocking potentially illegal actions from the administration.
It’s going to take time, we’re going to take some hits, but we’re going to get through it. Arizona sent me to the Senate to fight, and that’s what I’m going to do.
Semper Fi,
Ruben
Donald Trump is handing our country over to Elon Musk.
Ruben’s doing everything he can to fight back in the Senate, but he can’t do that work without our help.
[**Help him keep it up by making a donation today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb25.RCmV-L&refcode=em250207-1-120&t=1&akid=3702%2E734936%2EE29N9i)

name: George Whitesides
subject: This moment demands swift action.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

President Trump – emboldened by House Republicans – is spending his first weeks in the White House moving us from one constitutional crisis to the next.

He has handed Elon Musk access to the Treasury Department's internal and external payment systems. He moved to dismantle USAID and the Department of Education, attempted to freeze federal funding, started a reckless tariff war – the list goes on.

I’m especially angry about the conditions Trump is trying to place on federal aid to Southern California in the wake of the devastating wildfires.

I want to be clear with you, Peter, I’m not taking Trump’s extreme overreach lying down. I have a duty to the people I was elected to serve, and I intend to act swiftly when our rights come under attack.

Right now, that means advancing legislation and supporting litigation to block any unlawful actions this president takes. I’m also looking ahead to 2026 when we can take back the House and restore some much-needed oversight to this administration.

Thank you,

George

clean_body: As a dairy farmer, I’m used to rolling up my sleeves and working hard to get the job done. | = Hi Peter, it’s Blake Gendebien. I’m honored to be endorsed by the 15 Democratic County Chairs, making me the presumptive Democratic nominee in the potential special election for New York’s 21st Congressional District. = | = NY-21 is one of the most competitive races in the country right now. The GOP’s majority is incredibly small, and this special election will be one of our first chances to fight back. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race. As a dairy farmer, I’m used to rolling up my sleeves and working hard to get the job done. But flipping this seat won’t be easy, so I’m counting on your support to hit the ground running and connect with voters across the North Country. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Blake * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020725_2&amount=25]
Axios: 1 big thing: Happy 15th birthday, $7.25 federal minimum wage [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Axios_MinWage.png]
Straight from Axios , Team: " The federal minimum wage has basically become an outdated relic: It last went up to $7.25 on July 24, 2009 — 15 years ago. "
The even more stunning fact -- " in inflation-adjusted terms, the federal minimum wage is worth less now than at any time since 1949 ."
We would like to hear from more voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should we raise the minimum wage?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=020725_2&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=020725_2&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020725_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020725_2&amount=25]

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Kash Patel will turn the FBI into Trump’s Gestapo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter On Donald Trump’s first day in office, he signed an executive order to “end the weaponization of the federal government.” **But don’t be fooled, Peter: The only recent weaponization of the government was done by Donald Trump during his first term — these allegations are nothing more than an effort to justify his forthcoming abuse of power to use the federal government for his personal interests.** And that is the _only_ reason he nominated Kash Patel to be the new director of the FBI. Patel is _unfit_ to serve in the FBI — let alone lead it. Former Trump administration officials such as Attorney General Bill Barr, National Security Advisor John Bolton, and CIA Director Gina Haspel have sounded the alarm about how unqualified and dangerous Patel would be as FBI Director, where he would have the power to initiate criminal investigations and the responsibility to protect our homeland. More than anyone else in Trump’s orbit, Patel was rewarded for a shocking degree of sucking up to Trump. He actually wrote a children’s book called “King Donald,” recorded a version of the Star Spangled Banner with violent January 6th convicts, and published an enemies list of people he would go after on behalf of Trump. Last week, Patel had his confirmation hearing in the Senate. Not surprisingly, Patel repeatedly lied under oath, played dumb, and avoided answering many questions. While Patel testified under oath that FBI employees would be protected from political retribution and would go through the proper procedures, eight senior special agents were terminated the next day for their role in the Trump and January 6 prosecutions and the DOJ asked for the identities of thousands more. Kash Patel has promised he will reshape the FBI. What he clearly means is that he will turn this apolitical institution into a politicized agent of Trump’s revenge and retribution presidency. **_This_ , Peter, is what actual weaponization of the federal government looks like.** In the last Congress, I served on the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government created by Jim Jordan — and take it from me, the only purpose of this committee was to shield Donald Trump from any sort of accountability. Republicans spent two years interfering in ongoing criminal investigations and making unsupported allegations that Special Counsel Jack Smith’s two indictments against Donald Trump were politically motivated. But Trump’s allies aren’t interested whatsoever in ending the weaponization of the federal government. As Patel’s nomination to be FBI Director shows, they’re determined to use their bogus allegations of weaponization in order to rationalize their own weaponization of the government against anyone who speaks out against or opposes Donald Trump. **And Kash Patel is the primary hatchet man to do Trump’s personal bidding.** **[I will continue raising the alarm about Kash Patel, and I’m counting on folks like you to show Senate Republicans that they must reject him. Will you pitch in a donation today to support my efforts to reject Kash Patel?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101748848/526943435/-585077023?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ4ZmNlYS05ZmU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvyKjS5c4L1VkJTsEGcdXpQnmi6tDZ3N6X2G8AUliZM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101748849/526943436/-585077023?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ4ZmNlYS05ZmU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvyKjS5c4L1VkJTsEGcdXpQnmi6tDZ3N6X2G8AUliZM=)

We’re exploring every legal option to stop this dangerous and unconstitutional overreach.

| Peter,

I’ve heard from many of you about your concerns with Elon Musk infiltrating our government systems. **I want to be absolutely clear: Your personal data shouldn’t be in the hands of an unelected billionaire.**

I’m working together with fellow Democrats to protect your privacy and hold him accountable >>

▶️ **Stopping Unlawful Access:** We’re exploring every legal option to stop this dangerous and unconstitutional overreach.

**▶️ Drafting Bills:** We’re drafting legislation to stop unauthorized access, improve security, and prevent Trump administration officials from exposing your taxpayer data.

▶️ **Launching Investigations:** We’re demanding congressional hearings and investigations to understand why Elon Musk was given access to the Treasury.

▶️ **Calling for Independent Reviews:** We’re calling on the Treasury Inspector General and GAO to immediately investigate potential violations of taxpayer privacy laws.

**I’m using every lever I can access to put a stop to this. I’m also calling on the few Republicans left who care about the rule of law, democracy, and Congress’s oversight authority to join Democrats and millions of Americans in opposing this constitutional overreach.**
---

And Linda is wasting no time fighting back for the working class.

clean_body: We’re exploring every legal option to stop this dangerous and unconstitutional overreach. | = | Peter, I’ve heard from many of you about your concerns with Elon Musk infiltrating our government systems. I want to be absolutely clear: Your personal data shouldn’t be in the hands of an unelected billionaire. I’m working together with fellow Democrats to protect your privacy and hold him accountable >> ▶️ Stopping Unlawful Access: We’re exploring every legal option to stop this dangerous and unconstitutional overreach. ▶️ Drafting Bills: We’re drafting legislation to stop unauthorized access, improve security, and prevent Trump administration officials from exposing your taxpayer data. ▶️ Launching Investigations: We’re demanding congressional hearings and investigations to understand why Elon Musk was given access to the Treasury. ▶️ Calling for Independent Reviews: We’re calling on the Treasury Inspector General and GAO to immediately investigate potential violations of taxpayer privacy laws. I’m using every lever I can access to put a stop to this. I’m also calling on the few Republicans left who care about the rule of law, democracy, and Congress’s oversight authority to join Democrats and millions of Americans in opposing this constitutional overreach. | | The Trump administration is wasting no time lining the pockets of the ultra-wealthy like Elon Musk. And Linda is wasting no time fighting back for the working class. = | = Onward, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. Former Navy SEAL congressman Eli Crane **[completely humiliated Democrat Rep. Eric Swalwell](https://substack.com/redirect/e0c5920f-49d0-4b68-8b92-1f9a765c838b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for whining about Elon Musk and Trump's DOGE cuts to the government.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e0c5920f-49d0-4b68-8b92-1f9a765c838b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e0c5920f-49d0-4b68-8b92-1f9a765c838b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Swalwell warned that American security could be threatened if Musk's cuts continue to be carried out. "I'm all for getting rid of waste, fraud and abuse,... but when it comes to national security, we better be pretty damn careful where we make cuts because we will be hit..."
**[Crane ceased the opportunity to completely dunk on Swalwell.](https://substack.com/redirect/e0c5920f-49d0-4b68-8b92-1f9a765c838b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Just want to say to Elon Musk, wow man, you are really effective because these guys are melting down. You must be doing something right," he joked.
"We might need some of your funds to get these guys some tissues, safe spaces, maybe a couple therapy dogs," he added.
Watch the brutal burn right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e0c5920f-49d0-4b68-8b92-1f9a765c838b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Gold and silver aren't just precious metals--they're part of American history. They're real, tangible, and something you can hold on to.
Physical gold and silver have stood the test of time. And they're a great way to hedge against things like inflation and market volatility.
If you're looking for a way to help safeguard your savings, I recommend my partners at the top rated precious metals company - Goldco. They've made the process of buying gold and silver super easy, whether you're new to the game or you've been at it for years.

The virtual forum kicks off at 8:30pm ET / 5:30 PT Monday, Feb. 10th — don’t miss it! Thank you for being part of this movement for our planet and our future. We hope you’ll join this amazing group of activists and leaders as we dig into the many ways that we can fight back in this pivotal movement! name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Voter suppression in NC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Earlier this week a lawsuit related to the gerrymandered NC Senate maps headed to trial.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=42aR9rRVl9GJyOa%2Fy2kUj76E3rTN1ux0i2yEMMG%2B8BZRbckcASmzOnksHb6BwljMl8yeG%2F7Sx9RfMKunpWMd9EK%2FgDwzcOl%2BkHr5A6FZ5mULHXZf%2B4zsGjCqhCDf%2BP0HxVzlfiVKIYzESRHFjp0qDJa4RdOi6zK8x14sSizEIqTwf7QGClqhqic7ogDTC15VsXPmDT8OP9kIJgwUvHVbfTD7mYALLAC2I3obLt8YJMYYa%2FtAGKX9IbpwY6Ir8YIHyNzC1hwjycvYurp4lai40ylwy4FX%2FymN3PH2pJNlyu3fwfa4AW9VT3Xvpwosa0i%2FNeAmVXwrL0ucY6JxJ8uGzTsjrRnec64NLXH%2BSC7SCKvsKZWcXilQevAmVvCsNr9MEXVv0pp3DXr9uEte3puBBJIWQOEBAcPtbtJ75VYcYiQ%3D)
